episodes.overview: When a financial consulting company CEO is poisoned to death, a woman from Sherlock's past who emerges as a possible suspect.

episodes.name: Ancient History
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson find themselves digging through the dark world of the mob to find a killer when they discover the body of a former assassin. Meanwhile, Watson helps a close friend track down a mystery man who swept her off her feet.

episodes.name: An Unnatural Arrangement
episodes.overview: When Captain Gregson’s home is invaded, Holmes and Watson work to find the masked gunman before he strikes again. Meanwhile, Gregson gives his team some insight into his private life.

episodes.name: The Marchioness
episodes.overview: Sherlock’s brother, Mycroft, arrives in New York and enlists Holmes and Watson to help solve a case involving his former fiancée. Meanwhile, Sherlock has a difficult time accepting Mycroft and Joan’s relationship.

episodes.name: Blood is Thicker
episodes.overview: When a beautiful young woman is murdered, Holmes and Watson investigate her ties to a billionaire CEO. Meanwhile, Mycroft makes a case for Sherlock to move back to London.

episodes.name: On The Line
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson uncover the identity of a serial killer whose case has gone cold and find themselves butting heads with the NYPD.

episodes.name: Tremors
episodes.overview: When an investigation goes horribly wrong, Sherlock must testify in an official police inquiry which jeopardizes his and Watson’s future with the NYPD

episodes.name: Internal Audit
episodes.overview: When a hedge fund manager who was also running a Ponzi scheme is murdered, Holmes and Watson must determine which of his clients is guilty.  Also, Sherlock contemplates sponsoring a fellow recovering addict.

episodes.name: The Diabolical Kind
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson come face to face with Moriarty when their one-time adversary is brought in as a consultant on a kidnapping case. Meanwhile, Detective Bell continues his struggle on the road to recovery.

episodes.name: All in the Family
episodes.overview: When a body is found in a barrel, Holmes and Watson launch an investigation into the mafia’s ties to the murder. Meanwhile, Sherlock attempts to make amends with Detective Bell.

episodes.name: Dead Clade Walking
episodes.overview: Joan discovers an unsolved murder connected to a rare prehistoric fossil when she reviews one of Sherlock's cold cases; Sherlock's responsibilities as a sobriety sponsor cross personal boundaries.

episodes.name: Corpse de Ballet
episodes.overview: Holmes’ latest investigation takes him inside a professional dance company when an up-and-coming ballerina is murdered. Meanwhile, Watson embarks on a solo enquiry to find a homeless veteran when his friend alleges he was abducted.

episodes.name: The One Percent Solution
episodes.overview: Tensions rise when Holmes and Watson are forced to partner with Gareth Lestrade, Sherlock’s former Scotland Yard colleague, on a bombing investigation.

episodes.name: Ears to You
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson consult on a case in which a man suspected of murdering his wife years ago receives a ransom demand for her safe return. Meanwhile, Lestrade overstays his welcome at the brownstone and seems unwilling to leave.

episodes.name: The Hound of the Cancer Cells
episodes.overview: When a famous cancer researcher is found dead, Holmes and Watson must determine if the scientist’s untimely demise was tied to his latest cutting-edge invention. Meanwhile, Bell is finally cleared to re-enter the field.

episodes.name: The Many Mouths of Aaron Colville
episodes.overview: A serial killer known for biting his victims appears to be killing again, even though he was presumed dead.

episodes.name: No Lack of Void
episodes.overview: A pickpocket dies of anthrax poisoning, putting Holmes and Watson on the trail of the toxin’s source in order to prevent more deaths.

episodes.name: The Man with the Twisted Lip
episodes.overview: When Sherlock’s brother Mycroft makes a surprise return to New York, his motivations cause discord between Sherlock and Joan. Meanwhile, a missing person case takes Sherlock and Joan inside the world of unmanned aeronautics.

episodes.name: Paint It Black
episodes.overview: Business becomes personal for Sherlock when he is forced to partner with his estranged brother, Mycroft, to solve a case with life-or-death consequences.

episodes.name: Art in the Blood
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson come into contact with MI-6, the British intelligence agency, when a standard murder investigation turns out to have international and political implications. Meanwhile, in the wake of a crisis, Watson reevaluates her relationships with Sherlock and his brother, Mycroft.

episodes.name: The Grand Experiment
episodes.overview: Rising tension between Sherlock and Joan brings their partnership to a crossroads, but they endeavor to put their differences aside while they help Sherlock's brother, Mycroft, who faces accusations of treason and murder.

episodes.name: Enough Nemesis to Go Around
episodes.overview: Sherlock returns to New York with a new apprentice and a renewed interest in working with the NYPD after being fired by London’s MI6. However, Gregson won’t let him resume consulting for the department without permission from his former partner, Joan, the NYPD’s new go-to private investigator.

episodes.name: The Five Orange Pipz
episodes.overview: When Sherlock and Joan join forces on a double homicide, Sherlock’s new apprentice threatens the investigation when she allows her jealousy of Sherlock and Joan's work rapport to override her better judgment.

episodes.name: Just a Regular Irregular
episodes.overview: Sherlock helps a math genius from his network of 'Irregulars' experts after he stumbles upon a body while participating in a math puzzle competition. Joan attempts to extend an olive branch after she learns about Kitty’s past.

episodes.name: Bella
episodes.overview: Sherlock takes on the case of a stolen artificial intelligence software program, but seeks out Joan when he'd rather disprove the computer's abilities than find the thief. Joan meets Sherlock head-on when she finds out he's met with Andrew without telling her.

episodes.name: Rip Off
episodes.overview: Holmes and Kitty investigate the murder of a postal store owner whose death is connected to the illegal diamond trade. Meanwhile, Gregson's career is placed in jeopardy when he hits a fellow NYPD officer.

episodes.name: Terra Pericolosa
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson search for a thief who committed murder to steal a rare map. Meanwhile, Watson becomes concerned with Sherlock’s escalating interference into Kitty’s burgeoning personal life.

episodes.name: The Adventure of the Nutmeg Concoction
episodes.overview: A bored Sherlock forces his investigative services onto Joan, who is trying to locate a woman who has been missing for five years, and the only clue is the smell of nutmeg at the site of her disappearance. Meanwhile, Joan’s bond with her long-distance boyfriend, Andrew, is tested when a man from her past reappears and asks for her help.

episodes.name: End of Watch
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson join forces with the NYPD after a police officer is murdered. Also, Sherlock searches for the creator of a “recovery blog” who is posting personal statements he has made in sobriety meetings.

episodes.name: The Eternity Injection
episodes.overview: When Watson joins forces with Holmes and Kitty to locate a missing nurse she used to work with, the woman’s trail leads them to another person who has recently disappeared.

episodes.name: Seed Money
episodes.overview: While Kitty tries to find a runaway teen, Sherlock and Joan work a case in which the murder of a brilliant bioengineer looks to be at the hands of a drug cartel. Also, Joan makes a major life decision but worries it will impact Sherlock negatively, not knowing that Sherlock has big news of his own.

episodes.name: The Illustrious Client (1)
episodes.overview: Watson begins her new job as an in-house investigator for an insurance firm. However, her attention shifts to a case that is personal for both her and Holmes when they join forces to eliminate an imminent threat to Kitty.

episodes.name: The One That Got Away (2)
episodes.overview: As Kitty begins to unravel due to the imminent threat to her safety, Sherlock and Joan intensify their efforts to help her. Also, the origin of Sherlock and Kitty’s relationship is revealed.

episodes.name: Hemlock
episodes.overview: When a debt collector is murdered, Holmes and Watson try to narrow down the suspect pool from thousands of consumers who owed the victim money. Meanwhile, Watson’s relationship with Andrew progresses when he asks her to meet his father for the first time.

episodes.name: The Female of the Species
episodes.overview: An unexpected event brings Watson into contact again with Elana March, the crime boss she brought to justice. Also, with Watson distracted, Holmes partners with Detective Bell to investigate a theft at a local zoo.

episodes.name: When Your Number's Up
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson follow a blood trail into the world of wrongful death compensation when they investigate a series of murders in which the killer leaves envelopes of cash on the victims. Also, Holmes makes a generous gesture towards Watson as she suffers through the aftermath of a personal crisis.

episodes.name: For All You Know
episodes.overview: When Holmes is implicated in the murder of a woman who was killed during the height of his addiction, he investigates himself to find their connection. As Holmes retraces his steps with Watson’s help, the clues make his confidence in his own character waver.

episodes.name: T-Bone and the Iceman
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson investigate a murder that initially looks like a road rage incident, but takes a new direction when they learn the victim was flash-frozen at the time of death. Also, when Watson’s mother finds out Joan’s brother is cheating on his wife, she puts Joan in the awkward position of confronting him about the affair.

episodes.name: The View from Olympus
episodes.overview: When a driver for a ridesharing company is intentionally run over by a city cab, Holmes and Watson wonder if it’s a case of professional jealousy. A casual romance Holmes has with one of his longtime "Irregular" consultants becomes complicated when the woman makes a shocking request.

episodes.name: One Watson, One Holmes
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson find themselves in the middle of a civil war being fought on the Internet when a member of Everyone, the anonymous hacker group they periodically work with, is murdered.

episodes.name: A Stitch in Time
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson investigate the murder of a professional skeptic, a man who debunked paranormal, religious and scientific phenomenon for a living. The case becomes urgent when his homicide reveals a potential threat to homeland security. Also, Captain Gregson’s daughter and fellow NYPD officer, Hannah, asks Watson for help with one of her cases.

episodes.name: Under My Skin
episodes.overview: When two New York City paramedics are killed during a kidnapping, Holmes and Watson join the manhunt to find the murderer and the woman he abducted. Also, Holmes learns important information about his recovery sponsor, Alfredo, that strains their relationship.

episodes.name: The Best Way Out is Always Through
episodes.overview: When a judge is murdered, Holmes and Watson become involved in the interstate search to find the prime suspect, an escaped convict from a privatized prison. Also, when Holmes applies his deductive reasoning to Detective Bell’s new relationship, the romance hits a rough patch.

episodes.name: Absconded
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson look into the death of a member of Holmes’ online beekeeping community who was a researcher looking into a deadly Northeast honey bee outbreak. During the investigation, they meet Tara Parker, a brilliant entomologist, academic and the leader of New York’s beekeeping society. Also, Captain Gregson enlists Watson’s services in an off-book investigation that helps him make a life-changing decision.

episodes.name: A Controlled Descent
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson take on an investigation of a personal nature when Holmes’ recovery sponsor, Alfredo, suddenly disappears. As they delve into Alfredo’s life for clues, Holmes questions whether their friend has been abducted, or worse, if he suffered a relapse into addiction.

episodes.name: The Past is Parent
episodes.overview: When Holmes faces criminal charges in the aftermath of his recent violent behavior and relapse, his powerful father arrives in New York to fix his estranged son’s legal difficulties by any means necessary. Also, with Holmes and Watson’s consultancy with the NYPD in jeopardy, Holmes concentrates on the case of a missing wife believed to have been killed by her husband to try and get back in the department’s good graces.

episodes.name: Evidence of Things Not Seen
episodes.overview: When Morland offers to use his influence to have Sherlock and Joan reinstated as consultants to the NYPD, Sherlock’s mistrust of his father makes him question his motivation to help. Also, with no work offers coming in, Watson wrangles a gig with the FBI investigating a triple homicide in a top secret research lab.

episodes.name: Tag, You're Me
episodes.overview: When Sherlock finds himself distracted by his father’s ongoing presence in New York City, he offers to help Morland resolve a work issue in exchange for his prompt departure home. Also, Holmes and Watson’s investigation into the double murder of two men who looked alike leads them into the world of facial recognition technology.

episodes.name: All My Exes Live in Essex
episodes.overview: When Holmes and Watson investigate the murder of a fertility lab technician, they discover the woman had a secret personal life that leads them to multiple suspects. Also, the tables are turned on Watson when she’s investigated by an NYPD detective.

episodes.name: The Games Underfoot
episodes.overview: When an archeologist is murdered, Holmes and Watson believe the man may have been killed for what he discovered during his last excavation in a local landfill. Also, Sherlock’s relationship with Alfredo, his friend and former sobriety sponsor, hits a rough patch.

episodes.name: The Cost of Doing Business
episodes.overview: Morland offers to act as one of his son’s “Irregular” consultants so that he can lend Sherlock and Joan his considerable resources to help them solve a case.

episodes.name: Miss Taken
episodes.overview: When Watson’s stepfather writes a crime novel based on her work with Holmes without her knowledge, an underlying issue in their relationship is revealed.  Also, as Holmes and Watson investigate a retired FBI agent’s murder, they discover the man’s death is connected to an unsolved case from the victim’s career.

episodes.name: A Burden of Blood
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson investigate a homicide in which the victim was murdered in a manner reminiscent of the crimes of an infamous, and already incarcerated, serial killer. Also, Sherlock and Joan tutor Detective Bell for a police sergeant’s exam that would lead to a promotion and a post at another precinct.

episodes.name: Murder Ex Machina
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson search for a computer hacker responsible for three murders, including the death of a Russian billionaire who was visiting New York City. Also, Joan is surprised to receive a solo dinner invitation from Sherlock’s father.

episodes.name: Alma Matters
episodes.overview: Holmes’ tentative reconciliation with his father suffers a setback when Holmes and Watson discover Morland has been keeping a secret that threatens all of their safety. Also, Holmes and Watson investigate two murders connected to a for-profit college and its illegal recruitment practices.

episodes.name: Down Where the Dead Delight
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson must search for a killer without any physical evidence to aid them after a bomb is detonated in the New York City morgue. Also, Watson is suspicious when an NYPD detective she’s in a grudge match with asks her to consult on a case.

episodes.name: A View With a Room
episodes.overview: Captain Gregson’s colleague from Narcotics asks Holmes to orchestrate the perfect heist inside the heavily armed and virtually impenetrable compound of a drug-dealing biker gang. Also, when Watson assists Fiona Helbron, who helped her on a recent case, she makes a surprising discovery about Holmes.

episodes.name: A Study in Charlotte
episodes.overview: Sherlock and Joan search for a murderer who used poisonous mushrooms to kill a botany professor and a group of the instructor’s students. Also, when Joan is disturbed by loud noise next door, she discovers her neighbor, Trent, is renting out his home through a vacation site that caters to hard partiers.

episodes.name: Who Is That Masked Man?
episodes.overview: When Holmes’ investigation into the attempt on Morland’s life pushes their strained relationship to the breaking point, the identity of Sherlock’s mother is revealed. Also, when three gang members are murdered, Holmes and Watson are amazed when an elderly woman emerges as their prime suspect.

episodes.name: Up to Heaven and Down to Hell
episodes.overview: When Watson runs into Captain Gregson and his secret girlfriend, a former NYPD officer, she inadvertently sets the couple’s breakup in motion. Also, Holmes and Watson investigate the murder of a wealthy woman who left her considerable estate solely to a beloved dog.

episodes.name: Hounded
episodes.overview: At the urging of Morland’s wealthy associate, Henry Baskerville, Holmes and Watson look into the death of his brother and discover that a witness saw the man chased to his death by a large, glowing animal.

episodes.name: You've Got Me, Who's Got You?
episodes.overview: After a vigilante dressed up as a comic book hero is murdered, Holmes and Watson need to find the man's true identity and find his killer.

episodes.name: Ready or Not
episodes.overview: When a survivalist doctor goes missing, Holmes and Watson must determine whether he’s purposely gone off the grid or if he’s a victim of foul play. Holmes exhibits odd behavior when his romantic relationship with Fiona hits a critical point.

episodes.name: All In
episodes.overview: A mysterious woman who organizes illegal, high-stakes poker games arrives on Holmes and Watson’s doorstep and tells them her life is in danger claiming to be a former associate of Mycroft, Sherlock’s brother. However, as the pair investigates, Joan becomes suspicious that their new client isn’t being truthful.

episodes.name: Art Imitates Art
episodes.overview: As Holmes and Watson investigate a woman’s murder, they discover her death is linked to a piece of artwork that has ties to a crime that was committed when she was in college. Also, in the wake of a shocking personal revelation, Watson attempts to forge a connection with a recent client.

episodes.name: Ain't Nothing Like the Real Thing
episodes.overview: When Holmes and Watson are pulled into a double-homicide investigation, they discover the victims were staging a fake murder right at the moment they were killed. Also, Watson's inside man at Morland's office encounters a problem that threatens to expose her spying to Holmes and his father.

episodes.name: Turn It Upside Down
episodes.overview: Sherlock’s father, Morland, becomes Sherlock and Joan’s prime suspect in a murder investigation after one of his employees is killed under the guise of a robbery.

episodes.name: The Invisible Hand
episodes.overview: When Holmes and Watson discover the perpetrator behind the attempt made on Morland’s life, they find a shocking connection to themselves.

episodes.name: A Difference in Kind
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson’s lives are threatened by an influential, worldwide criminal network connected to the murder attempt on Morland Holmes. Also, Sherlock’s grievances with his father threaten their alliance to bring their mutual adversary to justice.

episodes.name: Folie à Deux
episodes.overview: When a serial bomber becomes active again after being dormant for six years, Watson seeks help from Shinwell Johnson, a former patient whose life she saved when she was a surgeon. Also, Holmes senses Watson is unhappy and questions whether she is still fulfilled by her detective career.

episodes.name: Worth Several Cities
episodes.overview: When the leader of a local street gang abducts Holmes to compel him to find the person responsible for a hit on his men, Holmes and Watson get caught in the middle of an international hunt to recover a centuries old, priceless artifact. Also, Watson debates whether a personal favor Shinwell asks of her is outside her comfort zone.

episodes.name: Render, and then Seize Her
episodes.overview: Holmes learns a secret about Captain Gregson’s girlfriend when she hires him for a case she wants kept off of Gregson’s radar. Also, Holmes and Watson join the NYPD’s search for an abducted woman.

episodes.name: Henny Penny the Sky is Falling
episodes.overview: Captain Gregson lobbies to include Holmes and Watson when his unit is selected to receive a city commendation for its exemplary work. Also, as Holmes and Watson consult on the investigation into a financial analyst’s murder, they are drawn into the world of asteroid research.

episodes.name: To Catch a Predator Predator
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson have plenty of suspects when they investigate the murder of a man who led a secret life as a vigilante, “catfishing” sexual predators on dating sites and publicly shaming them. Also, when Shinwell’s criminal record prevents him from finding a full-time job, Holmes disagrees with Watson’s plan to help him.

episodes.name: Ill Tidings
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson investigate a mass murder when a chef and his patrons are poisoned after dining on a tasting menu tainted with snake venom. Also, Detective Bell’s crush on a work colleague makes Holmes realize his and Fiona’s relationship is at an important crossroads.

episodes.name: Bang Bang Shoot Chute
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson search for two murderers after a base jumper is shot out of the sky by one killer, and has his parachute sabotaged by another. Also, after Joan’s sister, Lin, thinks she sees Shinwell with a member of his old gang, Joan takes drastic measures to make sure he won’t be drawn back into a life of crime.

episodes.name: How the Sausage is Made
episodes.overview: Joan worries Sherlock’s sobriety is at risk when she learns he has been lying to her about attending recovery meetings. Also, Sherlock and Joan discover a man’s death caused by ingesting poisoned sausage is connected to a lab working on a breakthrough in the artificial meat industry.

episodes.name: It Serves You Right to Suffer
episodes.overview: When Shinwell comes to Holmes and Watson for help after he’s framed for a gang killing, they have three days to find the real murderer before he is arrested and sent back to jail.

episodes.name: Pick Your Poison
episodes.overview: When Watson is implicated in a DEA investigation into doctors writing illegal prescriptions, she and Holmes search for the person using her medical license to sell drugs.

episodes.name: Be My Guest
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson race to find a woman who’s been held captive for years before the kidnapper takes drastic steps to avoid being caught. Also, Watson becomes frustrated when Shinwell refuses to focus on his informant training with her and Holmes.

episodes.name: Crowned Clown, Downtown Brown
episodes.overview: When Holmes and Watson investigate a clown’s murder upstate, they discover a connection between his death and the creation of a new weaponized virus. Also, Watson helps Bell when he’s targeted by his new love interest Chantal’s ex-husband in attempt to sabotage her career at the district attorney’s office.

episodes.name: Over a Barrel
episodes.overview: A man takes hostages, including Joan, and threatens to execute them unless Holmes finds the person responsible for the death of his son. As Sherlock investigates, the captor gives him 16 hours to find the perpetrator before the statute of limitations on the crime runs out.

episodes.name: Rekt in Real Life
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson investigate the murder of a former professional eSports video game player who died after being assaulted in front of his fans during a live video stream. Also, Shinwell approaches Joan for advice when his teenage daughter asks to meet with him for the first time in years.

episodes.name: Wrong Side of the Road (1)
episodes.overview: Holmes’ former protégé, Kitty Winter, returns to New York after a three-year absence to warn him that a killer is eliminating everyone involved with a case they worked on together in London, and they’re the next targets. As Sherlock, Kitty, Joan and the NYPD join forces to find the perpetrator, Watson discovers Kitty has a life-changing secret.

episodes.name: Fidelity (2)
episodes.overview: Joan and Kitty try to prove that a string of murders, stemming from an old case Sherlock and Kitty solved in London, is connected to an international government conspiracy with the Defense Intelligence Agency at its center. Also, Sherlock and Kitty’s relationship is strained after she shares life-changing news.

episodes.name: The Ballad of Lady Frances
episodes.overview: The police call in Holmes and Watson to consult on a homicide “heard” by a cutting edge gunshot detection system when they can’t find any tangible evidence that a crime was committed. Also, Sherlock and Joan become suspicious of Shinwell when he’s the target of a drive-by shooting that reveals a connection between him and an unsolved murder.

episodes.name: Dead Man's Tale
episodes.overview: Sherlock and Joan question how well they know Shinwell when they investigate the possibility he may have gotten away with the unsolved murder of his friend, a fellow gang member. Also, Sherlock and Joan’s latest case puts them on the hunt for a treasure map rumored to lead to a fortune in pirate’s gold hidden around New York City.

episodes.name: High Heat
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson investigate the murder of a man Sherlock considered one of New York’s worst private investigators. Also, as Holmes stews over being beaten by Shinwell, he decides to take out his aggression by dismantling a local organization of private investigators.

episodes.name: The Art of Sleights and Deception
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson get mixed up in murder and magic when they investigate the death of a magician killed while performing a classic stunt. Also, Watson suspects Bell is being targeted by the ex-husband of his girlfriend, Chantal, after a false allegation lands him the middle of an Internal Affairs investigation.

episodes.name: Fly Into a Rage, Make a Bad Landing
episodes.overview: When Detective Bell’s girlfriend, Chantal, is assaulted and her ex-husband is killed soon after, in what Holmes and Watson discover is a staged suicide, they search for one suspect behind the linked crimes. Also, as Bell fights the urge to seek his own brand of justice for Chantal, Sherlock makes a heartbreaking realization about the detective’s past.

episodes.name: Moving Targets
episodes.overview: When a reality show contestant is murdered, Holmes and Watson zero in on another competitor as a suspect, a former war criminal who may be the most skilled killer they’ve ever pursued. Also, for the first time since he attacked Sherlock, Shinwell reaches out to Joan to ask for a favor

episodes.name: Scrambled
episodes.overview: When Holmes and Watson investigate a murder, they find themselves in the crosshairs of one of New York City's deadliest gangs. Holmes' behavior becomes increasingly erratic when he secretly interacts with a mysterious woman.

episodes.name: Hurt Me, Hurt You
episodes.overview: Season 5 ends with Holmes and Watson pursuing an elusive criminal as a gang war erupts in New York City. While the NYPD works to contain the violence, the two investigate the murder that appears to have ignited the city-wide conflict and discover that a familiar face is pulling the strings.

episodes.name: An Infinite Capacity for Taking Pains
episodes.overview: As Holmes confronts a medical diagnosis that threatens both his career and sobriety, he meets Michael, a man who credits Sherlock for helping him conquer his own addiction. Also, Holmes and Watson are hired by a reformed party girl heiress to find her missing partner in a years-old sex tape that has just leaked online.

episodes.name: Once You've Ruled Out God
episodes.overview: Watson and her half sister, Lin, have conflicting reactions when their estranged biological father dies. Also, Holmes and Watson find themselves on the hunt for a stolen plutonium shipment they fear will be used to make a dirty bomb after a department of energy inspector is killed with a lightning gun.

episodes.name: Pushing Buttons
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson enter the world of rare antiquities when they investigate a case in which victim was killed during a Revolutionary War reenactment. Also, as Holmes grows frustrated with the length of his cognitive recovery, he finds solace in his growing friendship with Michael.

episodes.name: Our Time is Up
episodes.overview: Watson considers a major life change after reading her own therapy file while she and Holmes investigate the murder of her former psychologist.

episodes.name: Bits and Pieces
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson retrace Holmes' steps after Holmes finds himself in possession of a severed head and can't remember anything about the last six hours.

episodes.name: Give Me the Finger
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson enter the world of nuclear security when they investigate the murder of an ex-Yakuza gang member. Also, Captain Gregson is blindsided by a stunning personal confession from his daughter, Hannah, a police sergeant.

episodes.name: Sober Companions
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson find themselves on the hunt for a serial killer after a murder rocks their inner circle. Also, Holmes’ neurological recovery regresses and his sobriety wavers as his commitment to catching the killer grows into an obsession.

episodes.name: Sand Trap
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson’s search for the killer of a woman found encased in cement takes them inside the clean technology industry. Also, Watson takes a giant leap forward regarding her interest in adoption

episodes.name: Nobody Lives Forever
episodes.overview: Holmes’ former sobriety sponsor, Alfredo, asks for his help with an illegal endeavor in order to save his brother. Also, Holmes and Watson investigate the poisoning of a biology professor who was working on a secret genetics project prior to being killed.

episodes.name: The Adventure of the Ersatz Sobekneferu
episodes.overview: Sherlock and his father, Morland Holmes, attempt to repair their strained relationship upon learning of a death within their family. Also, Holmes and Watson discover a link between their latest case and the world of Egyptian antiquities when they search for a killer who tried to mummify his victim.

episodes.name: You’ve Come a Long Way, Baby
episodes.overview: Holmes engages an old foe to protect his father after he learns Morland is in danger of being killed. Also, Holmes and Watson search for a killer connected to the tobacco industry when a lawyer who was in the process of reviewing a major cigarette distributor’s finances is murdered.

episodes.name: Meet Your Maker
episodes.overview: Detective Bell considers leaving the NYPD when he is recommended for a once-in-a-lifetime career opportunity. Also, Holmes and Watson are hired by a private client to investigate the disappearance of a young woman who led a double life online as a financial dominatrix.

episodes.name: Breathe
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson investigate the poisoning of a relocation expert and discover the man led a decades-long secret career as a contract killer before his death. Also, Watson’s path to adopting a child suffers a setback as she prepares for a home visit from her agency case worker.

episodes.name: Through the Fog
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson race to help Detective Bell when he becomes a victim of a bio-terrorism attack at the precinct and the station is quarantined. During the lockdown, Captain Gregson and Detective Bell begin to suspect they are trapped inside with the perpetrator. Also, Watson faces the difficult task of helping her mother, Mary, accept that her advancing Alzheimer’s disease requires her to receive more medical care.

episodes.name: How to Get a Head
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson’s investigation into the murder of a religion professor puts them on the hunt for a killer connected to the occult. Also, Holmes and Watson curate a list of potential replacements for Detective Bell when it looks likely the officer will be asked to join the U.S. Marshal Service.

episodes.name: Uncanny Valley of the Dolls
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson discover that the murder of a robotics engineer may be connected to his groundbreaking secret research in the area of real-life teleportation. Also, when Detective Bell is shut out of a required class he needs in order to complete his master’s degree and join the U.S. Marshal Service, he is shocked to discover the course instructor has personal reasons for denying him access.

episodes.name: The Worms Crawl In, The Worms Crawl Out
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson investigate multiple motives for murder when a zoologist is killed because of his numerous love affairs or his trailblazing research. Also, Holmes finds himself the victim of identity theft after his medical records are stolen.

episodes.name: The Visions of Norman P. Horowitz
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson search for a killer choosing victims based on the predictions of a deceased man who claimed to foresee the future deaths of others, including the murder of Sherlock Holmes.

episodes.name: The Geek Interpreter
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson race to locate a missing woman when Harlan Emple, Holmes’ friend and “Irregulars” mathematics expert, becomes the prime suspect in her disappearance.

episodes.name: Fit to Be Tied
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson’s deadly conflict with Sherlock’s former friend Michael intensifies when their newest victim looks to be the serial killer’s latest prey.

episodes.name: Whatever Remains, However Improbable
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson face their greatest challenge to date when a murder investigation threatens to destroy their partnership.

episodes.name: The Further Adventures
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson’s new careers as consultants for Scotland Yard in London take them inside the tabloid journalism industry when a popular model is the victim of an acid attack. Also, as Watson grows increasingly homesick for New York, Captain Gregson is wracked with guilt over his unresolved rift with his former consultants.

episodes.name: Gutshot
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson try to work a stateside investigation from London when someone close to them is gravely wounded by an unknown perpetrator in the United States. However, Holmes’ stateside legal trouble – the result of a confession to a murder he didn’t commit – threatens to derail their efforts.

episodes.name: The Price of Admission
episodes.overview: Holmes takes extreme measures to secure his return to New York when he leans on his father’s disreputable connections to aid his legal re-entry into the United States. Also, while Holmes looks for a way back to the United States, Watson helps the NYPD investigate a murder at a storage facility that caters to wealthy clients with items they want hidden from U.S. Customs.

episodes.name: Red Light, Green Light
episodes.overview: After an explosion at a traffic stop, Holmes and Watson must determine whether the attack was a terrorist attack; Holmes and Watson suspect there is more for them to discover regarding the recent attack on someone within their inner circle.

episodes.name: Into the Woods
episodes.overview: Tech billionaire Odin Reichenbach hires Holmes and Watson to investigate a personal threat he suspects originated from within his own company; Holmes and Watson search for a motive behind three seemingly unconnected murders.

episodes.name: Command: Delete
episodes.overview: Tech billionaire Odin Reichenbach presents Sherlock and Joan with an extraordinary offer to help him with a program that can predict future crimes. Sherlock and Joan assist Bell when he tries to prevent a future crime of his own, as he races to locate a fellow NYPD officer planning a sniper shooting.

episodes.name: From Russia with Drugs
episodes.overview: Sherlock and Joan investigate the murder of a criminal who made his living by stealing from other criminals. When Gregson resumes leadership of the precinct, he suspects his interim replacement is responsible for one of his best detective’s suspicious departure.

episodes.name: Miss Understood
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson search for an ulterior motive when Cassie Lenue, a brilliant young criminal they helped put in prison, seeks their help in solving a murder.

episodes.name: On the Scent
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson work to determine if a long dormant serial killer has resurfaced in the wake of a sculptor’s murder in New York City. Also, Watson suspects Holmes is keeping something from her regarding tech billionaire Odin Reichenbach.

episodes.name: The Latest Model
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson receive a shocking request to collaborate from their foe, Odin Reichenbach, when the tech billionaire asks them to test his new crime prevention system. Tasked with investigating someone the program predicts will soon commit a crime, the duo worries Odin will take drastic action before they conclude their inquiry.

episodes.name: Unfriended
episodes.overview: Holmes and Watson join forces with Holmes’ father, Morland, to enlist his vast criminal network to help disassemble tech billionaire Odin Reichenbach’s crime prevention system.

episodes.name: Reichenbach Falls
episodes.overview: Tech billionaire Odin Reichenbach inadvertently provides Holmes and Watson with a lead that could give them evidence that brings him to justice.

episodes.name: Their Last Bow
episodes.overview: Amidst Holmes and Watson’s battle with tech billionaire Odin Reichenbach, the investigators receive word of their old enemy and Sherlock’s former love, Jamie Moriarty.

episodes.name: The End
episodes.overview: Okey dokey...

episodes.name: The Target
episodes.overview: I know life can't have been easy up here...

episodes.name: The Head
episodes.overview: The Wasteland's got its own Golden Rule...

episodes.name: The Ghouls
episodes.overview: Death to Management.

episodes.name: The Past
episodes.overview: Everyone wants to save the world...

episodes.name: The Trap
episodes.overview: What happens when the ranchers have more power than the Sheriff?

episodes.name: The Radio
episodes.overview: Every generation has their own dumbass ideas...

episodes.name: The Beginning
episodes.overview: War...

episodes.name: The Innovator
episodes.overview: Every dollar spent is a vote cast.

episodes.name: The Golden Rule
episodes.overview: You can't put a price on family…

episodes.name: The Profligate
episodes.overview: Most kids are dead by this age.

episodes.name: The Demon in the Snow
episodes.overview: Rock to spear and so on...

episodes.name: The Wrangler
episodes.overview: Big Whoop.

episodes.name: The Other Player
episodes.overview: I remember good people.

episodes.name: The Handoff
episodes.overview: You always end up back where you started.

episodes.name: The Strip
episodes.overview: Winning might be overrated...

episodes.name: Pilot
episodes.overview: A highly dysfunctional blended family is forced together when they realize a reported virus is actually the onset of the undead apocalypse.

episodes.name: So Close, Yet So Far
episodes.overview: While Madison struggles to keep Nick from crippling withdrawal, Travis ventures out to find his son before the city of Los Angeles falls.

episodes.name: The Dog
episodes.overview: After they escape a riot, Travis, Liza and Chris seek refuge with the Salazars; Madison defends her home.

episodes.name: Not Fade Away
episodes.overview: Madison and Travis see different sides of the National Guard's occupation in their neighborhood; the family tries to adapt to the new world.

episodes.name: Cobalt
episodes.overview: The National Guard's plan for the neighborhood is revealed; Travis and Madison make a difficult decision.

episodes.name: The Good Man
episodes.overview: As civil unrest grows, and the dead take over, Travis and Madison try to devise ways to protect their families.

episodes.name: Monster
episodes.overview: After fleeing a burning Los Angeles on Strand's yacht, tensions arise among the group. Strand remains mysterious. Our group encounters danger at sea.

episodes.name: We All Fall Down
episodes.overview: The group seeks shelter with a survivalist family; and Madison tries to uncover the family's true motives. Meanwhile, Salazar works to discover Strand's intentions.

episodes.name: Ouroboros
episodes.overview: Madison confronts Strand about his mysterious destination. Nick, Alicia, and others inspect wreckage from a plane crash.

episodes.name: Blood in the Streets
episodes.overview: A family in distress boards the Abigail. Strand branches off and his past begins to emerge. Nick searches for an associate of Strand's.

episodes.name: Captive
episodes.overview: Alicia works to reunite with her family. Travis meets a familiar face. Madison and Nick lead a charge to save their family against all odds.

episodes.name: Sicut Cervus
episodes.overview: Conflict erupts in a final push towards Strand's destination. Chris makes a decision that shakes the family. Nick meets a new maternal figure.

episodes.name: Shiva
episodes.overview: The family faces their greatest test yet. Nick, Travis, Madison and others go to great lengths to keep each other close.

episodes.name: Grotesque
episodes.overview: Nick's steadfast search for answers leads him into a deadly dog-eat-dog landscape. A dark piece of his past is uncovered.

episodes.name: Los Muertos
episodes.overview: After the fall of the compound, Madison, Strand and others forge a tenuous path forward.  Meanwhile, Nick is recruited for a perilous assignment.

episodes.name: Do Not Disturb
episodes.overview: Travis struggles to connect with Chris while searching for shelter. Meanwhile, Alicia meets a lonely woman with a bloody past.

episodes.name: Pablo & Jessica
episodes.overview: Alicia and Madison work to unite two competing factions. Nick draws upon skills from his past to take on a new role at the Colonia.

episodes.name: Pillar of Salt
episodes.overview: At the Colonia, Alejandro reveals his darker side; a hotel resident becomes violent and Madison springs into action.

episodes.name: Date of Death
episodes.overview: Refugees flood into the hotel, including an unexpected refugee from our group. Madison struggles to cope with the situation.

episodes.name: Wrath
episodes.overview: Travis is thrown off by new refugees; Nick must decide if he's going to stay at the Colonia with Luciana or leave.

episodes.name: North
episodes.overview: When Travis' rage causes unrest at the hotel, Madison has to choose whether or not she will stand by him; Nick becomes leader of the Colonia as Narcos close in.

episodes.name: Eye of the Beholder
episodes.overview: The Clark family find themselves in a dire predicament. They must work together to discover a path to safety.

episodes.name: The New Frontier
episodes.overview: Following a harrowing journey, the Clark family arrive at their new home. Strand faces resistance as he attempts to hold power over his domain.

episodes.name: TEOTWAWKI
episodes.overview: Still finding their place, Alicia and Nick fall in with new crowds while Madison discovers Otto's past mimics that of her own.
A mysterious character searches for purpose and soon becomes tied to the struggle over a key resource in the apocalypse.

episodes.name: Burning in Water, Drowning in Flame
episodes.overview: A new threat reveals itself to Madison and Troy as they search for answers. Alicia must reconcile with her past decisions.

episodes.name: Red Dirt
episodes.overview: News of incoming danger spreads throughout the community as Madison struggles to keep everyone together. Nick grapples with a hard truth.

episodes.name: The Unveiling
episodes.overview: A new arrival sows a divide within the ranch. Meanwhile, Alicia forms a new relationship in the hopes of maintaining peace.

episodes.name: Children of Wrath
episodes.overview: Madison must negotiate the terms of an agreement in the midst of ranch-wide turmoil. Nick and Alicia challenge their mother's motives.

episodes.name: Minotaur
episodes.overview: In the aftermath of the Clark family's actions, new leadership assumes control of the Ranch. Daniel assists Lola in the distribution of water.

episodes.name: The Diviner
episodes.overview: With the Ranch dangerously low on resources, Madison and Walker leave in search of a solution. Nick and Alicia struggle to keep the peace.

episodes.name: La Serpiente
episodes.overview: Following the rekindling of an old friendship, a mission is launched to replenish the Ranch's water supply by seeking the help of another community.

episodes.name: Brother's Keeper
episodes.overview: Nick and Jake set out to handle a delicate situation; the Ranch prepares for a threat greater than any they've faced before.

episodes.name: This Land is Your Land
episodes.overview: With the Ranchers trapped and without hope, Alicia is thrust into a position of leadership where she's forced to make life-changing decisions.

episodes.name: El Matadero
episodes.overview: Alicia encounters a potential ally; Ofelia fights for survival; Nick uses his skill set for profit.

episodes.name: Things Bad Begun
episodes.overview: Strand's motives are made clear when Nick discovers a new threat descending on the dam.

episodes.name: Sleigh Ride
episodes.overview: Madison faces a horrifying revelation.

episodes.name: What's Your Story?
episodes.overview: A lone traveler’s wearying journey is interrupted by new acquaintances, some who become friend, others who become foe.

episodes.name: Another Day in the Diamond
episodes.overview: A troubled survivor finds allies in an unexpected place. Meanwhile, the life Madison has fought to build comes under threat.

episodes.name: Good Out Here
episodes.overview: Madison and Morgan try to help Nick find inner peace. A quest for revenge exacts its toll on the group.

episodes.name: Buried
episodes.overview: Al's questioning uncovers some surprising truths about the group's past. John Dorie receives unexpected news.

episodes.name: Laura
episodes.overview: The arrival of a wounded visitor in John Dorie's life forces him to change his ways.

episodes.name: Just in Case
episodes.overview: Strand wrestles with Madison's decisions. Things take an unexpected turn at the Stadium.

episodes.name: The Wrong Side of Where You Are Now
episodes.overview: Madison's decision to help an adversary has unintended consequences. Meanwhile, John Dorie's life hangs in the balance.

episodes.name: No One's Gone
episodes.overview: Madison fights to preserve the life she worked so hard to build. Morgan tries to do the right thing.

episodes.name: People Like Us
episodes.overview: Morgan tries to help Alicia and the fractured group of survivors as a storm brews.

episodes.name: Close Your Eyes
episodes.overview: Alicia's forced to reckon with an agonizing past while seeking refuge from a storm.

episodes.name: The Code
episodes.overview: Morgan's journey is derailed by some new acquaintances.

episodes.name: Weak
episodes.overview: June helps when Al's health deteriorates; Morgan searches for friends lost in the storm.

episodes.name: Blackjack
episodes.overview: Strand and Dorie are marooned. Luciana aids a man in need. The group's efforts to help a stranger put everyone in danger.

episodes.name: MM 54
episodes.overview: Difficult decisions lead the group into uncertainty. Alicia delivers on a promise to Charlie.

episodes.name: I Lose People...
episodes.overview: The group's hope falters as they seek a way out. Alicia and Charlie reunite with friends.

episodes.name: ... I Lose Myself
episodes.overview: Morgan struggles to find the strength to help friends in dire need before it's too late.

episodes.name: Here to Help
episodes.overview: Lead by Morgan and Alicia, the group lands in uncharted territory in search of survivors to help. But everything is not as it seems in this foreboding new land.

episodes.name: The Hurt That Will Happen
episodes.overview: Morgan and Alicia meet a survivor and learn of a grave new walker threat. Meanwhile, the mission is put to the test when one of their own goes missing. Elsewhere, Strand makes contact.

episodes.name: Humbug's Gulch
episodes.overview: June and John take shelter to hide from a threat, but a misunderstanding with a desperate survivor leads to trouble. Meanwhile, Alicia and Morgan face a dangerous obstacle.

episodes.name: Skidmark
episodes.overview: Charlie makes a friend, while Strand, Wendell, and Sarah's rescue mission hits a snag. Elsewhere, Alicia, Luciana, and Morgan struggle to fulfill their mission.

episodes.name: The End of Everything
episodes.overview: Althea chases a story with dogged determination, putting the mission, and her life, in danger.

episodes.name: The Little Prince
episodes.overview: Facing impossible odds, Luciana and the group work together to tackle an impossible task while Morgan helps prevent disaster. Elsewhere, an old friend presents Sarah, Charlie, and Strand with a solution

episodes.name: Still Standing
episodes.overview: Strand and Charlie seek safety. Dorie helps Dwight on his quest. Morgan stays focused on the greater mission. Elsewhere, Alicia refuses to give up.

episodes.name: Is Anybody Out There?
episodes.overview: Up against the clock, Morgan, Grace, and Alicia work to buy time as Dorie and Dwight race against the elements. Meanwhile, Sarah and Wendell get help from an unexpected source.(TD)

episodes.name: Channel 4
episodes.overview: The group, traveling in a convoy, doubles-down on their mission to find and help survivors.

episodes.name: 210 Words Per Minute
episodes.overview: Morgan and Grace search a shopping mall to fulfill a dying man's wish; Dwight is tested.

episodes.name: You're Still Here
episodes.overview: Alicia and Strand answer a call for help; Morgan and Al hit a roadblock.

episodes.name: Ner Tamid
episodes.overview: In search of a permanent home, Charlie encounters a rabbi struggling to survive on his own.

episodes.name: Leave What You Don't
episodes.overview: Logan's motives are revealed; Sarah and Dwight negotiate; a dangerous threat emerges.

episodes.name: Today and Tomorrow
episodes.overview: A survivor sends Al and Morgan into a dangerous settlement where Al chases a lead.

episodes.name: Channel 5
episodes.overview: The group searches for a new home; concerned for Grace, Morgan makes a tough call.

episodes.name: End of the Line
episodes.overview: Facing an unknown future, Morgan leads the group on a mission; John and June make a promise.

episodes.name: The End Is the Beginning
episodes.overview: Mortally wounded Morgan must decide whether to help a desperate stranger while a mysterious bounty hunter tries to finish what Ginny couldn't.

episodes.name: Welcome to the Club
episodes.overview: Virginia forces Alicia and Strand to clear an unusual walker threat, where an encounter with a new ally gives Strand an idea that could be the key to their freedom.

episodes.name: Alaska
episodes.overview: Al and Dwight go rogue on a recon mission for Ginny to follow a lead thought lost, but Al must choose between what she has now and what she's chasing.

episodes.name: The Key
episodes.overview: John is settling in as one of Virginia's rangers when a mysterious death sends him on an investigation that makes him question everything he thought about himself.

episodes.name: Honey
episodes.overview: Dwight and Sherry team up with a mysterious faction of people to take down Ginny. But when Morgan unexpectedly offers to help, a power struggle ensues.

episodes.name: Bury Her Next to Jasper's Leg
episodes.overview: A deadly explosion in the oil fields sends June on a mission to save as many lives as possible. Meanwhile, an investigation by Virginia threatens to undermine June's work.

episodes.name: Damage from the Inside
episodes.overview: When Dakota goes missing, Strand sends Alicia and Charlie on a search and rescue mission to find her. An unlikely ally provides a new possibility of escape from Virginia.

episodes.name: The Door
episodes.overview: With a decimated militia and scarce resources, the survivors are running out of options.

episodes.name: Things Left to Do
episodes.overview: Ginny and Morgan have a standoff—but this time Ginny is outgunned.

episodes.name: Handle with Care
episodes.overview: Daniel is tasked with keeping the peace but will need to face his own threat to protect his friends.

episodes.name: The Holding
episodes.overview: An infiltration turns rescue mission as members of the group dig deeper into an underground community.

episodes.name: In Dreams
episodes.overview: Grace wakes up with her memory blurred and sees what her world's become years later.

episodes.name: J.D.
episodes.overview: June splits off from the group in an effort to gather any information to help stop an oncoming threat.

episodes.name: Mother
episodes.overview: Alicia is held prisoner by Teddy. There, she reunites with old friends and must confront her past if she hopes to move on and escape.

episodes.name: USS Pennsylvania
episodes.overview: Motives are revealed and convictions are tested as our heroes run to stop Teddy's plan.

episodes.name: The Beginning
episodes.overview: Everyone struggles desperately to live the destruction that is approaching on their own terms.

episodes.name: The Beacon
episodes.overview: While most of the landscape is destroyed by nuclear warheads, Strand thrives in one of the few inhabitable places left; Strand's search for survivors uncovers a stranger with an unexpected connection to his past.

episodes.name: Six Hours
episodes.overview: As Morgan, Grace and Mo struggle to adapt to life on the submarine, a food shortage forces them to face the nuclear fallout outside the sub.

episodes.name: Cindy Hawkins
episodes.overview: June and Dorie's routine in Teddy's fallout shelter is disrupted when they discover the origins of their home and its sinister connections to Teddy's past.

episodes.name: Breathe with Me
episodes.overview: Against the advice of the group, Sarah searches for Wendell, and in the process encounters a dangerous survivor who forces her to take part in a search of his own.

episodes.name: Till Death
episodes.overview: With a code to guide them, Dwight and Sherry become ethical outlaws known as the Dark Horses. When Strand recruits them for a search and rescue mission, it forces them to question their code and their future.

episodes.name: Reclamation
episodes.overview: Morgan searches for Al, only to discover that he's not the only one looking for her, and that his search may have put a target on his own back.

episodes.name: The Portrait
episodes.overview: When baby Mo gets sick, Morgan successfully pleads for entry into Strand's Tower. Morgan quickly learns even Strand's benevolence has its limits.

episodes.name: PADRE
episodes.overview: Alicia enlists Morgan's help to search for a new home for her people, but Morgan soon learns the search is more complicated than he imagined.

episodes.name: Follow Me
episodes.overview: Alicia takes refuge in the home of a mysterious stranger. With her fevers growing worse and Arno pursuing her at every turn, Alicia is forced to confront the failings of her past and how she will face her future.

episodes.name: Mourning Cloak
episodes.overview: When Charlie shows up at the Tower unexpectedly, Howard recruits a young Ranger in training to determine the reason for her visit; as they journey beyond the Tower together, Charlie's true motives are revealed.

episodes.name: Ofelia
episodes.overview: Luciana and Wes test the limits of their patience when Daniel’s worsening mental state ends up endangering them all.

episodes.name: Sonny Boy
episodes.overview: When baby Mo goes missing inside the Tower, Dorie Sr. finds himself in a unique position to prove his worth to an increasingly paranoid Strand.

episodes.name: The Raft
episodes.overview: Morgan and Alicia plan their next steps; Dwight and Sherry face the prospect of having to choose between their code and their safety.

episodes.name: Divine Providence
episodes.overview: As the battle for the Tower heats up, Alicia brings the fight to Strand's front door.

episodes.name: Amina
episodes.overview: As the survivors prepare to escape the area by raft, Alicia turns back to save one more person trapped in the fallout.

episodes.name: Gone
episodes.overview: Morgan finds a new ally who turns out to be more trouble than he bargained for.

episodes.name: Remember What They Took from You
episodes.overview: After going undercover at PADRE, Morgan and Madison find themselves back at odds trying to do what's best for Mo while struggling to accept their new lives under the watchful eye of PADRE.

episodes.name: Blue Jay
episodes.overview: After fleeing PADRE, June's safety and solitude are threatened by an unwelcome reunion with Dwight and Sherry and a desperate father's search for his missing daughter.

episodes.name: Odessa
episodes.overview: Mo's hunt to prove PADRE's true intentions has her in over her head as she's drawn into the larger web of secrets and subterfuge of the adults who care for her.

episodes.name: King County
episodes.overview: Morgan's return to King County gets complicated when PADRE comes to collect.

episodes.name: More Time Than You Know
episodes.overview: The heroes fight the clock and PADRE's forces.

episodes.name: All I See Is Red
episodes.overview: Morgan fights his past as he and Madison race to stop PADRE's expansion.

episodes.name: Anton
episodes.overview: Strand fights to maintain the peace of his new life after the sudden arrival of an old friend threatens it with ghosts of the past.

episodes.name: Iron Tiger
episodes.overview: The search for gas leads to an unexpected reunion that Madison uses as an opportunity.

episodes.name: Sanctuary
episodes.overview: Dwight and Sherry confront the demons of their past to secure a better future for themselves.

episodes.name: Keeping Her Alive
episodes.overview: A survivor is at odds with the rest of the island and is forced to turn to another for help.

episodes.name: Fighting Like You
episodes.overview: The horde led by Troy surrounds the walls of PADRE. Madison and her people must fight for their survival to save what remains.

episodes.name: The Road Ahead
episodes.overview: As the series comes to an end, the fate of PADRE's survivors seems to rest in the hands of an unexpected hero.

episodes.name: Winter Is Coming
episodes.overview: Jon Arryn, the Hand of the King, is dead. King Robert Baratheon plans to ask his oldest friend, Eddard Stark, to take Jon's place. Across the sea, Viserys Targaryen plans to wed his sister to a nomadic warlord in exchange for an army.

episodes.name: The Kingsroad
episodes.overview: While Bran recovers from his fall, Ned takes only his daughters to Kings Landing. Jon Snow goes with his uncle Benjen to The Wall. Tyrion joins them.

episodes.name: Lord Snow
episodes.overview: Lord Stark and his daughters arrive at King's Landing to discover the intrigues of the king's realm.

episodes.name: Cripples, Bastards, and Broken Things
episodes.overview: Eddard investigates Jon Arryn's murder. Jon befriends Samwell Tarly, a coward who has come to join the Night's Watch.

episodes.name: The Wolf and the Lion
episodes.overview: Catelyn has captured Tyrion and plans to bring him to her sister, Lysa Arryn, at The Vale, to be tried for his, supposed, crimes against Bran. Robert plans to have Daenerys killed, but Eddard refuses to be a part of it and quits.

episodes.name: A Golden Crown
episodes.overview: While recovering from his battle with Jamie, Eddard is forced to run the kingdom while Robert goes hunting. Tyrion demands a trial by combat for his freedom. Viserys is losing his patience with Drogo.

episodes.name: You Win or You Die
episodes.overview: Robert has been injured while hunting and is dying. Jon and the others finally take their vows to the Night's Watch. A man, sent by Robert, is captured for trying to poison Daenerys. Furious, Drogo vows to attack the Seven Kingdoms.

episodes.name: The Pointy End
episodes.overview: Eddard and his men are betrayed and captured by the Lannisters. When word reaches Robb, he plans to go to war to rescue them. The White Walkers attack The Wall. Tyrion returns to his father with some new friends.

episodes.name: Baelor
episodes.overview: Robb goes to war against the Lannisters. Jon finds himself struggling on deciding if his place is with Robb or the Night's Watch. Drogo has fallen ill from a fresh battle wound. Daenerys is desperate to save him.

episodes.name: Fire and Blood
episodes.overview: With Ned dead, Robb vows to get revenge on the Lannisters. Jon must officially decide if his place is with Robb or the Night's Watch. Daenerys says her final goodbye to Drogo.

episodes.name: The North Remembers
episodes.overview: Tyrion arrives to save Joffrey's crown from threats old and new; Daenerys searches for allies and water in the Red Waste.

episodes.name: The Night Lands
episodes.overview: Arya shares a secret with a familiar recruit; a scout returns to Dany with disturbing news; Theon comes home to the Iron Islands.

episodes.name: What Is Dead May Never Die
episodes.overview: Tyrion roots out a spy; Catelyn meets a new king and queen; Bran dreams; Theon drowns.

episodes.name: Garden of Bones
episodes.overview: Catelyn tries to save two kings from themselves; Tyrion practices coercion; Robb meets a foreigner; Dany finds her ally.

episodes.name: The Ghost of Harrenhal
episodes.overview: The Baratheon rivalry ends; Tyrion learns of Cersei's secret weapon; Dany suffers a loss; Arya collects a debt she didn't know was owed.

episodes.name: The Old Gods and the New
episodes.overview: Arya has a surprise visitor; Dany vows to take what is hers; Joffrey meets his subjects; Qhorin gives Jon a chance to prove himself.

episodes.name: A Man Without Honor
episodes.overview: Jaime meets a distant relative; Dany receives an invitation; Theon leads a search party; Jon loses his way in the wilderness.

episodes.name: The Prince of Winterfell
episodes.overview: Theon holds down the fort; Arya calls in her debt with Jaqen; Robb is betrayed; Stannis and Davos approach their destination.

episodes.name: Blackwater
episodes.overview: Tyrion and the Lannisters fight for their lives as Stannis' fleet assaults King's Landing.

episodes.name: Valar Morghulis
episodes.overview: Tyrion wakes up in a new world; Dany goes to a strange place; Jon proves himself.

episodes.name: Valar Dohaeris
episodes.overview: Jon is tested by the wildling king; Tyrion asks for his reward; Dany sails to Slaver's Bay.

episodes.name: Dark Wings, Dark Words
episodes.overview: Sansa says too much. Shae asks Tyrion for a favor. Jaime finds a way to pass the time, while Arya encounters the Brotherhood Without Banners.

episodes.name: Walk of Punishment
episodes.overview: Tyrion shoulders new responsibilities. Jon is taken to the Fist of the First Men. Daenerys meets with the slavers. Jaime strikes a deal with his captors.

episodes.name: And Now His Watch Is Ended
episodes.overview: The Night's Watch takes stock. Varys meets his better. Arya is taken to the commander of the Brotherhood. Dany exchanges a chain for a whip.

episodes.name: Kissed by Fire
episodes.overview: The Hound is judged by the gods. Jaime is judged by men. Jon proves himself. Robb is betrayed. Tyrion learns the cost of weddings.

episodes.name: The Climb
episodes.overview: Four Houses consider make-or-break alliances. Jon and the Wildlings face a daunting climb.

episodes.name: The Bear and the Maiden Fair
episodes.overview: Dany exchanges gifts in Yunkai; Brienne faces a formidable foe in Harrenhal.

episodes.name: Second Sons
episodes.overview: Dany meets the Titan's Bastard; King's Landing hosts a royal wedding.

episodes.name: The Rains of Castamere
episodes.overview: House Frey joins forces with House Tully. Jon faces his most difficult test yet.

episodes.name: Mhysa
episodes.overview: Joffrey challenges Tywin. Dany waits to see if she is a conqueror or a liberator.

episodes.name: Two Swords
episodes.overview: King's Landing prepares for a royal wedding; Dany finds the way to Meereen; the Night's Watch braces for a new threat.

episodes.name: The Lion and the Rose
episodes.overview: The Lannisters and their guests gather in King's Landing; Stannis loses patience with Davos; Ramsay finds a purpose for his pet.

episodes.name: Breaker of Chains
episodes.overview: Tyrion ponders his options; Tywin extends an olive branch; Jon proposes a bold plan; The Hound teaches Arya the way thing are.

episodes.name: Oathkeeper
episodes.overview: Dany balances justice and mercy; Jaime tasks Brienne with his honor; Jon readies his men.

episodes.name: First of His Name
episodes.overview: Cersei and Tywin plot the Crown's next move. Dany discusses future plans. Jon Snow embarks on a new mission.

episodes.name: The Laws of Gods and Men
episodes.overview: Stannis and Davos set sail with a new strategy. Dany meets with supplicants. Tyrion faces down his father in the Throne Room.

episodes.name: Mockingbird
episodes.overview: Tyrion enlists an unlikely ally. Daario entreats Dany to allow him to do what he does best. Jon's warnings fall on deaf ears.

episodes.name: The Mountain and the Viper
episodes.overview: Mole's Town receives some unexpected visitors. Littlefinger's motives are questioned. Tyrion's fate is decided.

episodes.name: The Watchers on the Wall
episodes.overview: Jon Snow and the rest of the Night's Watch face the biggest challenge to the Wall yet.

episodes.name: The Children
episodes.overview: Circumstances change after an unexpected arrival from north of the Wall. Dany must face harsh realities. Bran learns more about his destiny. Tyrion sees the truth about his situation.

episodes.name: The Wars to Come
episodes.overview: Cersei and Jaime adjust to a world without Tywin. Varys reveals a conspiracy to Tyrion. Dany faces a new threat to her rule. Jon is caught between two kings.

episodes.name: The House of Black and White
episodes.overview: Arya arrives in Braavos. Podrick and Brienne run into trouble on the road. Cersei fears for her daughter's safety in Dorne as Ellaria Sand seeks revenge for Oberyn's death. Stannis tempts Jon. An adviser tempts Daenerys.

episodes.name: High Sparrow
episodes.overview: In Braavos, Arya sees the Many-Faced God. In King's Landing, Queen Margaery enjoys her new husband. Tyrion and Varys walk the Long Bridge of Volantis.

episodes.name: Sons of the Harpy
episodes.overview: The Faith Militant grow increasingly aggressive. Jaime and Bronn head south. Ellaria and the Sand Snakes vow vengeance.

episodes.name: Kill the Boy
episodes.overview: Dany makes a difficult decision in Meereen. Jon recruits the help of an unexpected ally. Brienne searches for Sansa. Theon remains under Ramsay's control.

episodes.name: Unbowed, Unbent, Unbroken
episodes.overview: Arya trains. Jorah and Tyrion run into slavers. Trystane and Myrcella make plans. Jaime and Bronn reach their destination. The Sand Snakes attack.

episodes.name: The Gift
episodes.overview: Jon prepares for conflict. Sansa tries to talk to Theon. Brienne waits for a sign. Stannis remains stubborn. Jaime attempts to reconnect with family.

episodes.name: Hardhome
episodes.overview: Arya makes progress in her training. Sansa confronts an old friend. Cersei struggles. Jon travels.

episodes.name: The Dance of Dragons
episodes.overview: Stannis confronts a troubling decision. Jon returns to The Wall. Mace visits the Iron Bank. Arya encounters someone from her past. Dany reluctantly oversees a traditional celebration of athleticism.

episodes.name: Mother's Mercy
episodes.overview: Stannis marches. Dany is surrounded by strangers. Cersei seeks forgiveness. Jon is challenged.

episodes.name: The Red Woman
episodes.overview: The fate of Jon Snow is revealed. Daenerys meets a strong man. Cersei sees her daughter once again.

episodes.name: Home
episodes.overview: Bran trains with the Three-Eyed Raven. In King’s Landing, Jaime advises Tommen. Tyrion demands good news, but has to make his own. At Castle Black, the Night’s Watch stands behind Thorne. Ramsay Bolton proposes a plan, and Balon Greyjoy entertains other proposals.

episodes.name: Oathbreaker
episodes.overview: Daenerys meets her future. Arya trains to be No One.

episodes.name: Book of the Stranger
episodes.overview: Tyrion strikes a deal. Jorah and Daario undertake a difficult task. Jaime and Cersei try to improve their situation.

episodes.name: The Door
episodes.overview: Tyrion seeks a strange ally. Bran learns a great deal. Brienne goes on a mission. Arya is given a chance to prove herself.

episodes.name: Blood of My Blood
episodes.overview: An old foe comes back into the picture. Gilly meets Sam's family. Arya faces a difficult choice. Jaime faces off against the High Sparrow.

episodes.name: The Broken Man
episodes.overview: The High Sparrow eyes another target. Jaime confronts a hero. Arya makes a plan. The North is reminded.

episodes.name: No One
episodes.overview: While Jaime weighs his options, Cersei answers a request. Tyrion's plans bear fruit. Arya faces a new test.

episodes.name: Battle of the Bastards
episodes.overview: Slaver envoys demand terms of surrender in Meereen. Ramsay plays the odds in defense of Winterfell.

episodes.name: The Winds of Winter
episodes.overview: Cersei faces a day of reckoning. Daenerys antes up for the 'Great Game.'

episodes.name: Dragonstone
episodes.overview: Jon Snow organizes the defense of the North. Cersei tries to even the odds. Daenerys comes home.

episodes.name: Stormborn
episodes.overview: Daenerys receives an unexpected visitor. Jon faces a revolt. Sam risks his career and life. Tyrion plans the conquest of Westeros.

episodes.name: The Queen's Justice
episodes.overview: Daenerys holds court. Tyrion backchannels. Cersei returns a gift. Jaime learns from his mistakes.

episodes.name: The Spoils of War
episodes.overview: The Lannisters pay their debts. Daenerys weighs her options. Arya comes home.

episodes.name: Eastwatch
episodes.overview: Daenerys offers a choice. Arya grows suspicious. Tyrion answers a good question.

episodes.name: Beyond the Wall
episodes.overview: Jon and the Brotherhood hunt the dead. Arya confronts Sansa. Tyrion thinks about the future.

episodes.name: The Dragon and the Wolf
episodes.overview: Tyrion tries to save Westeros from itself. Sansa questions loyalties.

episodes.name: Winterfell
episodes.overview: Arriving at Winterfell, Jon and Daenerys struggle to unite a divided North. Jon Snow gets some big news.

episodes.name: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
episodes.overview: The battle at Winterfell is approaching. Jaime is confronted with the consequences of the past. A tense interaction between Sansa and Daenerys follows.

episodes.name: The Long Night
episodes.overview: The Night King and his army have arrived at Winterfell and the great battle begins. Arya looks to prove her worth as a fighter.

episodes.name: The Last of the Starks
episodes.overview: In the wake of a costly victory, Jon and Daenerys look to the south as Tyrion eyes a compromise that could save countless lives.

episodes.name: The Bells
episodes.overview: Daenerys brings her forces to King's Landing.

episodes.name: The Iron Throne
episodes.overview: In the aftermath of the devastating attack on King's Landing, Daenerys must face the survivors.

episodes.name: God U.
episodes.overview: Congratulations! You have been chosen for admission to Godolkin University! We're thrilled to be a part of your journey to discovering what kind of super you are! Since its founding in 1965, God U has produced some of the best and brightest superheroes the world has ever known, including three members of The Seven! And who knows? Maybe you'll be next!

episodes.name: First Day
episodes.overview: The Godolkin University Mental Health Hotline would like to remind students at this difficult time that you are not alone. You might be bulletproof on the outside, but you're not on the inside. Our caring staff is trained to deal with the specific emotional needs of superheroes and they're here to help you. If you need to talk to someone, help is just a phone call or vMessage away. #GodUCares

episodes.name: #ThinkBrink
episodes.overview: You're invited to the #ThinkBrink Memorial Gala and Fundraiser tonight at Godolkin University! Make sure to dress your best when the doors open at 7PM and you hit the red carpet! Then join the world's hottest superheroes and celebrities for selfies and complimentary champagne, and enjoy a touching tribute video to the legendary Professor Brinkerhoff, featuring A-Train, The Deep, and Polarity!

episodes.name: The Whole Truth
episodes.overview: The Godolkin University Police Department is seeking any information on the person or persons who violated the Polarity statue in the groin/genital area last night outside the School of Crimefighting. If you have any information, please contact @GodUPD.

episodes.name: Welcome to the Monster Club
episodes.overview: REWARD! Last night, The Incredible Steve attended an off-campus party where his penis was lost. He just wants it back, so his family is offering a $10,000 REWARD for its safe return, no questions asked. Please contact the Godolkin Daily Classifieds Office or the Lost-and-Found Desk at the Godolkin Student Union.

episodes.name: Jumanji
episodes.overview: The Godolkin University School of Crimefighting is excited to announce its newest course offering: THE PSYCHOLOGY OF SUPERVILLAINS! By studying the most well-known example of a supervillain, Soldier Boy, the course will investigate what makes a superhero go bad, from their flawed origin story, to the vices and moral compromises that lead them astray! Space is limited! Sign up today!

episodes.name: Sick
episodes.overview: Calling all God U #Hometeamers! Today we’re protesting Socialist Victoria Neuman’s town hall on campus! Let’s show Neuman and her Supe-hating woke mob that we won’t put up with their anti-Superhero agenda! THEY WILL NOT CONTROL US! #MakeAmericaSuperAgain #SupeLivesMatter

episodes.name: Guardians of Godolkin
episodes.overview: If you or a human loved one have been injured or killed while working at Godolkin University, you may be entitled to financial compensation. Hundreds of human employees have been victimized by Godolkin students, but the law offices of Bremmer & Bremmer have won them millions in personal injury and wrongful death lawsuits. Contact us for a free consultation at 1-888-177-2774. Know your rights!

episodes.name: New Year, New U
episodes.overview: Welcome to a new year at God U! Check out all the super security upgrades around campus! Hear from our new fearless leader, Dean Cipher, during a special welcome assembly! Reunite with old friends in our brand new Victoria Neuman Student Union, and make new friends through our revitalized, robust Greek life! This year will be way better than last year, and we can't wait!

episodes.name: Justice Never Forgets
episodes.overview: Think you're a history buff? Think again! Even a know-it-all will learn a thing or two in the God U Archives. To book a six hour educational adventure led by the world's best archivist, contact Kyle@remembererforever.com.

episodes.name: H Is for Human
episodes.overview: *This is a campus wide reminder.* All student flyers must be approved by God U administrators before they are posted to community bulletin boards. Please submit all text and graphics to the Office of Student Life ATTN: Stacey, at least 24 hours before posting your flyer. Campus security is actively monitoring all public areas for unapproved signage and inappropriate content.

episodes.name: Bags
episodes.overview: Congratulations! You secured a VIP ticket to the big fight! Attendees assume all liabilities. You may appear on camera or come in contact with bodily fluids. As a reminder, The Vought International Hotel and Spa forbids outside beverages and gender neutral bathrooms. Enjoy your VIP Experience!

episodes.name: The Kids Are Not All Right
episodes.overview: Facility Code 5827 - USE OF POWERS STRICTLY PROHIBITED. Facility Code 3567 - HANDS MUST BE VISIBLE AT ALL TIMES Facility Code 843 - ANY PERSONAL ITEM DEEMED AN ENHANCEMENT TO YOUR POWER SET WILL BE CONFISCATED. Facility Code 2536 - RESTRAINT TECHNOLOGIES ACTIVE IN ALL AREAS. Facility Code - 9832 - ALL DETAINEES SUBJECT TO BODY CAVITY SEARCH AT ANY TIME.

episodes.name: Cooking Lessons
episodes.overview: Worried about the coming culture war and apocalypse? Ride it out in style and comfort! Sustainable septic systems AND Feng Shui! Blast proof and billionaire approved! The world may be burning, but you'll be 35 feet underground with a glass of ’82 Bordeaux! Act now before it's too late

episodes.name: Hell Week
episodes.overview: A Reminder from the Office of Student Conduct: God U strictly prohibits hazing. Students should never be called demeaning names, forced to wear humiliating clothes, or treated like any animal. If you see something, say something! No one will call you a narc.

episodes.name: Trojan
episodes.overview: Hello {{FirstName}} {{LastName}}. You've been selected for the 10:30 AM session.** Please be on time. Once a session begins, students may not leave for any reason. Check in with Vance outside of the Advanced Seminar Room when you arrive. Good luck! ** By accepting this invitation, you assume inherent risks involved with this activity including but not limited to physical harm, injury, or death.

episodes.name: Never Meet Your Heroes
episodes.overview: Archer Kate Bishop lands in the middle of a criminal conspiracy, forcing Hawkeye out of retirement.

episodes.name: Hide and Seek
episodes.overview: Clint has to help Kate disentangle herself from the Tracksuit mafia and a real-life murder mystery.

episodes.name: Echoes
episodes.overview: After narrowly escaping the Tracksuits and their daunting leader Maya Lopez, Clint and Kate work together to find answers. With each step they take, however, they find themselves sliding deeper into a rapidly growing criminal conspiracy.

episodes.name: Partners, Am I Right?
episodes.overview: Secrets are revealed and hard truths emerge, culminating in a battle against two opposing forces.

episodes.name: Ronin
episodes.overview: After a fallout between Clint and Kate, the younger archer is ready to abandon her dream of becoming a hero. Meanwhile, a guilt-ridden Clint prepares to go face-to-face with the Tracksuit mafia, owning up to past actions. Everything changes, however, when Kate makes a surprising discovery.
