episodes.name: Generation Why
episodes.overview: Kamala Khan attends Avengercon only to discover that she herself might have superpowers.

episodes.name: Crushed
episodes.overview: Kamala and Bruno explore the source of her newfound powers just in time for a perilous adventure.

episodes.name: Destined
episodes.overview: Ahead of Aamir’s wedding, Kamala may face grave consequences due to a crucial decision she makes.

episodes.name: Seeing Red
episodes.overview: Kamala travels around the world to solve the mystery of the bangle and her family’s history.

episodes.name: Time and Again
episodes.overview: The bangle reveals to Kamala secrets about her family lineage, as well as the truth behind the Veil.

episodes.name: No Normal
episodes.overview: Back in Jersey, Kamala finds Kamran and protects him from Damage Control who will stop at nothing to take him in.

episodes.name: Pilot
episodes.overview: As the hit video game Mythic Quest prepares to launch its newest update, creator Ian Grimm obsesses over a seemingly minor detail.

episodes.name: The Casino
episodes.overview: Brad takes the day off to prove a point, leaving Poppy and David to keep the game afloat. Dana and Rachel have a girls' night in.

episodes.name: Dinner Party
episodes.overview: The development team must take decisive action when the internet discovers a dark group of gamers congregating in Mythic Quest.

episodes.name: The Convention
episodes.overview: When Pootie_Shoe announces that he's no longer playing Mythic Quest, the team needs to find a new star streamer to promote it.

episodes.name: A Dark Quiet Death
episodes.overview: From inception to demise, the life cycle of video game Dark Quiet Death.

episodes.name: Non-Player Character
episodes.overview: Poppy steps out for a meeting and Mythic Quest headquarters descends into chaos.

episodes.name: Permadeath
episodes.overview: Ian challenges a hacker to an epic in-game showdown.

episodes.name: Brendan
episodes.overview: As Poppy weighs a difficult decision, Ian whisks her away on a mysterious road trip.

episodes.name: Blood Ocean
episodes.overview: With his workforce unionizing, Ian faces a looming departure, the game’s future, and the meaning of two words: Blood Ocean.

episodes.name: Quarantine
episodes.overview: As the MQ staff works from home, Poppy struggles with solitude while Brad and David start a charitable competition.

episodes.name: Everlight
episodes.overview: The team returns to the office for their annual Everlight party. Poppy and Ian rig a LARP tournament in an underdog's favor.

episodes.name: Titans' Rift
episodes.overview: With Ian on sabbatical, Poppy must come up with a title for the new expansion. Dana and Rachel take their relationship to new heights.

episodes.name: Grouchy Goat
episodes.overview: Brad wants to launch a mobile game. Poppy is pulled away from working on the expansion with Ian to speak at a luncheon for women in gaming.

episodes.name: #YumYum
episodes.overview: Ian and Poppy work separately on the expansion, Jo helps C.W. deal with his publisher, and Brad sets out to find a romantic partner for David.

episodes.name: Breaking Brad
episodes.overview: Brad attempts to convince the development team that his brother Zack is not the nice guy he's pretending to be. Rachel does Ian a favor.

episodes.name: Please Sign Here
episodes.overview: Carol tries to wrangle Mythic Quest employees as they refuse to sign the results of a simple workplace assessment.

episodes.name: Backstory!
episodes.overview: A fresh-faced young man discovers what it takes to become one of the world's greatest science fiction writers.

episodes.name: Peter
episodes.overview: Rachel accompanies C.W. on an acrimonious visit to his former friend turned rival.

episodes.name: Juice Box
episodes.overview: Ian presents his half of the expansion and ends up in the hospital. David ponders his legacy.

episodes.name: TBD
episodes.overview: Ian and Poppy collaborate again, Rachel and Dana figure out their next move, and Brad looks to settle a feud once and for all. Season finale.

episodes.name: Across the Universe
episodes.overview: As David stewards Mythic Quest, Ian and Poppy consider offers for their offshoot game. Jo assembles the entire team for C.W.'s celebration.

episodes.name: Partners
episodes.overview: Ian feels adrift in his new partnership with Poppy. David and Jo are suspicious of an employee's return. Dana and Rachel meet the new testers.

episodes.name: Crushing It
episodes.overview: David uses exciting news about MQ to make Ian jealous. Poppy, Rachel, and Jo go to brunch.

episodes.name: The Two Joes
episodes.overview: When David gets stuck in traffic, Jo takes his place to meet with a famous actor for the movie. Brad tries to help Carol raise money through NFTs.

episodes.name: Playpen
episodes.overview: Poppy begrudgingly takes feedback from Dana about her work. Carol, Brad, and Rachel navigate the aftermath of their monetization gambit.

episodes.name: The 12 Hours of Christmas
episodes.overview: In the first holiday season since Ian and Poppy’s departure, David grabs the reins and tries to infuse the team with Christmas spirit.

episodes.name: Sarian
episodes.overview: Two kids from across the globe find their passions in a world that doesn’t understand them.

episodes.name: To Catch a Mouse
episodes.overview: Ian’s and Poppy’s clashing office preferences put them at odds. Jo and Brad team up to get rid of a pest in David’s office.

episodes.name: The Year of Phil
episodes.overview: David’s motion-capture session with Joe Manganiello gets hijacked. Dana helps Poppy prepare her PlayPen VC pitch.

episodes.name: Buffalo Chicken Pizza
episodes.overview: Ian tries to repair his partnership with Poppy. David hits an impasse with the movie. Dana has a realization about Grimpop.

episodes.name: Boundaries
episodes.overview: Ian and Poppy reveal their project as they struggle with personal and professional lines. The Mythic Quest team adjusts to their new game's growth.
David uses AI to help regulate gamer behavior—then needs humans to regulate the AI. Meanwhile, no one is regulating Ian and Poppy's arguments.

episodes.name: Breakthrough
episodes.overview: Ian, David, and Jo embark on a day of self-discovery. Brad teaches Dana and Rachel about financial responsibility.

episodes.name: The Villain's Feast
episodes.overview: A mysterious host invites the MQ team to a glamorous murder mystery party on a private island.

episodes.name: Second Skeleton
episodes.overview: Poppy grapples with a discovery as Ian tries to help in his own unique way. Dana runs into unexpected competition.

episodes.name: The Fish and the Whale
episodes.overview: When Dana's plans for a new game are threatened by her ties to MQ, Brad devises a long con to help her. Jo throws Poppy a party.

episodes.name: The Room Where It Happens
episodes.overview: David and Rachel face scrutiny over Playpen. Dana makes a difficult decision. Ian's attempt to help Poppy doesn't go as planned.

episodes.name: Rebrand
episodes.overview: Pootie_Shoe attempts to rebrand himself by challenging a rival to an MMA fight.

episodes.name: Telephone
episodes.overview: As Poppy considers a major life change, David scrambles to keep MQ afloat.

episodes.name: Heaven and Hell
episodes.overview: An unexpected visitor from Montreal evaluates MQ. Ian and Poppy face a pivotal decision.

episodes.name: Descenso
episodes.overview: Chilean drug chemist Cockroach brings his product to Colombian smuggler Pablo Escobar. DEA agent Steve Murphy joins the war on drugs in Bogota.

episodes.name: The Sword of Simón Bolívar
episodes.overview: Communist radical group M-19 makes a move against the narcos, while Murphy gets an education in Colombian law enforcement from his new partner Peña.

episodes.name: The Men of Always
episodes.overview: Murphy encounters the depths of government corruption when he and Peña try to derail Escobar's political ambitions by proving he's a narco.

episodes.name: The Palace in Flames
episodes.overview: Despite a new extradition treaty, the U.S. puts more money into fighting communism, creating new challenges for Murphy and Peña in the hunt for Pablo.

episodes.name: There Will Be a Future
episodes.overview: Pablo's extreme methods put the narcos on the brink of war with Carillo and  the government. Peña tries to protect his witness, Elisa.

episodes.name: Explosivos
episodes.overview: Peña and Carillo close in on Gacha, while Murphy tries to protect pro-extradition candidate Gaviria from a notorious assassin connected to Pablo.

episodes.name: You Will Cry Tears of Blood
episodes.overview: Pablo goes into hiding as the political tide turns against him, but he finds a way to strike back. Murphy and Peña finally get the CIA to help them.

episodes.name: La Gran Mentira
episodes.overview: A tragic mistake forces the government to change tactics in the fight against Pablo. But Pablo faces bigger threats from inside his empire.

episodes.name: La Catedral
episodes.overview: The hunt for Pablo seems to be over after he makes a deal with the government, but Murphy and Peña -- and the Cali Cartel -- have other plans.

episodes.name: Despegue
episodes.overview: Pablo's activities in prison provoke the government into taking extreme action. Murphy and Peña face a situation of their own.

episodes.name: Free at Last
episodes.overview: In the aftermath of a massive military effort to take Pablo into custody, the family reunites while enemies worry. Steve and Connie fight about safety.

episodes.name: Cambalache
episodes.overview: Tata gets impatient with life on the run. Pablo responds to President Gaviria's reward offer. Steve and Javier meet their new boss.

episodes.name: Our Man in Madrid
episodes.overview: President Gaviria has a new job for an old colleague. The Search Bloc's new tactics shake up Pablo, but also unsettle Steve and Javier.

episodes.name: The Good, The Bad, and The Dead
episodes.overview: The Cali cartel discusses moving in on Pablo's territory. Limón proposes a plan to Maritza. Tata gets a gun for protection.

episodes.name: The Enemies of My Enemy
episodes.overview: The Search Bloc gets a new leader. Javier loses faith in the system. Pablo brings Tata's brother Carlos down from Miami to cheer her up.

episodes.name: Los Pepes
episodes.overview: The newly-formed Los Pepes want to destroy Pablo and his empire. Tata's brother urges her to leave and seek safety with her children.

episodes.name: Deutschland 93
episodes.overview: As the danger intensifies for the Escobars, Pablo sends his family to another country. Gaviria weighs the opportunity to use them as leverage.

episodes.name: Exit El Patrón
episodes.overview: Colombia begins to turn on Escobar after his latest terrorist attack. Tata receives help from an unlikely ally. Quica gets increasingly anxious.

episodes.name: Nuestra Finca
episodes.overview: Pablo is reunited with an estranged family member. Judy Moncada's life is put in danger. The DEA and CIA clash over how to handle Los Pepes.

episodes.name: Al Fin Cayó!
episodes.overview: Javier deals with the repercussions from Judy's interview. Tata tries to convince Pablo to surrender for the sake of his children.

episodes.name: The Kingpin Strategy
episodes.overview: The Gentlemen of Cali gather their associates together for a big surprise announcement about the future of their business.

episodes.name: The Cali KGB
episodes.overview: A gas incident threatens to disrupt the Cali-government deal and Jorge is asked to help out. Peña grapples with his former Los Pepes connection.

episodes.name: Follow the Money
episodes.overview: The Rodriguez brothers go into hiding during negotiations. Pacho meets with the Lord of the Skies in Mexico. Peña's new DEA team visits Cali.

episodes.name: Checkmate
episodes.overview: Peña hatches a plan to try to capture Cali leader Gilberto Rodriguez. Amado proposes a business idea to Pacho.

episodes.name: MRO
episodes.overview: Paranoid about leaks, Miguel cracks down on his security. Pacho makes a decision about his new offer. Peña works on cultivating a witness.

episodes.name: Best Laid Plans
episodes.overview: Jorge takes a dangerous risk. An accident in New York threatens to expose Chepe. Peña travels to Curaçao to arrest a potential witness.

episodes.name: Sin Salida
episodes.overview: Peña plans another covert operation to take down a key Cali cartel member, but he risks running out of time during his search.

episodes.name: Convivir
episodes.overview: David seeks revenge on behalf of his father, putting Enrique in danger. Peña asks Don Berna for help on a rescue mission.

episodes.name: Todos Los Hombres del Presidente
episodes.overview: David follows his suspicions. Peña is shocked to discover the depth of corruption in the Colombian government. Miguel is sought after once again.

episodes.name: Going Back to Cali
episodes.overview: David and Peña are in a race against each other to find Pallomari. Peña makes a serious decision about the future of his career.

episodes.name: A Whole New Whirled
episodes.overview: After making a miraculous recovery, Peacemaker returns home–only to discover that his freedom comes at a price.

episodes.name: Best Friends, For Never
episodes.overview: After Peacemaker’s hazardous escape, tension and mistrust build within the team. Later, as Peacemaker grapples with his new assignment, he receives a surprise visitor.

episodes.name: Better Goff Dead
episodes.overview: On their first official mission to assassinate suspected “butterflies,” Economos and Murn bond, and Peacemaker and Harcourt reach an understanding. But the whole job goes sideways with the arrival of Judomaster.

episodes.name: The Choad Less Traveled
episodes.overview: Following a somewhat successful mission, Murn recruits Vigilante. Meanwhile, after learning that the team helped land his father in prison, Peacemaker confronts his complicated past.

episodes.name: Monkey Dory
episodes.overview: The team scouts the apparent hub for the aliens’ food supply, only to come face-to-face with a full-fledged invasion. Meanwhile, Auggie’s attempt to sell out his son to the police is complicated by Murn’s mysterious contact.

episodes.name: Murn After Reading
episodes.overview: Murn reveals his deepest secret. Auggie is set free. The botched arrest of Peacemaker sends alien Goff into an unexpected new host.

episodes.name: Stop Dragon My Heart Around
episodes.overview: Harcourt, Murn, and Adebayo find themselves surrounded by an alien force, while Peacemaker squares off against his father with help from Vigilante and Economos.

episodes.name: It's Cow or Never
episodes.overview: With Peacemaker and Adebayo at odds, can the team kill the cow once and for all – or will their fracture give the aliens the opening they need to complete its teleportation?

episodes.name: The Ties That Grind
episodes.overview: While Peacemaker attempts to join the Justice Gang, Harcourt struggles to find work, and Economos takes on a challenging new assignment.

episodes.name: A Man Is Only As Good As His Bird
episodes.overview: As Economos clashes with his new handler, Peacemaker must deal with the consequences of his actions in the alternate dimension.

episodes.name: Another Rick Up My Sleeve
episodes.overview: Economos pays for the team's bungled mission, while Peacemaker explores the depths of his relationship with Harcourt in the other dimension.

episodes.name: Need I Say Door
episodes.overview: As A.R.G.U.S. ramps up efforts to find the QUC, Harcourt receives a tempting offer from Flag – which comes at a steep cost to Peacemaker.

episodes.name: Back to the Suture
episodes.overview: After a catastrophic showdown with Flag, Peacemaker makes a shocking decision, while his friends scramble to keep the 11th Street Kids together.

episodes.name: Ignorance Is Chris
episodes.overview: As the 11th Street Kids fight to bring their missing member home, Flag doubles down on his efforts to hold Peacemaker accountable.

episodes.name: Like a Keith in the Night
episodes.overview: As Flag and A.R.G.U.S. close in, the 11th Street Kids attempt to keep the ever-increasing dangers of the alternate world around them at bay.

episodes.name: Full Nelson
episodes.overview: As Flag puts everyone around him in increasing danger, the 11th Street Kids must convince Peacemaker that he's one of them.

episodes.name: Pilot
episodes.overview: Michael Scofield, a structural engineer, attempts to rob a bank in order to get incarcerated at Fox River State Penitentiary, where his brother Lincoln Burrows, accused of murdering the Vice President's brother, is scheduled to be executed. At Fox River, Michael approaches a number of inmates, all of whom play an important role in his plan to free his brother from the inside. Meanwhile, agents Kellerman and Hale are determined to make sure the execution goes through as planned. Lincoln's son LJ gets into trouble.

episodes.name: Allen
episodes.overview: Michael seeks help of his fellow prison inhabitants to execute his escape plans.

episodes.name: Cell Test
episodes.overview: When Michael reveals his escape plan to Sucre, Sucre chooses to be no part of it, and requests a cell transfer. Michael gets a new cellmate called Haywire.

episodes.name: Cute Poison
episodes.overview: Veronica keeps uncovering new information regarding Lincoln's case and decides she wants to work on the case full-time.  When no one wants to help her on the case, Nick Savrinn (an attorney) offers his assistance and the two of them visit Lincoln.

episodes.name: English, Fitz or Percy
episodes.overview: Kellerman and Hale blackmail Warden Pope. Michael finds out he might get out earlier than anticipated. Veronica becomes uncertain of her allies.

episodes.name: Riots, Drills and the Devil (1)
episodes.overview: Michael creates a lockdown by sabotaging the air conditioning in order to execute his breakout plan properly, and unintentionally causes a riot that gets Sara into huge trouble. Meanwhile, an ex-con is blackmailed into seeing to that Lincoln is killed.

episodes.name: Riots, Drills and the Devil (2)
episodes.overview: While the riot intensifies, Abruzzi and Sucre join forces. Michael must decide whether or not to save the life of Dr. Tancredi.

episodes.name: The Old Head
episodes.overview: Michael finds out a storeroom fundamental to his escape plans has been converted into a break room. Veronica and Nick are being threatened.

episodes.name: Tweener
episodes.overview: Abruzzi's demotion in the prison hierachy puts the entire escape plan at risk. Michael finds himself in the uneviable position of trying to protect T-Bag's new "fish" and facing the threat of T-Bag exposing the plan to the guards. The inmates dig themselves into a hole.

episodes.name: Sleight of Hand
episodes.overview: Michael is forced to give up Fibonacci's location to Philly Falzone, and Kellerman and Hale get a little unwanted help to track down LJ who has gone missing. Veronica and Nick uncover evidence against the man Lincoln was convicted of murdering.

episodes.name: And Then There Were 7
episodes.overview: The escapees and Dr. Tancredi are shocked when they learn the identity of Michael's visitor, who brings with her a very important piece of the escape plan.

episodes.name: Odd Man Out
episodes.overview: Michael sees proof his plan is working, so he begins to overcome the last obstacle. As the escape draws near, the group tries to reduce its number by one and targets T-Bag.

episodes.name: End of the Tunnel
episodes.overview: With Lincoln's execution scheduled for the following day, Veronica comes out of hiding to contact him and gains an ally. Kellerman makes the ultimate sacrifice to preserve the conspiracy. Michael looks for a way to get Lincoln out of solitary confinement in time for the escape that evening. The inmates risk everything as they attempt their escape.

episodes.name: The Rat
episodes.overview: Veronica and Nick request a judge to postpone Lincoln's execution. A C.O. becomes suspicious about a broken door.

episodes.name: By the Skin and the Teeth
episodes.overview:
As Lincoln is about to be executed, he briefly sees his father in the viewing room. A phone call from judge Kessler delays the execution. After reviewing the newly surfaced evidence, the judge orders the exhumation of Steadman's body.

Michael creates a new, more dangerous, break-out plan, involving going through the prison yard. An accident puts Michael's new plan in danger.

episodes.name: Brother's Keeper
episodes.overview: Flashbacks shed light on the past actions that led to the incarceration of Lincoln, Sucre, T-Bag and C-Note. Basis of Michael's ingenious break-out plan are revealed. Dr. Tancredi memorizes how she ended up in Fox River State Penitentiary.

episodes.name: J-Cat
episodes.overview: Lincoln is worried about Michael's sanity while Michael has trouble remembering some parts of the prison schematics. Sucre has to conceal the hole in the guard's break room. Warden Pope transfers Michael to solitary after he declines his request.

episodes.name: Bluff
episodes.overview: In an effort to recreate the missing piece of the tattoo, Michael gets transferred to the psych ward, seeking the help of Haywire. T-Bag and C-Note have to join forces.

episodes.name: The Key
episodes.overview: Michael must get the key to the infirmary and enlist the help of an old face, while Lincoln learns the identity of his kidnapper and another inmate learns of the escape.

episodes.name: Tonight
episodes.overview: Westmoreland wants Michael to speed up the planned escape, and gets Bellick one step closer to unraveling it. Michael has to decide whether to involve Sara in the breakout plan. Tweener's devotion is put to a test. Veronica finds out that her ally unexpectedly has a connection to an inmate serving time at Fox River.

episodes.name: Go
episodes.overview: Everyone's ready to make their escapes across the high wire. Veronica and Nick realize they may be in over their heads. And Agent Kellerman helps Vice President Reynolds calm down before her debate.

episodes.name: Flight
episodes.overview: As the escape is in progress, Warden Pope and Captain Bellick begin a search to detain the escapees. Michael and co. have to reach the aircraft fast as the police is hot on their heels. Veronica discovers a major piece of evidence that could prove Lincoln's innocence. The Vice President is worried about losing her authority.

episodes.name: Manhunt
episodes.overview: As eight hours has passed since the escape, Michael, Lincoln, Sucre, C-Note and Abruzzi attempt to evade their seekers. Bellick is forced to relinquish the command of the search party to FBI Special Agent Alexander Mahone whose ingenious approach makes Michael's life as a fugitive harder. As a result from her overdose, Dr. Tancredi is in critical condition. A short-handed T-Bag faces the ultimate challenge.

episodes.name: Otis
episodes.overview: Mahone tries to lure the escapees by targeting an imprisoned LJ. Michael and Lincoln come up with a plan to free LJ from jail. Sucre, Abruzzi and C-Note have a plan of their own, but only to break free of their pursuers.Meanwhile, Bellick and Warden Pope feel the heat following their unsuccessful attempts to capture the escapees.Tweener infiltrates a bunch of college students on their way to spring break.

episodes.name: Scan
episodes.overview: Michael and a wounded Lincoln try to outmaneuver Mahone, who is hot on their trail. Sara gets a surprise visit to her bedside.Following his suspension, Bellick recruits a resolute partner to aid in his quest to get the escapees behind the bars.Sucre and C-Note head out for their family reunions-regardless of being observed by the authorities.

episodes.name: First Down
episodes.overview: Bellick, now teamed up with Michael, Lincoln and Nika, sets out to find the money stolen by Westmoreland during the 1971 skyjacking. Kellerman targets Sara, who receives a long-awaited phone call. T-Bag gets a ride from an unsuspecting family. Abruzzi resumes the search for Fibonacci to settle the scores once and for all.

episodes.name: Map 1213
episodes.overview: Michael and Lincoln are eager to locate the Double K ranch where Westmoreland hid his millions. Sucre goes to Las Vegas to prevent Maricruz from marrying his cousin Hector. C-Note gets on a train. Mahone is given an important package.

episodes.name: Subdivision
episodes.overview: Mahone takes an interest in the story of DB Cooper.In their quest to find Westmoreland's treasure, Michael and Lincoln travel house-to-house in Utah. Haywire's journey outside the prison walls continues. Sucre bumps into an acquaintance.

episodes.name: Buried
episodes.overview: Michael, Sucre, T-Bag and C-Note claim the hidden treasure.An anxious Lincoln risks everything to get to LJ. LJ grows wary about the easy getaway. Kellerman rethinks where his loyalties lie after Sara gets to The Company's hit list. Mahone results to deadly force to get the truth out of Tweener.

episodes.name: Dead Fall
episodes.overview: In his efforts to try to get hold of all of the money Sucre runs into some unexpected difficulties. And Captain Bellick and his partner have not given up on finding their old inmates.

episodes.name: Unearthed
episodes.overview: In an effort to learn more about his pursuer Michael cozies up to Mahone's wife. L.J. and Lincoln have a bumpy road-trip. T-Bag receives a surprise, and C-Note's wife must choose between her daughter and husband.

episodes.name: Rendezvous
episodes.overview: As Michael reunites with Sara, Mahone and Kellerman strive to make sure they stay apart.On the road with LJ, Lincoln meets his father. Sucre tries to contact Maricruz. T-Bag has a reunion of his own.

episodes.name: Bolshoi Booze
episodes.overview: As Lincoln tries to reunite with Michael, he has to say goodbye to another loved one. Michael attempts to obtain a getaway plane. T-Bag gets revenge. Sara and Kellerman face-off.

episodes.name: Disconnect
episodes.overview: With Mahone on their trail, Michael, Lincoln, their father, and Sucre make a run for the getaway plane. Michael's reunion with his father sheds light on his difficult childhood.The women in Bellick and Kellerman's lives coerce their men to confess their sins.A medical emergency forces C-Note to risk it all.

episodes.name: The Killing Box
episodes.overview: Bellick is anything but happy about his sudden homecoming-to Fox River.Elsewhere, Michael and Lincoln might face a homecoming of their own. Mahone and Kellerman use everything they got to make certain that Michael and Lincoln do not get through their road trip alive.Sucre's getaway plane encounters some difficulties. T-Bag closes on Mrs. Hollander.

episodes.name: John Doe
episodes.overview: Bellick gets a taste of the medicine he gave out when he was the Captain and Agent Mahone's ex-wife makes another appearance.

episodes.name: The Message
episodes.overview: In Mexico, Sucre gets a car but gets in trouble by the police. Bellick has more trouble as the new inmate as prisoners who suffered with him want revenge.

episodes.name: Chicago
episodes.overview: C-Note gets into a tricky situation when a robber holds up the diner he is in and demands everyone go into the storage room until the police arrive. Michael, Lincoln and Kellerman get closer to revealing the conspiracy with the help of Sara. Mahone finds a new ally in Bellick.

episodes.name: Bad Blood
episodes.overview: Michael and Sara request Henry Pope's help to retrieve the information that will topple The Company.Mahone pins down an escapee. Sucre discovers a new threat while hitchhiking to reunite with Maricruz. T-Bag brings the Hollander family to his home.

episodes.name: Wash
episodes.overview: T-Bag digs deep and finds his 'nice-side' with the help of a psychiatrist. Michael, Lincoln, and Sara get their hands on evidence needed to bring down The Company, while Kellerman is close to finding the President.

episodes.name: Sweet Caroline
episodes.overview: An unlikely alliance forms between Bellick and Sucre while Michael is determined to face the president. T-Bag gets into some trouble when he loses his luggage and C-Note faces major consequences after some of his actions.

episodes.name: Panama
episodes.overview: Sara sacrifices herself for the safety of Michael so the brothers can get on with their final plan to attain freedom, but their plan gets 'shipwrecked'. Meanwhile, Bellick blackmails Sucre to partner up as T-Bag's streak of murder continues to the south of the border.

episodes.name: Fin Del Camino
episodes.overview: The day has finally come for Sara's trial while critical information that will exonerate her is being debunked. Meanwhile, Michael is determined to get his hands on the 5 million and to stop T-Bag's reign of terror. Bellick is also money hungry and will do whatever it takes to hunt down T-Bag. Kellerman decides his fate while Lincoln and Mahone square off.

episodes.name: Sona
episodes.overview: Michael tries to save his brother and himself from the unstoppable Mahone. Kellerman's testimony at Sara's trial proves different from what was expected, could this be the end for Sara? Sucre puts everything on the line to save his Maricruz. Just like old times, T-Bag and Bellick are at it again but this time there will be a winner.

episodes.name: Orientación
episodes.overview: Now locked up in a Panamanian prison known as Sona, Michael, T-Bag, Bellick, and Mahone try to find a way out. Much to their devastation, they soon find out that the prison has been abandoned by the authorities because of the immense threat from the vile inmates. Michael seeks for an inmate named Whistler in the prison sewers. As Lincoln is puzzled by Sara's sudden disappearance, he learns that LJ has gotten into some trouble. He also tries to recover the 5 million dollars.

episodes.name: Fire/Water
episodes.overview: Michael and Mahone try to lure Whistler out of his hiding place. T-Bag gains some upward momentum in the prison hierarchy as the water supply is running low. Lincoln meets familiar and not so familiar faces on his quest to free Michael.

episodes.name: Call Waiting
episodes.overview: Whistler tells the truth to Michael. Michael tries to get in touch with Sara but the only phone is in Lechero's quarters, so he has to rely on T-Bag's help. Mahone battles his addiction. Bellick steps on some toes.

episodes.name: Good Fences
episodes.overview: After taking delivery of a package from The Company, Lincoln realizes that they are deadly serious. Michael's new break out plan relies on electricity. Haywire is back from the dead, haunting disoriented Mahone. Bellick and T-Bag get special attention from Lechero.

episodes.name: Interference
episodes.overview: A new inmate named Tyge is brought to Sona. After he seemingly recognizes Whistler, Michael's doubts arise. T-Bag enters a new area of commerce.Lincoln goes to the seaside with Sofia. Sucre takes over the side-business of his predecessor.

episodes.name: Photo Finish
episodes.overview: Michael threatens to cancel the escape plan unless he sees a proof that Sara is still alive. Whistler is accused of murdering an inmate and it is up to Michael to prove his innocence and save his life. Lincoln and Sofia help in monitoring the morning guards. Mahone may have another way to get out of Sona.

episodes.name: Vamonos
episodes.overview:
Everything goes wrong for Michael as he tries to create a diversion.

Lincoln tries to outsmart Susan who has his son. Sucre offers his assistance to Lincoln.

episodes.name: Bang and Burn
episodes.overview: Susan jeopardizes Michael's life as she puts her own escape plan into motion. Whistler's past catches up to his girlfriend.The Company goes after Lincoln and Sucre. Justice prevails for Mahone. And Lechero sheds light into an empty tunnel.

episodes.name: Boxed In
episodes.overview: The Panamanian Army arranges Michael to get a taste of solitary. T-Bag reserves a spot in the escape. Bellick's life turns into an uphill battle. Susan traps Sucre.

episodes.name: Dirt Nap
episodes.overview: Lechero's demotion devastates Michael's breakout plan as Sammy takes reigns at Sona. T-Bag forces Bellick to fight in a fight where the odds are stacked heavily against him. Lincoln and Sucre have some surprise fireworks set for Susan.

episodes.name: Under and Out
episodes.overview: Michael's escape may be in jeopardy because of heavy rain. T-Bag and Lechero join forces, while Bellick hopes to do the same with Mahone.

episodes.name: Hell or High Water
episodes.overview: Michael, Whistler, and Mahone make their break from Sona. But Mahone seems like the odd man out along the way.

episodes.name: The Art of the Deal
episodes.overview: Michael and Lincoln are left with no choice but to hand Whistler over in exchange to save LJ and Sofia. A familiar face enters Sona while another inmate leaves.

episodes.name: Scylla
episodes.overview: Michael has trailed Gretchen/Susan, Whistler and Mahone to L.A. Chaos reigns in SONA while T-Bag, Bellick and Sucre go missing. Lincoln and L.J. continue to stay with Sofia.

episodes.name: Breaking & Entering
episodes.overview: The gang has to break into the well-guarded home of company man Stuart Tuxhorn. Elsewhere, T-Bag must go to extremes to survive.

episodes.name: Shut Down
episodes.overview: Michael attempts to track the cardholder and avoid going back to prison. Wyatt finds new information regarding Sara's whereabouts. Elsewhere, T-Bag uses a new identity to make a new life for himself.

episodes.name: Eagles and Angels
episodes.overview: Michael, Lincoln and Sucre must crash a police benefit to obtain the next card key. Reeling from another death, Sara falls back into an old habit. T-Bag arouses suspicion and runs into some old “friends” his first day on the job.

episodes.name: Safe and Sound
episodes.overview: Self locates another card hidden in a safe within a secure federal building, as Mahone continues his quest for revenge. Meanwhile, T-Bag's new life may be in jeopardy.

episodes.name: Blow Out
episodes.overview: The entire operation may be in jeopardy when Mahone gets into trouble with the law. Gretchen's sister receives a surprise visitor. The Company may be onto Self. T-Bag continues to raise suspicions at Gate.

episodes.name: Five the Hard Way
episodes.overview: Lincoln takes members of the team to Las Vegas where Sucre gets an indecent proposal. Sara learns about Michael’s condition, and Roland pushes his luck too far. Gretchen teams up with T-Bag who makes an offer to Michael he cannot refuse. Meanwhile, the secrets in Whistler’s bird book are finally revealed.

episodes.name: The Price
episodes.overview: Lincoln works to retrieve the final card, which is being held by the General. Michael and Self are forced to work with Gretchen. Meanwhile, Roland continues to be berated for losing the transcribing device in Las Vegas.

episodes.name: Greatness Achieved
episodes.overview: Wyatt gets a taste of his own medicine, and Mahone finds some resolution. T-Bag scrambles when the police investigate his missing co-worker while Gretchen gets cozy with a Company man. Meanwhile, Michael’s condition continues to worsen, and a team member makes the ultimate sacrifice while planning the underground break-in for Scylla.

episodes.name: The Legend
episodes.overview: Sara is left with no choice but to take Michael to the hospital as his condtion rapidly worsens. Sucre and Lincoln are faced with unknown territory as they are left in charge of the operation. Elsewhere, agent Self makes a surprising ally.

episodes.name: Quiet Riot
episodes.overview: Michael races against time and his ailing health to break into the Company headquarters to steal Scylla, but the break-in’s success lies with Sucre. Gretchen dresses up for a meeting with the General and one final attempt to get the last card key. T-Bag must make a decision to leave his criminal ways for good.

episodes.name: Selfless
episodes.overview: Sara takes a hostage in a bid to secure Scylla. In the meantime, Michael and Lincoln finally meet the General while one of their members switches allegiance.

episodes.name: Deal Or No Deal
episodes.overview: It's up to Michael to hold the gang together after they find out they were betrayed by one of their own. Meanwhile, Gretchen is blackmailed by T-Bag's new partner.

episodes.name: Just Business
episodes.overview: Michael, whose condition is deteriorating, winds up in the hands of The Company who promise Lincoln that they can save Michael's life in exchange for a favor. Elsewhere, Gretchen and Self wind up with Scylla and a buyer.

episodes.name: Going Under
episodes.overview: Michael gets medical attention from the most unlikely of places, and Charles Westmoreland returns to help uncover the true meaning of Scylla. Meanwhile, Lincoln and Sucre race to stop Gretchen before Scylla is lost forever.

episodes.name: The Sunshine State
episodes.overview: Lincoln and his new partners arrive in Miami to recover Scylla from its shocking new owner, and Sara searches for a missing Michael who learns some surprising information about his past. Meanwhile, a double-crossing leads to a death and an arrest in "The Sunshine State."

episodes.name: The Mother Lode
episodes.overview: Michael and Sara journey to Miami while Lincoln meets with his mother. T-Bag and Self's mission to locate Scylla takes a dramatic turn. The General comes under pressure.

episodes.name: VS.
episodes.overview: Michael and Lincoln come to blows over Scylla as Christina sets the wheels in motion for her plan. Meanwhile, Sara receives life-changing news. T-Bag arrives at the Indian Embassy. The General becomes increasingly paranoid.

episodes.name: S.O.B.
episodes.overview: Michael's reunion with Christina is soured when she drops a bombshell regarding Lincoln, and T-Bag grows determined to prove he is worthy of being a member of the Company.

episodes.name: Cowboys and Indians
episodes.overview: Pandemonium erupts at the hotel following the assassination, and Christina puts the final pieces of her plan together. Meanwhile, the General makes good on his threat, and Michael is forced to choose between saving either Lincoln or Sara.

episodes.name: Rate of Exchange
episodes.overview: Familiar faces return to help Michael end his quest to bring down The Company once and for all.

episodes.name: Killing Your Number
episodes.overview: Michael tries to bring down the Company once and for all.

episodes.name: Ogygia
episodes.overview: It's been seven years since Michael was presumed dead, but when clues suggest that he might still be alive, Lincoln reunites with Sara to help track down the truth.

episodes.name: Kaniel Outis
episodes.overview: As Lincoln and C-Note search for the "Sheik of Light," Michael and his cellmate, Whip, attempt an escape from Ogygia. Meanwhile, Sara's investigation into Michael's reappearance leads her to the state department and an uneasy reunion with Paul Kellerman.

episodes.name: The Liar
episodes.overview: When T-Bag ambushes Sara, he warns her that two of Poseidon's henchmen, Van Gogh and A&W, may be following her. Meanwhile, Lincoln attempts to retrieve his confiscated passport to escape Yemen, and Michael plans his next move.

episodes.name: The Prisoner's Dilemma
episodes.overview: Michael, Whip and Ja make their last attempt to break from Ogygia, but must make a deal with the devil to do so. Lincoln races against the clock to help with the escape, as T-Bag meets with Kellerman to gather more info on Michael's resurrection.

episodes.name: Contingency
episodes.overview: Lincoln becomes frustrated as he tries to understand what really happened to Michael. C-Note has a new escape plan, but fears it will not be executed quickly enough, as Cyclops is trailing closely behind. Meanwhile, Sara struggles with the idea that Michael may be alive.

episodes.name: Phaecia
episodes.overview: As Michael, Lincoln and the remaining Ogygia gang try to escape Yemen, they find themselves racing though the desert from a vengeful Cyclops. Meanwhile, A&W and Van Gogh question their roles as their pursuit of the escapees leads them to...Graceland.

episodes.name: Wine Dark Sea
episodes.overview: Sara becomes fearful of her family's safety when she discovers the real reason that Michael faked his own death. In the meantime, Michael and Lincoln continue to try find a way home with the help of Sucre, and the real identity of Poseidon is revealed.

episodes.name: Progeny
episodes.overview: When Sara and her son's safety is threatened, Michael and Lincoln recruit the help of Sheba and C-Note to try and catch Poseidon. Meanwhile, Whip goes on a separate mission and T-Bag reveals a secret.

episodes.name: Behind the Eyes
episodes.overview: Dangerous threats keep Michael and Lincoln fighting to protect Sara and Mike. Meanwhile, Poseidon continues to try and outsmart Michael and the rest of the gang, which leads them to the ultimate showdown, and not everyone makes it out alive.

episodes.name: Welcome to Margrave
episodes.overview: Reacher is wrongly accused of murder while visiting the small town of Margrave, GA.

episodes.name: First Dance
episodes.overview: When more victims are discovered, Reacher attempts to get answers but is set up. Roscoe receives a threatening message.

episodes.name: Spoonful
episodes.overview: Reacher and Finlay’s investigation into the missing Spivey leads them into a confrontation with Kliner Sr. Roscoe learns unsettling news about Reacher.

episodes.name: In a Tree
episodes.overview: As the danger increases, Reacher and Roscoe grow closer and they make plans to meet with their contact from Homeland Security.

episodes.name: No Apologies
episodes.overview: As the mystery deepens, Reacher teams up with an old colleague and Finlay makes a shocking discovery.

episodes.name: Papier
episodes.overview: As the town is rocked by another murder, Reacher heads to New York and learns the truth about the illegal business in Margrave while Roscoe faces danger in the woods.

episodes.name: Reacher Said Nothing
episodes.overview: Reacher springs a trap and then gets trapped himself.

episodes.name: Pie
episodes.overview: Reacher leads a rescue mission at the warehouse that ends in a showdown.

episodes.name: ATM
episodes.overview: Reacher and Neagley investigate the murder of a member of 110th, a group of Special investigators assembled by Reacher, only to realize the whole unit may be at risk.

episodes.name: What Happens in Atlantic City
episodes.overview: The investigation into Franz's murder takes Reacher and the surviving members of his former Army unit to Atlantic City where the mystery deepens, danger awaits, and an old flame is rekindled.

episodes.name: Picture Says a Thousand Words
episodes.overview: After more of his friends fall victim, Reacher forges an uneasy alliance with a dogged detective, and their only clue in the case leads the 110th to a troubling discovery.

episodes.name: A Night at the Symphony
episodes.overview: Reacher and his team head to Boston to track down a political aide with insider knowledge of a top secret military-defense contract that may be the reason behind their friends' deaths.

episodes.name: Burial
episodes.overview: Neagley and Dixon discover shocking information about an old friend in Denver while Reacher and O'Donnell learn more about the nefarious and mysterious A.M..

episodes.name: New York's Finest
episodes.overview: As the mystery continues to unfold, Reacher and his team set a trap to even the score.

episodes.name: The Man Goes Through
episodes.overview: As the team close in on Langston, two members of the 110th face danger, compelling Reacher to devise a dangerous plan to rescue them.

episodes.name: Fly Boy
episodes.overview: Reacher and Neagley make a final desperate attempt to save O’Donnell and Dixon, stop A.M. and avenge their friends’ murder.

episodes.name: Persuader
episodes.overview: Reacher's attempt to thwart a kidnapping brings him into contact with mysterious businessman Zachary Beck.

episodes.name: Truckin'
episodes.overview: Tasked with transporting cargo for his new employer Zachary Beck, Reacher must juggle the involvement of the DEA and a nosy new associate.

episodes.name: Number 2 with a Bullet
episodes.overview: As a rising body count threatens his undercover position, Reacher makes a dangerous play to secure Beck's trust.

episodes.name: Dominique
episodes.overview: Reacher reunites with Duffy and Villanueva and finally shares the painful details of his history with Xavier Quinn.

episodes.name: Smackdown
episodes.overview: When a DEA tragedy puts the entire mission at risk, Reacher, Duffy, and Villanueva improvise a drastic plan to save their cover.

episodes.name: Smoke on the Water
episodes.overview: Reacher is torn between his desire to kill Quinn and his promise to Duffy to save Teresa.

episodes.name: L.A. Story
episodes.overview: After Reacher and Duffy travel to Los Angeles to arrange a deal, Neagley arrives in Maine to help Reacher get answers.

episodes.name: Unfinished Business
episodes.overview: Reacher finally faces off with both Paulie and Quinn.

episodes.name: Episode 1
episodes.overview: Now at an NGO in Penamstan, Claire discovers signs reminiscent of Raccoon City. Leon makes his way to the White House, unaware that it's under attack.

episodes.name: Episode 2
episodes.overview: Leon, along with agents Jason and Shen May, embarks on a covert mission to infiltrate a research facility in Shanghai aboard a nuclear submarine.

episodes.name: Episode 3
episodes.overview: Claire discovers a grim scene at the home of one of the last surviving members of the Mad Dogs Unit. Shen May warns Leon about an ominous conspiracy.

episodes.name: Episode 4
episodes.overview: Secretary Wilson threatens Claire's life, demanding that she drop her investigation. Leon and Shen May rush to the vast subterranean bioweapons lab.

episodes.name: Pilot
episodes.overview: Rick moves in with his daughter's family and establishes himself as a bad influence on his grandson, Morty.

episodes.name: Lawnmower Dog
episodes.overview: Rick and Morty try to incept Morty's math teacher into giving Morty an 'A'.  Meanwhile, Rick gives Jerry a device to train their dog, Snuffles.

episodes.name: Anatomy Park
episodes.overview: Christmas day, Rick's friend, Reuben, comes over for his annual medical checkup.  Meanwhile Jerry learns his parents have a new friend.

episodes.name: M. Night Shaym-Aliens!
episodes.overview: Rick and Morty try to get to the bottom of a mystery in this M. Night Shyamalan style twistaroony of an episode!

episodes.name: Meeseeks and Destroy
episodes.overview: When Morty thinks Rick's adventures are too dangerous, he challenges Rick to let him lead one instead.

episodes.name: Rick Potion #9
episodes.overview: Rick provides Morty with a love potion to get his dream girl, only for the serum to backfire and create a living Cronenberg nightmare.

episodes.name: Raising Gazorpazorp
episodes.overview: Morty convinces Rick to buy him a sexy robot.  Later Rick and Summer spend some quality time together.

episodes.name: Rixty Minutes
episodes.overview: Rick hacks the cable box, but the family are distracted by another one of his inventions.

episodes.name: Something Ricked This Way Comes
episodes.overview: Rick battles the devil and upsets Summer. Meanwhile, Jerry and Morty hang out.

episodes.name: Close Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind
episodes.overview: Rick and Morty have a falling out when Rick is approached by some familiar associates.

episodes.name: Ricksy Business
episodes.overview: Beth and Jerry go away on a trip, so Rick decides to throw a party.

episodes.name: A Rickle in Time
episodes.overview: Rick, Morty, and Summer get into trouble when time is fractured by a feedback loop of uncertainty that split reality into more than one equally possible impossibilities. Meanwhile, Beth and Jerry go to extreme lengths to save a deer struck by their vehicle.

episodes.name: Mortynight Run
episodes.overview: Rick teaches Morty to drive while leaving Jerry at a popular day care made just for him. Morty's conscience has him hunt down an assassin rather than spending the day at an alien arcade.

episodes.name: Auto Erotic Assimilation
episodes.overview: Rick gets emotionally invested when meeting an old friend, while Beth and Jerry have a falling out after making a discovery under the garage.

episodes.name: Total Rickall
episodes.overview: Trapped inside the house with an ever-increasing number of parasitic alien shape-shifters capable of altering memories, an uncertain Rick and the Smiths search for a way to determine which of them are real.

episodes.name: Get Schwifty
episodes.overview: When a massive head descends into Earth's atmosphere, Rick and Morty must save the planet by coming up with a new hit song. Meanwhile, Jerry, Beth, and Summer become part of a new religion.

episodes.name: The Ricks Must Be Crazy
episodes.overview: Rick and Morty travel inside the car's battery, where Morty discovers Rick has created a universe containing sentient life solely to produce power for him. Meanwhile, Summer must deal with being locked in the car with Rick's overzealous security system.

episodes.name: Big Trouble in Little Sanchez
episodes.overview: Rick joins in on hijinks while Beth and Jerry sort out relationship issues.

episodes.name: Interdimensional Cable 2: Tempting Fate
episodes.overview: Jerry gets sick, and Rick sparks up the TV.

episodes.name: Look Who's Purging Now
episodes.overview: Morty makes a mistake and Jerry and Summer work on their father-daughter relationship.

episodes.name: The Wedding Squanchers
episodes.overview: The whole family makes mistakes.

episodes.name: The Rickshank Rickdemption
episodes.overview: The Smith family tries to cope without Rick, which is painful enough on its own without taking into consideration the stifling rules put into place by the Federation. Meanwhile Rick's past is finally revealed as he attempts to get out of his prison

episodes.name: Rickmancing the Stone
episodes.overview: Rick, Morty and Summer travel to a post-apocalyptic dimension and meet some dangerous enemies.

episodes.name: Pickle Rick
episodes.overview: It's family therapy time in this one broh. Classic stuff. Pickle Rick too.

episodes.name: Vindicators 3: The Return of Worldender
episodes.overview: Action and heroes.

episodes.name: The Whirly Dirly Conspiracy
episodes.overview: Rick and Jerry goes on an adventure while Beth fails as a mother and Summer has body issues.

episodes.name: Rest and Ricklaxation
episodes.overview: Rick and Morty need a break.

episodes.name: The Ricklantis Mixup
episodes.overview: Rick and Morty head to Atlantis. Meanwhile, the Citadel of Ricks undergoes major changes under new leadership.

episodes.name: Morty's Mind Blowers
episodes.overview: Morty's memories are restored and we learn the truth in this one broh.

episodes.name: The ABC's of Beth
episodes.overview: Jerry pulls in some lady in this one broh. Beth revisits her childhood.

episodes.name: The Rickchurian Mortydate
episodes.overview: Rick goes toe to toe with the President in this one broh.

episodes.name: Edge of Tomorty: Rick Die Rickpeat
episodes.overview: Morty goes nuts this time. Rick does stuff.

episodes.name: The Old Man and the Seat
episodes.overview: We all have one thing in common, broh. I don't know, broh. Watch this one.

episodes.name: One Crew Over the Crewcoo's Morty
episodes.overview: Lots of twists and turns this time, broh. Wear your helmets.

episodes.name: Claw and Hoarder: Special Ricktim's Morty
episodes.overview: Morty gets a dragon in this one, broh. It's a wild ride, broh.

episodes.name: Rattlestar Ricklactica
episodes.overview: Lots of things in space, broh. Snakes and sharp stuff. Watch this, broh.

episodes.name: Never Ricking Morty
episodes.overview: Choo choo, broh. Catch this train, broh.

episodes.name: Promortyus
episodes.overview: Get off my face, broh.

episodes.name: The Vat of Acid Episode
episodes.overview: The one with the acid vat, broh.

episodes.name: Pilot
episodes.overview: When a crisis at LAX prevents dozens of airplanes from landing, the government brings in a group of misfit geniuses to sort things out.

episodes.name: Single Point of Failure
episodes.overview: The governor calls on Team Scorpion when his daughter is mysteriously "bio-hacked" with a deadly virus and only has 24 hours to live. The case takes on a deeper significance for Walter after he receives a letter regarding his sister.

episodes.name: A Cyclone
episodes.overview: After failing a military training mission, the team members are determined to prove themselves when an Internet infrastructure is threatened by a bomber.

episodes.name: Shorthanded
episodes.overview: Against Cabe's advice, Team Scorpion heads to Las Vegas for a simple casino job, but a robbery leads to Walter's arrest and the rest of the team is left to clear his name.

episodes.name: Plutonium Is Forever
episodes.overview: To fix a Los Angeles nuclear reactor that's on the verge of a cataclysmic meltdown, Walter and the team must reluctantly enlist the help of a troubled former member.

episodes.name: True Colors
episodes.overview: The members of Team Scorpion must pass a mandated psych evaluation or face being disbanded after they're accused of destroying a priceless work of art in an attempt to protect an art exhibit. Paige enlists the help of the team when Ralph is reluctant to go to his school's Halloween party.

episodes.name: Father's Day
episodes.overview: A case gets personal for Team Scorpion when three convicts break out of prison and one of them is a brilliant hacker who was forced to help the others steal billions online. Meanwhile, Paige must manage Ralph's expectations when his father returns.

episodes.name: Risky Business
episodes.overview: Team Scorpion enlists the help of a musician who created a controversial algorithm that generates hit songs to help find the murderer of a music blogger.  Meanwhile, Drew asks Walter to help him connect with his son.

episodes.name: Rogue Element
episodes.overview: Team Scorpion try to protect Cabe's ex-wife, after she uncovers evidence that suggests foul play in the death of a prominent congressman.

episodes.name: Talismans
episodes.overview: When a military plane is shot down in Bosnia, Team Scorpion must help recover its stealth technology before it falls into enemy hands. Meanwhile, Walter's sister takes a break from her MS treatment and spends time at the garage with Sylvester

episodes.name: Revenge
episodes.overview: When Sylvester accidentally triggers an explosive device during an investigation, Team Scorpion must focus on finding who's responsible even while their friend's life hangs in the balance.

episodes.name: Dominoes
episodes.overview: On Christmas Eve, Team Scorpion races to find a way to save a young boy's life after he is trapped in a beachside cave and the rising tide threatens to drown him.

episodes.name: Kill Screen
episodes.overview: Team Scorpion must help Ralph when the FBI questions him after his dark web game play inadvertently reveals the location of a CIA safe house and results in the murder of CIA operatives.

episodes.name: Charades
episodes.overview: Team Scorpion is tasked with uncovering a mole inside the CIA who is being coerced into stealing deadly chemicals. Paige gives Walter a flirting lesson in preparation for the case.

episodes.name: Forget Me Nots
episodes.overview: Team Scorpion must jog the memory of an injured former Secret Service agent to prevent nuclear weapons from being launched. Meanwhile, Paige is torn when Drew suggests that moving to Maine might be the best for Ralph.

episodes.name: Love Boat
episodes.overview: Team Scorpion goes undercover on a cruise ship to locate and disable deadly stolen rockets. Meanwhile, as Valentine's Day approaches, Toby and Happy help Ralph, who is in the throes of his first crush.

episodes.name: Going South
episodes.overview: A tech billionaire hires Team Scorpion to rescue his kidnapped daughter. Meanwhile, some feelings get hurt when Walter gives an interview and fails to acknowledge the other members of the team.

episodes.name: Once Bitten, Twice Die
episodes.overview: When a conflict in Eastern Europe threatens to escalate, Team Scorpion is called on to help facilitate secret peace talks to prevent World War III.

episodes.name: Young Hearts Spark Fire
episodes.overview: While on a mission to save lost hikers, Team Scorpion’s helicopter crashes, igniting a massive wildfire that quickly closes in on them. Also, Sylvester must help their injured pilot who is unable to make it to safer ground.

episodes.name: Crossroads
episodes.overview: To protect a key witness who is en route to testifying against a deadly drug cartel, Team Scorpion takes her on the run, with the cartel hot on their heels.

episodes.name: Cliffhanger
episodes.overview: Walter finally learns Cabe’s long-kept secret regarding the Baghdad mission, and it threatens to tear Team Scorpion apart forever.  Also, Paige’s world is rocked when Ralph puts his life in danger to help the team.

episodes.name: Postcards from the Edge
episodes.overview: Scorpion, torn apart and uncertain about their future as a team, must come together for their most important mission yet – to save Walter’s life as his car teeters on the side of a cliff.

episodes.name: Satellite of Love
episodes.overview: The new Director of Homeland Security, Adriana Molina, reunites the team when a nuclear powered Russian satellite is knocked out of orbit and must be diverted before it detonates over Southern California. Paige and Walter face their feelings for each other when hospital footage reveals that Paige kissed him.

episodes.name: Cuba Libre
episodes.overview: Team Scorpion heads to Cuba when a woman from Cabe’s past pleads for him to help catch a Serbian war criminal.

episodes.name: Fish Filet
episodes.overview: Sylvester goes undercover in a federal prison in order to save the lives of three judges, but the team must help him escape when his life is threatened.

episodes.name: Robots
episodes.overview: Walter, Cabe and Happy are trapped with the crew in a top secret submarine when an explosion sends it to the bottom of the ocean with limited oxygen and a self-destruct function that will soon activate.

episodes.name: Super Fun Guys
episodes.overview: Team Scorpion goes undercover on the “Super Fun Guy” movie set in Kazakhstan in order to disable a soviet era nuclear missile being sold by terrorists.

episodes.name: Tech, Drugs, and Rock 'n Roll
episodes.overview: Walter’s attempt to “normalize” goes horribly wrong when a nefarious virus is uploaded to his computer, turning Team Scorpion’s new “smart” building project into a burning death trap with people locked inside.

episodes.name: Crazy Train
episodes.overview: Team Scorpion must stop a sabotaged runaway subway train with Paige and Ralph on board. Also, in his attempt to impress Happy, Toby has his first boxing match.

episodes.name: Area 51
episodes.overview: Team Scorpion helps the CIA locate a top-secret aircraft in Area 51 in order to raise money for Walter's research to save his sister's life.

episodes.name: US vs. UN vs. UK
episodes.overview: Team Scorpion is blackmailed to break into the United Nations to assist in the assassination of a menacing arms dealer. Also, Sylvester makes a bold move to protect Megan's wishes.

episodes.name: Arrivals and Departures
episodes.overview: When Team Scorpion and Walter's parents visit Megan in the hospital as her health deteriorates, they are quarantined after a deadly fungus outbreak threatens to infect everyone.

episodes.name: The Old College Try
episodes.overview: Team Scorpion goes undercover at a university to find a hacker who infiltrates the Federal Reserve and threatens to collapse the world economy.

episodes.name: Dam Breakthrough
episodes.overview: Team Scorpion must stop a catastrophe on Christmas Eve when heavy rain creates a large crack in a dam, putting an entire town in danger.

episodes.name: White Out
episodes.overview: The members of Team Scorpion brave subzero temperatures in Antarctica to save a United States Special Forces unit. Toby risks his life to save Happy.

episodes.name: Sun of a Gun
episodes.overview: Sylvester comes face to face with his estranged father, a retired general, who asks Team Scorpion for help when he believes that a dictator in Africa has uncovered a deadly World War II-era weapon of mass destruction and intends to use it.

episodes.name: Da Bomb
episodes.overview: Team Scorpion is tasked with helping NASA’s top secret rocket launch, but they must sabotage their own mission when Walter’s date from the previous night has a bomb strapped to her chest.

episodes.name: Fractured
episodes.overview: After a powerful earthquake rocks Los Angeles, Team Scorpion must fix a pinched gas line to prevent a massive explosion.

episodes.name: Adaptation
episodes.overview: While Team Scorpion works to stop an influx of drugs being smuggled into the country via drones, Walter gives Happy and Toby an ultimatum on their new relationship.

episodes.name: The Fast & the Nerdiest
episodes.overview: After Sylvester scores big on The Price Is Right, Team Scorpion must infiltrate a high-end car smuggling operation about to ship bioweapons to South America.

episodes.name: Ticker
episodes.overview: When Los Angeles’ blood supply is hacked and deemed unusable because of fear it’s been tainted, Team Scorpion must find the culprit in order to save a young girl in desperate need of a heart transplant.

episodes.name: Djibouti Call
episodes.overview: While on a secret mission in Djibouti, Africa, with his new Homeland protégé, Tim Armstrong, Cabe is captured and Team Scorpion must save him.

episodes.name: Twist and Shout
episodes.overview: Team Scorpion’s mission to recover the remains of fallen Marines in Vietnam is threatened along with their lives when a deadly tornado heads directly towards them.

episodes.name: Hard Knox
episodes.overview: Team Scorpion is hired by the Department of Defense to break into Fort Knox and “steal” a precious artifact in order to test their security, but they must break in a second time when they find something dangerous hidden inside the object.

episodes.name: Chernobyl Intentions
episodes.overview: Team Scorpion goes to Chernobyl to repair the decaying nuclear reactor before a catastrophic meltdown, but must also save Sylvester and Paige when they become trapped inside.

episodes.name: Toby or Not Toby
episodes.overview: Team Scorpion must outthink their unstable ex-Scorpion member, Mark Collins, after he kidnaps Toby and threatens to kill him unless his cunning demands are met.

episodes.name: Civil War
episodes.overview: The team members set aside their personal and romantic issues when hackers take over targeted U.S. military aircraft and war ships, pointing the weaponry at American cities.

episodes.name: More Civil War
episodes.overview: The team members set aside their personal and romantic issues when hackers take over targeted U.S. military aircraft and war ships, pointing the weaponry at American cities.

episodes.name: It Isn’t the Fall That Kills You
episodes.overview: When Walter is accidentally launched into space in a rocket, he hallucinates about Paige as his oxygen runs low, and Team Scorpion works feverishly to find a way to bring him home before he suffocates.

episodes.name: Little Boy Lost
episodes.overview: Team Scorpion must find a boy from Ralph’s class who goes missing on a field trip after he accidentally has a run-in with a deadly criminal. Also, Toby gets closer to finding out the identity of Happy’s husband.

episodes.name: Plight at the Museum
episodes.overview: Team Scorpion’s simple job at the Los Angeles Natural History Museum turns deadly when they discover thieves robbing a rare gem exhibit in order to get materials needed to enrich a nuclear bomb.

episodes.name: Bat Poop Crazy
episodes.overview: Before Halloween, Team Scorpion must infiltrate a deep, vast cave system in order to prevent a bat population from destroying the North America ecosystem. Also, the team dons costumes to stage photos from Halloween’s past for Walter’s upcoming immigration inspection.

episodes.name: We’re Gonna Need a Bigger Vote
episodes.overview: On Election Day, as democracy hangs in the balance, Team Scorpion is called on when someone tries to throw the U.S. presidential election into chaos.

episodes.name: Sly and the Family Stone
episodes.overview: When Team Scorpion travels to Ireland for Megan’s one-year memorial, Walter discovers that a nearby lake’s natural disaster has created a poisonous cloud that could kill everyone in the village. Also, Cabe and Toby try to alleviate the tension between Tim and Walter.

episodes.name: Mother Load
episodes.overview: Paige’s estranged mother calls on Team Scorpion when she accidentally uncovers a forgotten nuclear reactor on the verge of exploding.

episodes.name: This is the Pits
episodes.overview: Walter must swim through the deadly La Brea Tar Pits when Team Scorpion helps a woman trapped in the tar before she runs out of oxygen.

episodes.name: Wreck the Halls
episodes.overview: It’s Christmas Eve and Team Scorpion’s electronics-free mountain getaway turns deadly when they come across gun-runners, and Ralph is kidnapped when they try to escape.

episodes.name: Ice Ca-Cabes
episodes.overview: When a mission in the desert results in exploding shrapnel that seriously wounds Cabe, Team Scorpion must freeze his body in order to save his life.

episodes.name: Faux Money Maux Problems
episodes.overview: When Team Scorpion is duped into producing counterfeit money for a foreign entity intent on ruining the U.S. economy, Paige must rely on her mother Veronica’s skills as a grifter to save them.

episodes.name: The Hole Truth
episodes.overview: Team Scorpion must save a man teetering on the edge of a massive sink hole that threatens to destroy the Los Angeles water supply forever.

episodes.name: Sharknerdo
episodes.overview: Team Scorpion’s job to find sunken treasure goes awry when Walter and Paige’s boat explodes, leaving them lost in the middle of the Pacific Ocean surrounded by sharks.

episodes.name: Keep it in Check, Mate
episodes.overview: Walter and Sylvester enter an international chess competition under cover on foreign soil for Team Scorpion in order to extricate a U.S. spy before her identity is exposed.

episodes.name: Dirty Seeds, Done Dirt Cheap
episodes.overview: When a simple mission to protect a vital seed bank goes awry, Team Scorpion must save Happy, Sylvester and Cabe, who begin suffering from life-threatening, fear-based hallucinations.

episodes.name: Don't Burst My Bubble
episodes.overview: Following a severe storm, Happy’s friend Ada, who lives in a sterile bubble to protect her compromised immune system, is left with dangerous debris on the verge of puncturing the structure. Now, Team Scorpion works to safely move Ada to a more secure location without risking her life.

episodes.name: Monkey See, Monkey Poo
episodes.overview: To stop a dangerous virus from spreading, Team Scorpion must locate a rare endangered monkey in the Amazon that has the antibody for the cure. Also, Toby and Happy see a counselor to prepare for matrimony.

episodes.name: Broken Wind
episodes.overview: While on a mission to repair a turbine at a wind farm, Team Scorpion must race to save Paige and Happy before the cable holding the gondola they are in snaps and sends them plummeting to the ground.

episodes.name: Rock Block
episodes.overview: Team Scorpion must defy the orders of a foreign government after they retrieve an asteroid from space containing DNA strands that could have deadly consequences once exposed.

episodes.name: Strife on Mars
episodes.overview: Team Scorpion gets trapped inside a failing and dangerous biodome designed for Mars while trying to extract a pair of scientists inside.

episodes.name: Something Burrowed, Something Blew
episodes.overview: Team Scorpion help Toby and Happy race to the altar to say “I Do” after a simple job extinguishing a tunnel fire becomes catastrophic.

episodes.name: Maroon 8
episodes.overview: While en route to Toby and Happy’s honeymoon, Team Scorpion’s plane crash lands on a remote deserted island, leaving them all with little hope for rescue.

episodes.name: Scorp Family Robinson
episodes.overview: Three weeks after they crash land on a deserted island, tensions run high for Team Scorpion when they must battle to overcome their relationship obstacles with each other in order to be rescued.

episodes.name: Extinction
episodes.overview: Team Scorpion must work with their old nemesis Mark Collins in order to prevent the extinction of mankind. Also, Walter and Paige awkwardly navigate their new relationship.

episodes.name: More Extinction
episodes.overview: Team Scorpion continues to work with their nemesis, Mark Collins, in order to prevent an extinction event that could end humanity. Also, Cabe’s last-minute decision while on the case leads to the possible end of his career.

episodes.name: Grow a Deer, A Female Deer
episodes.overview: When poachers almost kill a pregnant endangered deer, Team Scorpion recreates the animal’s womb to try to save it and its baby’s life. Also, Happy and Toby discuss the future of their family.

episodes.name: Nuke Kids on the Block
episodes.overview: While decommissioning an old nuclear missile, a simple accident causes Team Scorpion to endure exposure to toxic vapor while trying to prevent the nuke from detonating. Also, Paige confronts Happy about constantly tagging along with her and Walter.

episodes.name: Sci Hard
episodes.overview: While attending a tech convention, Team Scorpion is taken hostage by a group attempting a virtual heist.

episodes.name: Queen Scary
episodes.overview: At Halloween, Team Scorpion takes on a case to prove the existence of ghosts on the Queen Mary but find an all-too-real disaster when they locate a “ghost ship” on a deadly collision course. Also, Walter considers taking note of Paige’s interests to benefit their relationship.

episodes.name: Go with the Flo(rence)
episodes.overview: While tracking a device that can prevent a nuclear meltdown through the Los Angeles sewers, Walter learns the nuances of listening and not offering advice to Paige. Also, Team Scorpion meets Florence, their new neighbor at the garage, after she sends a mix of smelly chemicals through their shared ventilation as a warning to keep the noise down.

episodes.name: Faire Is Foul
episodes.overview: For Sylvester’s birthday, Team Scorpion visits a renaissance festival, but the revelry is cut short when a group tries to rob a nearby police evidence locker. Also, Paige grows weary of Walter’s play-by-play of all the historical inaccuracies at the festival

episodes.name: It's Raining Men (Of War)
episodes.overview: On Thanksgiving, Team Scorpion's new neighbor, Florence, joins them at sea on a mission to destroy a floating island of trash, but her flawed contribution leaves her, Walter and Happy stranded on the quickly dissolving island. Also, Toby works with Cabe to uncover the details of his father's death that he has suppressed since he was a boy.

episodes.name: Crime Every Mountain
episodes.overview: As Cabe’s trial looms over Team Scorpion, a simple case goes sideways when they help a father and his daughter whose plane crashes nearby. Also, Paige helps Walter navigate his feelings about Cabe’s possible future in prison.

episodes.name: Who Let the Dog Out ('Cause Now It's Stuck in a Cistern)
episodes.overview: As Team Scorpion anxiously awaits the verdict of Cabe’s trial which could send him to prison, they focus their nervous energy on trying to save a dog stuck in a cistern.

episodes.name: A Christmas Car-Roll
episodes.overview: On Christmas Eve, when Walter chooses work over spending quality time with his friends, he falls down the stairs and hits his head, and as he lays unconscious, he enters a dream world where Team Scorpion never existed.

episodes.name: The Bunker Games
episodes.overview: Team Scorpion must work with Toby’s nemesis, Quincy Berkstead, and his wife, Amy, Toby’s ex-fiancée, when they are locked inside an artificially intelligent doomsday bunker that aims to kill them. Also, Walter is distracted by his recent dream where he is married to Florence, not Paige.

episodes.name: Lighthouse of the Rising Sun
episodes.overview: A solar storm knocks out power in Los Angeles, and Team Scorpion must help a teen pilot and his girlfriend who are lost over the Pacific without navigation or radio contact. Also, during the crisis, Walter must look after a group of Ralph’s classmates, and Cabe tries to tell Allie finally that he loves her.

episodes.name: Wave Goodbye
episodes.overview: Team Scorpion must prevent an incoming tsunami from hitting a vulnerable nuclear power facility, and Toby secretly helps his ex-fiancée retrieve her stolen identity.

episodes.name: Nerd, Wind and Fire
episodes.overview: On Valentine's Day, Team Scorpion must set aside their romantic plans to help a doctor and pilot trapped inside a helicopter that crashed atop a skyscraper. Also, Toby and Happy wait for news on their fertility results, and Sylvester realizes that he may have feelings for Florence.

episodes.name: Dumbster Fire
episodes.overview: The geniuses of Team Scorpion turn into knuckleheads and Paige must simplify the science for them, when their mental faculties are impaired during a job to prevent the creation of a black hole. Also, Florence and Sylvester grow closer when she helps him with a special project.

episodes.name: Dork Day Afternoon
episodes.overview: Team Scorpion inadvertently crashes a bank robbery in progress and is taken hostage. Also, Sylvester’s feelings for Florence grow.

episodes.name: Gator Done
episodes.overview: Team Scorpion heads to the bayou to track down a cagey alligator in order to stop a deadly mosquito-borne virus, and Paige teaches Walter the concept of the “white lie.” Also, Walter hits Cabe with a tranquilizer gun and Toby must save his life, and Sylvester and Ralph help Patty when the mean girls at her school force her to get a dreaded tardy slip.

episodes.name: Foul Balls
episodes.overview: Team Scorpion must use their high IQs to win a softball game when the homeland director challenges, with all of their future government contracts on the line. Also, Walter’s secret night out with Florence puts Toby and Happy on edge.

episodes.name: Kenny and the Jet
episodes.overview: Paige’s maternal side goes into high gear when Team Scorpion must save an unconscious, hypothermic boy stuck in the wheel well of their airborne airplane. Also, Walter’s white lie to Paige starts to take a toll on him, and Paige realizes something’s up.

episodes.name: A Lie in the Sand
episodes.overview: Team Scorpion heads to Northeast Africa where they must carefully navigate a minefield in order to save the lives of local villagers. Also, Paige and Walter’s relationship takes a shocking turn, and Toby and Happy make an important decision.

episodes.name: Dungeons & Dragons: The Queen's Cradle
episodes.overview: On the hunt for a dragon cult, a band of adventurers rescues a boy who's haunted by a sinister force.

episodes.name: Sifu: It Takes a Life
episodes.overview: A young martial artist bent on revenge learns the true cost of his obsession.

episodes.name: New World: The Once and Future King
episodes.overview: A conquering king washes ashore on a mysterious island with no army and no clue. He may need an eternity to find his purpose.

episodes.name: Unreal Tournament: Xan
episodes.overview: After revolting against their corporate overlords, a group of mining robots is condemned to fight for survival in deadly arena combat.

episodes.name: Warhammer 40,000: And They Shall Know No Fear
episodes.overview: In the grim darkness of the far future, a genetically-engineered warrior who has served on the front lines for centuries confronts his legacy, as his squad hunts down a mutant sorcerer.

episodes.name: PAC-MAN: Circle
episodes.overview: Trapped in a vast maze and pursued by ghosts, a mysterious entity summons a warrior to help it escape.

episodes.name: Crossfire: Good Conflict
episodes.overview: As a looming storm approaches, two rival mercenary groups collide. Driven by their vision of the greater good, the sides face off, their lives hanging in the balance.

episodes.name: Armored Core: Asset Management
episodes.overview: In a frostbitten frontier world, a legendary mech pilot learns his latest mission might hold the key to the demons that have haunted him for decades.

episodes.name: The Outer Worlds: The Company We Keep
episodes.overview: An orphan from a galactic backwater crosses the cosmos to take a job at a ruthless mega-corporation in the hopes of reuniting with the girl he loves.

episodes.name: Mega Man: Start
episodes.overview: As the corrupted creations of genius inventor Dr. Light rampage through Mega City, the humblest of his inventions dreams of fighting for everlasting peace.

episodes.name: Exodus: Odyssey
episodes.overview: A mechanic traverses the galactic frontier, racing against time in search of his runaway daughter.

episodes.name: Spelunky: Tally
episodes.overview: A pair of explorers ponder their purpose in a subterranean world where everything wants to kill them. Repeatedly.

episodes.name: Concord: Tale of the Implacable
episodes.overview: Captain Cassidy's crew of Freegunners is about to pull off the biggest heist of their lives – now there's only a deadly armada and a cosmos-sundering space storm between them and freedom.

episodes.name: Honor of Kings: The Way of All Things
episodes.overview: An orphaned prodigy challenges the all-knowing artificial intelligence that rules his city.

episodes.name: Playtime: Fulfillment
episodes.overview: Courier O is stuck in the endless drudgery of a point-chasing grind, but when a mysterious figure entrusts her with a strange package, O discovers that powerful people are determined to get their hands on it.

episodes.name: Episode 1
episodes.overview: Despite the ministrations of sex therapist mom Jean and encouragement from pal Eric, Otis worries that he can't get it on. He's not the only one.

episodes.name: Episode 2
episodes.overview: Egged on by Maeve—and finding that dispensing sex tips is tougher than he thought—Otis tries offering free advice at a classmate's house party.

episodes.name: Episode 3
episodes.overview: Otis' clinic achieves liftoff, as does his attraction to Maeve, who unexpectedly asks him for help. Eric swings off on his own and fields a come-on.

episodes.name: Episode 4
episodes.overview: Eric realizes Otis has fallen for Maeve. But the young sex therapist finds himself torn when hot guy Jackson seeks help with his secret crush.

episodes.name: Episode 5
episodes.overview: An explicit pic puts a mean girl on the spot. Maeve wants to track down the shaming culprit, forcing Otis to make a tough choice on an important day.

episodes.name: Episode 6
episodes.overview: Eric's trauma isolates him, and Maeve's essay wins a prize. Otis tries to hook up with Lily, but his deep-seated issues get in the way.

episodes.name: Episode 7
episodes.overview: The big dance brings out the best, and the drama, in Moordale's student body. Otis finds a date, Maeve gets her dress, and Eric returns with style.

episodes.name: Episode 8
episodes.overview: Otis feels violated by Jean's new book, and Maeve takes the fall for her brother. Eric serves detention with an old foe, while Lily's body betrays her.

episodes.name: Episode 1
