episodes.overview: Desperate to reset the way the world sees him, Officer Thorsen reluctantly decides to be a part of a reality show to help rebrand his image, only to be thrust back into yet another deadly situation. With cameras rolling, the show’s producer is found murdered and the team must investigate before Aaron is made suspect number one.

episodes.name: Coding
episodes.overview: Officer John Nolan and the team feel they must negotiate with a distraught man who is holding a hospital hostage to ensure his wife receives a lifesaving surgery.

episodes.name: Backstabbers
episodes.overview: After the robbery of a train filled with valuable auction items turns deadly, the team is called to investigate. Meanwhile, Officer Chen has doubts about being Sergeant Bradford’s aide and is upset when he doesn’t give her the recognition she deserves. Elsewhere, Officer Harper takes matters into her own hands and makes a life-changing decision about her personal life.

episodes.name: Simone
episodes.overview: Officer Nolan and the LA division of the FBI enlist the help of FBI trainee Simone Clark when one of her former students is suspected of terrorism following an explosion at a local power station.

episodes.name: Enervo
episodes.overview: The team alongside the LA Division of the FBI are in a race to stop bombs that have been scattered throughout the city by a suspected terrorist. Meanwhile, the joint task force is suspicious of the CIA’s involvement in the situation.

episodes.name: Mother's Day
episodes.overview: Sergeant Grey supports Officer Nolan’s desire to become a training officer and offers to ride with him for the day to get him ready. Meanwhile, Tim and Lucy must manage expectations in their respective relationships as they decide on their plans for Mother’s Day and a romantic vacation.

episodes.name: Day in the Hole
episodes.overview: Officer John Nolan is forced to spend a week in solitary confinement in a quiet border town with a young local officer who is in need of some training. Meanwhile, Sergeant Bradford and Officer Chen discover that looks are deceiving and go undercover together in a possible drug trafficking case.

episodes.name: Double Down
episodes.overview: Officer John Nolan is once again face-to-face with serial killer Rosalind, and she wants him to know she's not done with him yet. Meanwhile, officers Bradford and Chen work undercover with Detective Lopez and the Las Vegas Police Department to arrest leaders of a major criminal enterprise.

episodes.name: Labor Day
episodes.overview: Officer John Nolan is moving closer to his new role as a training officer. In preparation, he is tasked with overseeing Officer Aaron Thorson and must uncover the truth about another officer’s suicide. Meanwhile, Lucy’s successful undercover assignment earns her an invitation for specialized training in Sacramento and she must decide if this is the path she wants to take.

episodes.name: Dye Hard
episodes.overview: Officer John Nolan is assigned his first rookie, Officer Celina Juarez, whose unconventional approach to police work poses a unique challenge for him.

episodes.name: The Choice (I)
episodes.overview:
Rosalind returns with a vengeance and Bailey’s life is left hanging in the balance. With a ticking clock, the LAPD and the FBI join forces, and Officer John Nolan is forced to make a deadly decision after a harrowing ultimatum.

The crossover continues on The Rookie: Feds S01E04 To Die For (II).

episodes.name: The Fugitive
episodes.overview: Officer John Nolan and Officer Celina Juarez are on the hunt for a fugitive after a car incident goes awry. Meanwhile, a past injury comes to haunt Tim and Lucy comes through during his time in need in more ways than one.

episodes.name: The Reckoning
episodes.overview: Officer John Nolan and a sleep-deprived Celina investigate a cash deposit linked to an old DEA case. Meanwhile, Wesley grows increasingly concerned about his deposition and is shocked when he realizes Elijah’s attorney is a familiar face from his past.

episodes.name: Crossfire
episodes.overview: Officer John Nolan and Celina witness a shooting, realize the victim was already dead, and investigate further. Back at home, Bailey has been feeling off-center ever since the proposal, leaving Nolan to wonder what he can do to make her feel more comfortable. Elsewhere, Lopez and Harper enlist Lucy’s help to investigate the gang-related murder of a local shopkeeper.

episodes.name: The Collar
episodes.overview: Officers John Nolan and Celina Juarez are in a race against time to stop the source of an explosive rampage.

episodes.name: Take Back
episodes.overview: Officer John Nolan and the team investigate the unexpected death of a suspect in police custody. Their search also uncovers a very delicate loose end that could jeopardize Officer Celina Juarez's career. Meanwhile, Sergeant Grey and his wife, Luna, go to New York to visit their daughter, Dominique, only to realize she never made it home from the night before.

episodes.name: The List (I)
episodes.overview:
Detective Nyla Harper and James find themselves in the middle of a bank robbery which leads the entire team on a citywide manhunt. Meanwhile, Tim and Lucy finally go on their first date, but it does have a few complications.

The crossover continues on The Rookie: Feds S01E10 The Silent Prisoner (II).

episodes.name: The Naked and the Dead
episodes.overview: The search for a missing boy leads the team into the middle of a dangerous drug war between two rival gangs.

episodes.name: Death Notice
episodes.overview: Nolan and Celina must stand guard at a hospital after a dangerous prisoner needs surgery. Aaron, Lopez and Harper look into a string of robberies. Tim and Lucy consider how their secret relationship will affect their work. Lopez gets unexpected news.

episodes.name: Daddy Cop
episodes.overview: In the midst of a heatwave and a citywide blackout, Officer John Nolan and Aaron follow increasingly large leads after they discover criminals hiding at the station. While on duty, Officer Chen makes an alarming discovery after being called to a scene where a pungent smell has wreaked havoc. Meanwhile, Lucy and Harper scheme to get Tim out of his new job and into a more exciting position.

episodes.name: Death Sentence
episodes.overview: Officer John Nolan and Bailey are on the hunt for a mystery gunman after a shooting hits a little too close to home. Meanwhile, Aaron struggles to live within his means and joins Lucy to help Tamara when the mother of a child she babysits goes missing. Elsewhere, Wesley suspects that a judge is taking bribes after he excludes valuable eyewitness testimony from a case.

episodes.name: The Con
episodes.overview: With help from the FBI, Detective Lopez puts everything on the line to help Elijah Stone take down a gang leader in exchange for her safety. Meanwhile, Nolan and Bailey must deal with the secrets and shady dealings his late mother left behind.

episodes.name: Exposed
episodes.overview: The team must stop a militia from detonating a highly combustible truck in their possession. Meanwhile, Officers Nolan, Thorson, Juarez and Detective Harper search for three men who may have been exposed to Ebola and detain them for quarantine.

episodes.name: The Enemy Within (I)
episodes.overview:
Now that Elijah and Abril have become allies, the team must rely on Monica, Elijah’s lawyer, to uncover their plans. Meanwhile, Officers Nolan and Juarez reopen her sister’s case and discover a discrepancy that leads them on a new trail.

The crossover continues on The Rookie: Feds S01E17 Payback (II).

episodes.name: Double Trouble
episodes.overview: When Dim goes missing, Officer Chen and Sergeant Bradford, along with the CIA, set out to find him and enlist the help of Juicy.

episodes.name: A Hole in the World
episodes.overview: The team investigates a pattern of kidnappings which leads them to a discovery that hits close to home with one of their own. Meanwhile, Lucy and Tim’s relationship is put to the test as they begin to feel the hard hours of their jobs.

episodes.name: S.T.R.
episodes.overview: Officer Tim Bradford’s ex-wife returns and asks the team to help her save someone from her undercover past. Isabel’s return also creates additional pressure in Lucy and Tim’s relationship as they assist in the search.

episodes.name: Going Under (I)
episodes.overview:
Officer Lucy Chen goes undercover to infiltrate an illegal firearm operation, and Detective Harper and Officer John Nolan work together to solve a mystery involving severed limbs found around the city.

The crossover continues on The Rookie: Feds S01E21 Bloodline (II).

episodes.name: Under Siege
episodes.overview: After one of their own is shot, the team suffers a series of close calls and realizes their division may be a target for a group of masked assailants.

episodes.name: Strike Back
episodes.overview: In the aftermath of the assaults, the team must now try to understand why they were targeted and if there is a bigger plan in place. Meanwhile, Nolan must survive his last shift before his wedding to Bailey.

episodes.name: The Hammer
episodes.overview: The team comes together to celebrate John and Bailey’s wedding; meanwhile, Celina discovers a discrepancy in her case, leading to a new discovery. Elsewhere, Lucy and Tim’s relationship is put to the test.

episodes.name: Trouble in Paradise
episodes.overview: Nolan and Bailey’s honeymoon is more of a nightmare than a dream when it turns into an active crime scene. Meanwhile, Tim and Celina partner up and must uncover the identity of John Doe.

episodes.name: Training Day
episodes.overview: It's Officer Aaron Thorsen's first day back since the assault, and he's tasked with a series of high-stress cases to determine whether he's ready to work. Elsewhere, the team investigates a homicide case with a potential tie to the pentagram killer.

episodes.name: The Vow
episodes.overview: When a toddler is found at the scene of a crime, John and Bailey must decide whether to let the child go to a shelter for the night or care for her themselves. Meanwhile, when someone from his past returns, Tim disappears and leaves Lucy in the dark.

episodes.name: Secrets and Lies
episodes.overview: Following their time as foster parents, Bailey has decided she wants to have a baby and forces John to reconsider their decision to not have children. Meanwhile, John and Celina discover a prison escapee whom they fear is out for revenge and race to find her before it is too late.

episodes.name: Crushed
episodes.overview: When two teenagers go missing, it is up to the entire team to find the girls and uncover the truth about their disappearance. Meanwhile, Lopez and Harper are on a different kind of investigation – the search for the perfect nanny.

episodes.name: Punch Card
episodes.overview: After a mafia-related mass casualty, the team is tasked to keep the peace at the hospital. Lucy and Celina work together to investigate the suspects behind the attack. Meanwhile, Tim and Aaron embark on a metro ops mission.

episodes.name: The Squeeze
episodes.overview: Officer Nolan and Celina take on a special case; meanwhile, Monica enlists help to identify her attackers. Elsewhere, Lopez and Harper discover a connection to the trail of crimes.

episodes.name: Escape Plan
episodes.overview: Sgt. Grey helps the team prepare for their biggest mission yet. Meanwhile, Aaron, Lopez, Celina, Tim and Smitty discover a surprising connection in their case.

episodes.name: The Shot
episodes.overview: Now recovering from a gunshot wound and feeling the effects of his age, John and the team welcome two new rookies and continue the hunt for two dangerous inmates with very personal vendettas following their prison escape.

episodes.name: The Watcher
episodes.overview: The team is tasked with community policing while hunting for a local vigilante. Meanwhile, Celina’s instincts are tested, and Tim and Lucy discover secrets about the two new rookies.

episodes.name: Out of Pocket
episodes.overview: Ahead of Bailey's return home, John looks for clues to locate Jason Wyler. Then, Tim and Lucy swap rookies; a friendly face resurfaces at the station, and Wesley feels unsettled over Angela.

episodes.name: Darkness Falling
episodes.overview: Following his stint at the LAPD, Wesley returns to the district attorney's office where his past connects him to the team's investigation. Meanwhile, Bailey and John have conflicting feelings over safety, while Lucy grows suspicious of Seth.

episodes.name: Til Death
episodes.overview: The team searches for a serial killer as Nyla struggles with the aftermath following the attack. Lucy’s relationship with Seth takes a turn, while Bailey battles her fear of Jason Wyler.

episodes.name: The Gala
episodes.overview: It’s Valentine’s Day, and Lieutenant Grey gives Tim and Lucy an unromantic assignment, while John and Celina track down a missing girl. Later, the team sharpens up for a charity gala where multiple relationships come to a head.

episodes.name: The Mickey
episodes.overview: On Celina's last day as a rookie, John gives her one final test. Meanwhile, Bailey makes a new friend, and Lucy places her faith in Seth for an undercover assignment.

episodes.name: Wildfire
episodes.overview: Nyla remains suspicious of Liam Glasser as a wildfire erupts, causing chaos in the city. Meanwhile, James tries to help a friend, and Seth makes a costly mistake, putting two of their own in danger.

episodes.name: The Kiss
episodes.overview: The team mobilizes to locate a suspect after a deadly series of events affects one of their own. Meanwhile, Celina takes on her first case with Bailey's help.

episodes.name: Chaos Agent
episodes.overview: John, Lucy and Angela investigate the suspicious stabbing of three teenage girls. Back at the station, the team experiences technical difficulties while managing a group of prisoners and a wild animal.

episodes.name: Speed
episodes.overview: John and Celina find themselves in a hostage situation while undercover for a public safety initiative. While Angela and Nyla investigate the suspects, Tim challenges Lucy’s decision-making skills.

episodes.name: April Fools
episodes.overview: An April Fools' prank on LAPD’s social media leads to citywide chaos. Meanwhile, John's T.O. skills are tested, Wesley is assigned a challenging case, and Tim and Lucy play a joke on the team.

episodes.name: Three Billboards
episodes.overview: When anti-LAPD billboards emerge throughout the city, the team searches for who's responsible. Meanwhile, a car bombing prompts an investigation, Miles reconnects with an old friend, and John and Bailey assess their ability to adopt.

episodes.name: Mad About Murder
episodes.overview: Tim receives a strange message, launching a larger investigation into the dark web. Meanwhile, Celina works to take down a popular podcast, and Miles helps update the department’s training videos.

episodes.name: A Deadly Secret
episodes.overview: Documentary filmmakers interview the LAPD on a complicated missing person's case connected to John.

episodes.name: The Return
episodes.overview: The team has mixed feelings when a familiar face returns hoping to prove himself. Meanwhile, an influencer gets his fans to come after Wesley, and Tim supports Lucy as she prepares for the sergeant's exam.

episodes.name: Mutiny and the Bounty
episodes.overview: The team helps Skip Tracer Randy when his new love interest is kidnapped. Meanwhile, Angela and Nyla enlist their moms to help catch a con artist, and Wesley is threatened to drop a case.

episodes.name: The Good, the Bad, and the Oscar
episodes.overview: John and Harper work together to catch Oscar. Angela investigates a bank robbery. Lucy and Tim learn to adapt to her new schedule, and Miles' first date takes an unexpected turn.

episodes.name: Czech Mate
episodes.overview: The LAPD, FBI and Interpol work with Monica Stevens in Prague to target high-value terrorists operating within and outside the United States.

episodes.name: Fast Andy
episodes.overview: When the president visits Los Angeles, the LAPD teams up with the Secret Service to ensure his safety and assess any major threats on their watch list. Meanwhile, Miles's instincts are tested, and Tim takes on a new role.

episodes.name: The Red Place
episodes.overview: Nolan makes a quiet arrest, and Lucy and Celina race to rescue a kidnapping victim. Meanwhile, Harper and Lopez help outsmart a killer, and Miles visits a familiar face.

episodes.name: Cut and Run
episodes.overview: While out in the city, Nolan and Bailey witness a murder in public and immediately spring into action in the hopes of finding the person responsible. Meanwhile, Angela and Wesley have a big life decision that may affect their future.

episodes.name: The Network
episodes.overview: Lieutenant Grey and the FBI task force enlist the help of an old colleague to uncover a criminal network. Nolan, Miles, Lucy, and Celina respond to a mysterious officer-involved shooting.

episodes.name: Burn 4 Love
episodes.overview: It's Valentine's Day, and the team is on the hunt for someone who is setting more than hearts on fire. Meanwhile, Celina thinks Miles' recent string of bad luck is the result of a curse, and she's determined to break it.

episodes.name: Baja
episodes.overview: Harper and Lucy go undercover in Baja while investigating the murder of two young women. Back in LA, Bradford and the FBI task force assist in the investigation, while Nolan and Bailey navigate their long-distance relationship.

episodes.name: Grand Theft Aircraft
episodes.overview: Nolan and Garza lead a high-stakes operation that quickly goes south. Lucy and Tim navigate their relationship when an unexpected visitor shows up. Meanwhile, the team conducts a citywide search for a suspect.

episodes.name: Fun and Games
episodes.overview: Harper and Miles feel the weight of their recent mistakes, while Harper is tasked with training Miles. Nolan and Celina are dispatched to a robbery call where Nolan encounters a familiar face.

episodes.name: His Name Was Martin
episodes.overview: Nolan, Harper and Miles face a dangerous situation when a routine check takes a sudden turn. Meanwhile, Bailey conducts a covert investigation at the Pentagon at the request of Lt. Grey.

episodes.name: Aftermath
episodes.overview: Lucy returns to work in the aftermath of the attack. Meanwhile, an unexpected twist hinders the Liam Glasser case, and a familiar face helps the team track down a killer.

episodes.name: Spy Games
episodes.overview: The FBI and LAPD join forces on a covert sting operation to protect Bailey, while Wesley and Angela face tensions in their marriage when his campaign is threatened by a public scandal.

episodes.name: The Thinker
episodes.overview: Bailey gets a new role, and a ride-along with Nolan goes awry. Meanwhile, the team looks to recruit new members.

episodes.name: Tiger Bear
episodes.overview: A troubling incident at a school draws the team into a complex case, while Celina's temporary missing persons assignment leads her into a dangerous situation.

episodes.name: Survive the Streets
episodes.overview: The team works together after Nolan and Celina discover a possible suicide that spirals into conspiracy.

episodes.name: Out of Time
episodes.overview: Nolan is put to the test when he's forced to protect a man he doesn't trust. Meanwhile, Lucy and Celina follow a promising lead, and Lopez finds herself conflicted about Wesley's new position.

episodes.name: Dead Ringer
episodes.overview: Nolan and Harper try to help a desperate mother protect her child, while Lt. Grey and Garza continue to work with Monica despite their misgivings.

episodes.name: The Bandit
episodes.overview: The team launches a high-stakes search to take down a notorious criminal. Meanwhile, Lucy's leadership is tested, Wesley tests the boundaries of his friendships, and Nolan tries to balance duty and family.

episodes.name: Sleep of the Just
episodes.overview: While searching for an escaped nightmare in the waking world, Morpheus falls prey to Roderick Burgess, an occultist looking to summon and imprison Death.

episodes.name: Imperfect Hosts
episodes.overview: Morpheus begins his quest to find his tools of power — his sand, ruby and helm — by paying a visit to a pair of notoriously dysfunctional brothers.

episodes.name: Dream a Little Dream of Me
episodes.overview: Morpheus tracks down the last-known person in possession of his sand — and receives an unexpected lesson on humanity. Ethel pays a visit to her son.

episodes.name: A Hope in Hell
episodes.overview: A lead on the whereabouts of his helm compels Morpheus to seek an audience with Lucifer. A confused John receives a helping hand from a good Samaritan.
With Morpheus caught off guard, John settles in at a diner to watch the people around him — and put his theory about truth and lies to a terrifying test.

episodes.name: The Sound of Her Wings
episodes.overview: Feeling a bit rudderless, Morpheus shadows his hard-working big sister, who offers him advice and encourages him to reconnect with an old acquaintance.

episodes.name: The Doll's House
episodes.overview: Lucienne comes to Morpheus with disturbing news. Rose Walker goes in search of family. Admirers of the Corinthian's work scheme to get his attention.

episodes.name: Playing House
episodes.overview: As Morpheus closes in on one of his missing creations, Rose ramps up efforts to locate her brother — and unwittingly makes a friend's dream come true.

episodes.name: Collectors
episodes.overview: Odd disturbances shake up The Dreaming, Rose sets out on a road trip with a new friend, and The Corinthian arrives with a guest at a creepy convention.

episodes.name: Lost Hearts
episodes.overview: As the Dream vortex grows more powerful and the walls between the realms weaken, Rose must make a difficult choice. Morpheus confronts The Corinthian.

episodes.name: Dream of a Thousand Cats/Calliope
episodes.overview: In this two-part story collection, a Siamese cat dreaming of a new world and a writer in desperate need of inspiration cross paths with Morpheus.

episodes.name: Season of Mists
episodes.overview: When a gathering of the Endless exposes deep-seated grievances, Morpheus embarks on a mission to Hell to free the soul of a condemned mortal.

episodes.name: The Ruler of Hell
episodes.overview: Bequeathed the key to Hell, Morpheus throws a lavish banquet to determine which god, demon or faerie can be entrusted with its dark power.

episodes.name: More Devils Than Vast Hell Can Hold
episodes.overview: All the world's a stage as Morpheus summons history's greatest dramatist to perform an enchanting play for a supernatural audience.

episodes.name: Brief Lives
episodes.overview: Morpheus grudgingly helps Delirium search for their vanished sibling in the waking world — where a deadly force lurks in the shadows.

episodes.name: The Song of Orpheus
episodes.overview: To honor a promise to one sibling, Morpheus must shatter a vow to another. In ancient Greece, a wedding-night tragedy turns a son against his father.

episodes.name: Family Blood
episodes.overview: Morpheus enlists an expert in the occult to smuggle a deeply personal relic out of Paris — and help him and Delirium find the answers they seek.

episodes.name: Time and Night
episodes.overview: With the future of his realm at stake, Morpheus must appeal for help to an authority even greater than the Endless.

episodes.name: Fuel for the Fire
episodes.overview: Morpheus recruits a mortal agent for a dangerous mission in the waking world. A change of heart puts a pair of tricksters on a collision course.

episodes.name: The Kindly Ones
episodes.overview: Confined to his realm, Morpheus conjures up a new nightmare to do his bidding. The God of Deception deals roughly with an intrusive thorn in his side.

episodes.name: Long Live the King
episodes.overview: Fueled by rage, a grieving mother unleashes her wrath upon the Dreaming, as Morpheus confronts the Kindly Ones at the furthest reaches of his kingdom.

episodes.name: A Tale of Graceful Ends
episodes.overview: As deities, dreamers and demons unite to mark a momentous occasion, the Endless assemble for a family reunion unlike any other.

episodes.name: A Special Episode - Death: The High Cost of Living
episodes.overview: In this standalone episode, a journalist overwhelmed by hopelessness has a life-altering 24 hours after crossing paths with Death on her day off.

episodes.name: The Engram
episodes.overview: In the wake of a disastrous mission overseas, Navy SEAL Commander James Reece returns home with conflicting memories of the op and questions about his own culpability.

episodes.name: Encoding
episodes.overview: Reece locks onto his first potential target, enlisting Ben's help. With his mental health in question, Katie and Reece strike up an uneasy but mutually beneficial partnership to find answers.

episodes.name: Consolidation
episodes.overview: Reece is drawn deeper into a complex conspiracy and puts a new name on his list. Meanwhile, Secretary of Defense Lorraine Hartley announces a drastic policy overhaul to help Special Operators. And Katie discovers the truth of what's going on in Reece's head.

episodes.name: Detachment
episodes.overview: With the help of his closest friends, Reece travels to Mexico to locate the triggerman who killed his family. Katie continues her research from a remote location. Steve Horn takes steps to preserve Capstone's deals, and the San Diego FBI Fugitive Task Force led by Tony Layun enters the fray in pursuit for rogue SEAL James Reece.

episodes.name: Disruption
episodes.overview: Reece travels to San Francisco to seek answers on a drug that may have started this all. Katie attempts to turn Mike Tedesco in an effort to blow up Capstone's plans for Nubellum. Tony and his team stick close to Horn, hoping to intercept Reece before he kills his next target.

episodes.name: Transience
episodes.overview: The FBI's manhunt intensifies as they close in on Reece. Without the medications, Reece's physical and mental symptoms escalate. Surrounded by law enforcement, a man hellbent on his mission must escape without taking innocent lives.

episodes.name: Extinction
episodes.overview: Reece returns to Coronado to bring the hammer down on the people who betrayed him the most. Back within the walls of his family home, fragmented memories surface. Katie plays ball with the FBI in order to finish her story.

episodes.name: Reclamation
episodes.overview: A showdown brews at Secretary of Defense Hartley's Orcas Island estate as Reece, Katie, Ben and Tony's paths and objectives collide.

episodes.name: "INHERENT RESOLVE"
episodes.overview: In 2015, Navy SEAL Chief Ben Edwards and Charlie Platoon wrap up their Mosul deployment, handing operations over to James Reece's Alpha Platoon. Before heading home, Ben and his team track an ISIS leader who targeted his IF interpreter-only to discover the terrorist has powerful, unexpected connections.

episodes.name: "THE AUDITION"
episodes.overview: Al-Jabouri's allies retaliate against Ben Edwards and Raife Hastings for their rogue raid, but a well-timed job offer from an old spymaster could solve all of Ben's problems.

episodes.name: "WHAT'S PAST IS PROLOGUE"
episodes.overview: Haverford's capture/kill of Danawi reveals a new lead—who was he meeting and why? Tracking his money, Ben and Raife team up with unexpected allies, forming a 'sanction team' that soon faces a far greater threat than anticipated.

episodes.name: "THE SOUND OF GUNS"
episodes.overview: As pressure builds to stop the Khalid Network's delivery of Molnar's bearings, Ben's team begins to crack. In Geneva, Haverford's Iranian asset struggles to juggle family, country, and a double life working with U.S. intelligence.

episodes.name: "E & E"
episodes.overview: Alone and hunted, Ben pursues his betrayer. Raife interrogates a Khalid Network captive, unleashing his own 'dark wolf' for answers. Meanwhile, Tal moves solo to advance Mossad's true mission.

episodes.name: "PAWNS & KINGS"
episodes.overview: Ben rejoins the team, finding answers that defy belief. In the murky world of black ops, clarity is rare-something Raife refuses to accept, widening the rift between Lieutenant and Chief. Ben must embrace the gray to stop a war.

episodes.name: "THE WOLF YOU FEED"
episodes.overview: Three months after the airfield exchange, Ben lives off-grid in Germany's Black Forest, ready to sever ties to his old life and avenge those lost in Haverford's spy game.

episodes.name: Days Gone Bye
episodes.overview: Rick searches for his family after emerging from a coma into a world terrorized by the walking dead. Morgan and Duane, whom he meets along the way, help teach Rick the new rules for survival.

episodes.name: Guts
episodes.overview: Rick unknowingly causes a group of survivors to be trapped by walkers. The group dynamic devolves from accusations to violence, as Rick must confront an enemy far more dangerous than the undead.

episodes.name: Tell It to the Frogs
episodes.overview: Rick makes a decision to go back to Atlanta to retrieve the bag of guns and save a man's life. Lori and Shane must deal with the surprising return of someone they thought was dead.

episodes.name: Vatos
episodes.overview: Rick's mission to Atlanta is jeopardized when things go awry. Jim becomes unhinged in camp.

episodes.name: Wildfire
episodes.overview: Rick leads the group to the CDC after the attack. Jim must make a terrible life and death decision.

episodes.name: TS-19
episodes.overview: Rick and the group are allowed into the CDC by a strange doctor, but all is not what it seems in their newfound haven.

episodes.name: What Lies Ahead
episodes.overview: Rick leads the group out of Atlanta. On the highway, they are stopped by a threat unlike anything they have seen before. The group searches for someone who has gone missing.

episodes.name: Bloodletting
episodes.overview: Coming to the aid of another, Rick discovers a possible safe haven. Shane must go on a dangerous mission to get badly-needed medical supplies.

episodes.name: Save the Last One
episodes.overview: The group desperately awaits Shane's return. Shane finds himself trapped in a school, surrounded by the undead. Daryl and Andrea search for someone in the woods.

episodes.name: Cherokee Rose
episodes.overview: Shane makes a deadly sacrifice which leads to unusual behavior and self-distancing. The rest of the group tries to hang on somewhere between living to die and dying to live.

episodes.name: Chupacabra
episodes.overview: Glenn, the only one breaking barriers between both groups, knows far too much for his comfort level. Daryl finds a sign of life and, in his delirium, tries to make it back to the farm alive.

episodes.name: Secrets
episodes.overview: Secrets are told and secrets are revealed. Hershel refuses to acknowledge the world’s new reality. Andrea comes out of her shell. Everyone is becoming more and more aware that “everything is food for something.”

episodes.name: Pretty Much Dead Already
episodes.overview: Hershel sets a deadline. All secrets are out in the open. Glenn stands up for himself and Shane takes charge.

episodes.name: Nebraska
episodes.overview: Rick and the others try to restore order in the aftermath of a terrible discovery. Hershel takes up an old habit and disappears, Rick and Glenn must follow him into town.

episodes.name: Triggerfinger
episodes.overview: Trapped, Rick, Hershel and Glenn fight to survive against new foes, both dead and alive. Shane finds Lori in danger on the road and makes it his mission to bring her back to the farm.

episodes.name: 18 Miles Out
episodes.overview: Rick and Shane are in conflict over the fate of an outsider; Andrea helps Hershel's daughter face a crucial decision.

episodes.name: Judge, Jury, Executioner
episodes.overview: Rick sides with Shane on an important decision, causing Dale to worry that the group is losing its humanity. Carl's actions have unintended consequences on the group.

episodes.name: Better Angels
episodes.overview: The group learns that someone dangerous may be on the loose near the farm. As night falls, Rick, Shane, Daryl, and Glenn comb the woods to handle the situation and keep the group safe.

episodes.name: Beside the Dying Fire
episodes.overview: Rick and Carl return from the woods to find the farm in jeopardy. The group is split up in the ensuing chaos. With things looking grim, Rick's leadership is questioned.

episodes.name: Seed
episodes.overview: With the world growing increasingly more dangerous and Lori’s pregnancy advancing, Rick discovers a potentially safe haven. But first he must secure the premises, pushing his group to its limit.

episodes.name: Sick
episodes.overview: After a traumatic event, a life hangs in the balance. Complicating matters, the group must also deal with a potential threat to their new surroundings.

episodes.name: Walk with Me
episodes.overview: After witnessing an accident, Andrea and Michonne are introduced to a new community of survivors. As conflicts arise with their new acquaintances, a decision must be made.

episodes.name: Killer Within
episodes.overview: The group is severed and lives are put in jeopardy. In Woodbury, Merle has a request for the Governor.

episodes.name: Say the Word
episodes.overview: After another loss, Rick struggles. Michonne remains suspicious of the Governor as he throws a party with a unique twist for the people of Woodbury.

episodes.name: Hounded
episodes.overview: As Andrea grows closer to the Governor, Michonne makes a decision about Woodbury. Glenn and Maggie go on a run. Rick struggles.

episodes.name: When the Dead Come Knocking
episodes.overview: The Governor presses for information. A new guest arrives at the prison, forcing Rick's hand.

episodes.name: Made to Suffer
episodes.overview: Andrea steps up as the people of Woodbury are thrown into uncharted territory. At the prison, a new threat arises.

episodes.name: The Suicide King
episodes.overview: Rick tries to rescue a member of his group. Woodbury is in disarray after a recent attack. New guests raise concerns at the prison.

episodes.name: Home
episodes.overview: As the group debates their next course of action, Rick wanders after a lost friend. Daryl and Merle question their choices. The Governor restores order in Woodbury and makes plans to punish those responsible.

episodes.name: I Ain't a Judas
episodes.overview: Rick and the group must make a choice when security is threatened. With Woodbury in a police state, Andrea grows uneasy.

episodes.name: Clear
episodes.overview: Realizing they are heavily outgunned against the Governor's forces, Rick leads an expedition to get more weapons.

episodes.name: Arrow on the Doorpost
episodes.overview: In an effort to prevent any more deaths, Rick and the Governor meet to come up with a peace treaty.

episodes.name: Prey
episodes.overview: The Governor chases a dissenter who fled Woodbury. While the Governor is gone, a traitor tries to sabotage his upcoming plans.

episodes.name: This Sorrowful Life
episodes.overview: Rick and the group are faced with a serious problem. If they want a truce with the Governor, they will have to make a huge sacrifice.

episodes.name: Welcome to the Tombs
episodes.overview: Rick and the group have to seriously consider if the prison is worth defending as the Governor's impending attack looms over their heads.

episodes.name: 30 Days Without an Accident
episodes.overview: Rick and the group are as close to an ideal life as possible at the prison. Will they be able to hold on to humanity in the face of a new evil?

episodes.name: Infected
episodes.overview: As the group faces a brand new enemy, Rick and the others must fight to protect the livelihood they worked so hard to create at the prison.

episodes.name: Isolation
episodes.overview: As one group leaves the prison in search for supplies at a local college, those who stay must deal with recent losses while preserving what remains.

episodes.name: Indifference
episodes.overview: While on a supplies mission to a local college, members of the group run into multiple hurdles. Things at the prison are getting worse.

episodes.name: Internment
episodes.overview: Multiple enemies put pressure on Rick and the group. Could this finally be the breaking point for the survivors and the prison?

episodes.name: Live Bait
episodes.overview: A familiar face returns as each member of the group struggles to find his or her humanity in a world of constant threats.

episodes.name: Dead Weight
episodes.overview: A new and scary chapter is unfolding at a camp outside the prison. Will peace be attainable with the addition of new members?

episodes.name: Too Far Gone
episodes.overview: Just when everything started to calm down at the prison, Rick and his group now face imminent danger and destruction. This time, they might not win.

episodes.name: After
episodes.overview: As Rick deals with old wounds, members of the prison have to come to terms with their new environment and ask themselves if survival alone is enough.

episodes.name: Inmates
episodes.overview: The group encounters many obstacles in their quest to find stability and safety, but sometimes all they have to guide them is hope.

episodes.name: Claimed
episodes.overview: Just when Rick thinks he's going to be able to relax, he's faced with multiple immediate threats. Other members of the group deal with their past.

episodes.name: Still
episodes.overview: Faced with the day-to-day survival of life outside shelter, a simple request by someone in the group leads to a bizarre but enlightening mission.

episodes.name: Alone
episodes.overview: As one group finds what may be an ideal shelter, another group comes to realize that the best protection comes from those around them.

episodes.name: The Grove
episodes.overview: After finding an idyllic place to establish a new shelter, the group starts to question whether it is possible to go back to the way things were.

episodes.name: Us
episodes.overview: However brutal some survivors believe they must be to stay alive, we get to see that faith can sometimes be the strongest survival tool.

episodes.name: A
episodes.overview: Many paths collide. Rick faces sheer brutality. The group struggles to survive.

episodes.name: No Sanctuary
episodes.overview: We learn the true motives of the Terminans as Rick and the group find themselves in a vulnerable situation. Will they be able to work together?

episodes.name: Strangers
episodes.overview: With supplies running low and not knowing whether to trust the people around them, Rick leads a mission where the risk might not be worth the reward.

episodes.name: Four Walls and a Roof
episodes.overview: Rick and the group find themselves pitted against some very nasty people, but our group might just have a plan to gain the upper hand.

episodes.name: Slabtown
episodes.overview: Beth gets to meet a whole group of other survivors, but what looks safe and nice on the outside has a bit of a dark side.

episodes.name: Self Help
episodes.overview: A new set of issues confront our group while on a mission. Will they be able to push through and survive these challenges? Or better yet, each other?

episodes.name: Consumed
episodes.overview: Cautiously, members of our group must venture into a familiar location on a heroic rescue mission. It's a huge stage, but so are the stakes.

episodes.name: Crossed
episodes.overview: Between holding down the church and going on a rescue mission, our group is spread pretty thin. Is this going to be the breaking point?

episodes.name: Coda
episodes.overview: Rules and morals have been tossed aside by new enemies. Rick will try to find a peaceful agreement, but they might prefer violence.

episodes.name: What Happened and What's Going On
episodes.overview: After all the recent trials the group has faced, a slight detour might prove to be the solution they've been looking for.

episodes.name: Them
episodes.overview: Life on the road has left the group beaten and beleaguered. Will they be able to trudge along? Are they even the same people they once were?

episodes.name: The Distance
episodes.overview: Lasting through a spectacular storm, Rick and the group meet a seemingly friendly person. Can they be trusted or are they just manipulating Rick?

episodes.name: Remember
episodes.overview: Adjusting into a new lifestyle is proving difficult for the group. Has life on the road proven too treacherous to go back to who they once were?

episodes.name: Forget
episodes.overview: Rick and the group continue to acclimate to their new surroundings. Will they be able to go back to normalcy? Then again, what is normal now?

episodes.name: Spend
episodes.overview: While trying to secure their new home, Rick and his group face many challenges, some life threatening. Is this really the utopia it seems to be?

episodes.name: Try
episodes.overview: The group realizes that sheltered life might not be possible as life within the walls starts to mimic life outside. Will these setbacks break Rick?

episodes.name: Conquer
episodes.overview: Daryl experiences trouble on a run, while Rick and his group continue to feel like outsiders in Alexandria, where trouble is creeping into the gates.

episodes.name: First Time Again
episodes.overview: Rick and the group are still having trouble assimilating into Alexandria. Will a new threat bring them closer together or drive them further apart?

episodes.name: JSS
episodes.overview: Just when it looks like things can return to normal, or as normal as things can be in the apocalypse, a new problem arises for the Alexandrians.

episodes.name: Thank You
episodes.overview: A return home doesn't go as expected.

episodes.name: Here's Not Here
episodes.overview: A new face and setting are introduced. With all that's gone on in the apocalypse, can people be trusted?

episodes.name: Now
episodes.overview: Trouble is inside and outside the gate.

episodes.name: Always Accountable
episodes.overview: Daryl, Abraham and Sasha encounter many obstacles and a new threat while trying to return to Alexandria.

episodes.name: Heads Up
episodes.overview: Things in Alexandria are quiet, briefly.

episodes.name: Start to Finish
episodes.overview: Multiple problems crash together.

episodes.name: No Way Out
episodes.overview: While trying to escape Alexandria, Rick and his group meet trouble when sudden noise draws walkers towards them with what could be fatal consequences.

episodes.name: The Next World
episodes.overview: A simple scavenging run proves to be more tricky, when the survivors are not the only ones after a goldmine of supplies.

episodes.name: Knots Untie
episodes.overview: After Rick comes to the realization that Alexandria might not be as safe as he thought, decisions must be made about where to go from here.

episodes.name: Not Tomorrow Yet
episodes.overview: Rick and the group realize the only way to maintain the peace of Alexandria is to fight a new enemy. This time, though, our group might be outmatched.

episodes.name: The Same Boat
episodes.overview: With no hope of safety in Alexandria, Rick and his band of survivors soon discover a larger world with new dangers and new opportunities.

episodes.name: Twice as Far
episodes.overview: Two separate groups leave Alexandria for supplies, and while both worry over the future of the community, they will face immediate danger.

episodes.name: East
episodes.overview: When someone goes missing in Alexandria, the community goes on alert, and search parties venture out.

episodes.name: Last Day on Earth
episodes.overview: To save one of their own, Rick's group must venture outside the walls; their experience changes their lives forever.

episodes.name: The Day Will Come When You Won't Be
episodes.overview: Rick and his group kneel helplessly before Negan and the Saviors. What Negan does will haunt those who survive forever.

episodes.name: The Well
episodes.overview: For a number of familiar faces, a new, well-established community seems too good to be true.

episodes.name: The Cell
episodes.overview: A new group of survivors seem to have it all in their impressive community, however, there is a price.

episodes.name: Service
episodes.overview: Alexandria gets a sobering visit.

episodes.name: Go Getters
episodes.overview: Saddled with grief and surrounded by enemies, members of the group try to find safety at the Hilltop before it's too late.

episodes.name: Swear
episodes.overview: Someone stumbles upon a brand new society unlike anything seen before.

episodes.name: Sing Me a Song
episodes.overview: A deeper look at the Sanctuary and the world of the Saviors. Members of Alexandria look for supplies.

episodes.name: Hearts Still Beating
episodes.overview: Negan's unwelcome visit to Alexandria continues as other members scavenge for supplies and things quickly spin out of control.

episodes.name: Rock in the Road
episodes.overview: Rick and the group are led to a new community where they are introduced to its inhabitants and ruler. A familiar face resurfaces.

episodes.name: New Best Friends
episodes.overview: While searching for a missing Alexandrian, Rick and his group encounter a mysterious collective, its inhabitants unlike any they have come across.

episodes.name: Hostiles and Calamities
episodes.overview: An Alexandrian discovers that he must navigate the mysterious, confusing and horrifying world within the Saviors' Sanctuary.

episodes.name: Say Yes
episodes.overview: The group scavenges for supplies; back in Alexandria, someone must make a morally challenging decision.

episodes.name: Bury Me Here
episodes.overview: Things do not go as planned when a group of Kingdommers deliver goods to the Saviors during a routine supply drop-off.

episodes.name: The Other Side
episodes.overview: The Saviors visit the Hilltop unexpectedly, surprising everyone, with plans of taking more than supplies.

episodes.name: Something They Need
episodes.overview: A group of Alexandrians embarks on a journey to the distant community; one member of the group must make a heartbreaking decision.

episodes.name: The First Day of the Rest of Your Life
episodes.overview: The stakes continue to grow higher as paths cross; the group enacts an intricate plan.

episodes.name: Mercy
episodes.overview: Rick and his group, along with the Kingdom and Hilltop, have banded together to bring the fight to Negan and the Saviors.

episodes.name: The Damned
episodes.overview: The plan involving Alexandrians, Kingdommers and Hilltoppers unfolds. As Rick continues to fight, he encounters a familiar face.

episodes.name: Monsters
episodes.overview: Conflict with the Saviors leads to unintended consequences for the Hilltop, the Kingdom, and Alexandria; morality proves tricky in wartime.

episodes.name: Some Guy
episodes.overview: A new weapon in the Savior arsenal proves to be a giant hurdle as fighting continues between Rick's forces and those of the Saviors.

episodes.name: The Big Scary U
episodes.overview: With war raging all around him, we get a close look at Negan and the lives of the Saviors during the conflict through a familiar set of eyes.

episodes.name: The King, the Widow, and Rick
episodes.overview: With things looking up for Rick and the group, an argument breaks out at the Hilltop; the consequences of the decision are life versus death.

episodes.name: Time for After
episodes.overview: Negan has to enlist the help of his lieutenants in solving a huge issue facing the Sanctuary; Rick and the group continue to enact the plan.

episodes.name: How It's Gotta Be
episodes.overview: Every story and battle comes crashing together.

episodes.name: Honor
episodes.overview: Rick faces new difficulties after a battle. Meanwhile, the fight continues in other communities as core members face hard decisions.

episodes.name: The Lost and the Plunderers
episodes.overview: Groups unite their forces and converge on the Hilltop. Meanwhile, Aaron and Enid search for allies. Simon takes matters into his own hands.

episodes.name: Dead or Alive Or
episodes.overview: Daryl finds himself in bad company as his group heads to the Hilltop; Maggie makes difficult decisions at the Hilltop; Gabriel's faith becomes tested.

episodes.name: The Key
episodes.overview: Hilltop's leadership faces a difficult dilemma after the arrival of unexpected visitors. Rick comes face to face with an adversary.

episodes.name: Do Not Send Us Astray
episodes.overview: Trouble arises when unexpected visitors arrive at the Hilltop and the community is thrust into action; heartbreaking discoveries are made.

episodes.name: Still Gotta Mean Something
episodes.overview: A Heaps prisoner makes a discovery; Carol searches for someone in the nearby forest; Rick and Morgan find themselves in the company of strangers.

episodes.name: Worth
episodes.overview: With the threat of the Saviors still looming, Aaron continues searching for allies. Daryl and Rosita take action and confront an old friend.

episodes.name: Wrath
episodes.overview: The communities join forces in the last stand against the Saviors as all-out war unfolds.

episodes.name: A New Beginning
episodes.overview: Rick and his group make a risky run into Washington, D.C. to search for artifacts they will need to build the civilization he and Carl envisioned.

episodes.name: The Bridge
episodes.overview: The communities join forces to restore a bridge that will facilitate communication and trade. Someone is gravely injured at the construction site.

episodes.name: Warning Signs
episodes.overview: Rick's vision for the future is threatened by a mysterious disappearance that divides the work camp where the communities are building a bridge.

episodes.name: The Obliged
episodes.overview: Rick's vision of a civilized future is threatened by a sudden reckoning with past sins that remain unavenged and unforgiven.

episodes.name: What Comes After
episodes.overview: Rick is forced to face the past as he struggles to maintain the safety of the communities and protect the future he and Carl envisioned.

episodes.name: Who Are You Now?
episodes.overview: The Survivors encounter unfamiliar faces outside the safety of their community's walls and must decide whether or not this new group can be trusted.

episodes.name: Stradivarius
episodes.overview: Carol seeks out an old friend living alone in a wilderness teeming with walkers; survivors make the perilous trek to a new home.

episodes.name: Evolution
episodes.overview: A small rescue mission braves a dangerous herd in their hunt for a missing comrade, only to discover a surprising threat that could doom them all.

episodes.name: Adaptation
episodes.overview: The group unmasks a disturbing and dangerous new threat. An escaped captive revisits his past.

episodes.name: Omega
episodes.overview: A captive or a refugee? A new arrival at the Hilltop opens up about the leader of a group of mask-wearing savages. A search party sets out on a daring mission to find two missing friends.

episodes.name: Bounty
episodes.overview: The savage group led by Alpha confronts the Hilltop in a harrowing attempt to retrieve her daughter; a supply run for the Kingdom turns into a dangerous quest.

episodes.name: Guardians
episodes.overview: While one community struggles to ease tensions that threaten to divide from within, the true nature of another group comes into focus; a mission to rescue a friend has deadly consequences.

episodes.name: Chokepoint
episodes.overview: Daryl's daring rescue mission forces Alpha to unleash a group of her own to retrieve what belongs to her, even if the price is paid in blood; the Kingdom's plans to reunite the communities are put in jeopardy.

episodes.name: Scars
episodes.overview: An outsider's arrival forces Alexandria to rehash devastating old wounds; eye-opening secrets from the past are revealed.

episodes.name: The Calm Before
episodes.overview: The fair at the Kingdom is underway, with all four communities coming together in celebration for the first time in years, while some pacts are renewed, other deals will come at a much steeper price.

episodes.name: The Storm
episodes.overview: In the aftermath of an overwhelming loss, the communities must brave a ferocious blizzard; as one group deals with an enemy from within, another is forced to make a life or death decision.

episodes.name: Lines We Cross
episodes.overview: The group continue to train in Oceanside in case the Whisperers return. Tensions are high as our heroes struggle to hold onto their concept of civilization.

episodes.name: We Are the End of the World
episodes.overview: The origins of Alpha and Beta are revealed. Alpha attempts to toughen up Lydia as they prepare to walk with the dead. Meanwhile, the Whisperers create their herds.

episodes.name: Ghosts
episodes.overview: The threat of the Whisperers return leads to paranoia sweeping over Alexandria; in the meantime, Carol battles with the need for revenge.

episodes.name: Silence the Whisperers
episodes.overview: Still paranoid Alexandrians get riled up over the Whisperers and take their fear out on Negan; back at Hilltop, the group deals with an unexpected safety issue.

episodes.name: What It Always Is
episodes.overview: Supplies go missing from Hilltop, Negan is idolized by an Alexandrian, and Ezekiel holds a secret.

episodes.name: Bonds
episodes.overview: Carol and Daryl go on a mission together while Siddiq struggles to solve a mystery.

episodes.name: Open Your Eyes
episodes.overview: Carol pushes boundaries that make Daryl uncomfortable. Alpha and Beta have reservations about someone.

episodes.name: The World Before
episodes.overview: A fight causes tensions in Oceanside while the Alexandrians set out on a high-stakes mission.

episodes.name: Squeeze
episodes.overview: Our group must figure out how to get out of a precarious situation.

episodes.name: Stalker
episodes.overview: Our group must defend Alexandria from a threatening outside force.

episodes.name: Morning Star
episodes.overview: The Whisperers are coming for Hilltop. After Daryl and Lydia's encounter with Alpha, the communities must decide whether to run or fight. Meanwhile, Eugene's communication with Stephanie gets complicated.

episodes.name: Walk with Us
episodes.overview: Alpha and the Whisperers attack Hilltop, with Negan's help.

episodes.name: What We Become
episodes.overview: Michonne takes Virgil back to his mysterious island to reunite with his family; in exchange, Virgil promises weapons that could change the tide of the Whisperer War.

episodes.name: Look at the Flowers
episodes.overview: Heroes and villains reckon with the aftermath of the Hilltop fire; Eugene takes a group on a journey to meet Stephanie, with the hopes of befriending another civilisation.

episodes.name: The Tower
episodes.overview: The communities prepare for the final battle of the Whisperers' War. Meanwhile, Eugene's group encounters Princess.

episodes.name: A Certain Doom
episodes.overview: The final battle against Beta and his allies is at its peak. Aaron and Alden find themselves in a predicament.

episodes.name: Home Sweet Home
episodes.overview: Maggie has returned with a story she is not ready to share, even when her past catches up to her. Negan’s safety is at stake again. Daryl and Maggie fight an unseen and unknown threat.

episodes.name: Find Me
episodes.overview: An adventure for Daryl and Carol turns sideways when they come across an old cabin. It takes Daryl back to the years when he left the group after Rick disappeared as he relives a time that only the apocalypse could manifest.

episodes.name: One More
episodes.overview: Gabriel and Aaron search for food and supplies to bring back to Alexandria. Small tragedies lead to bigger tragedies as faith is broken and optimism is fragmented when they are put to the ultimate test.

episodes.name: Splinter
episodes.overview: Eugene, Ezekiel, Yumiko and Princess are captured and separated. Princess struggles with memories of her traumatic past and tries to escape one way or another with the help of Ezekiel.

episodes.name: Diverged
episodes.overview: Daryl and Carol come to a fork in the road and head their separate ways. Each going into their own type of survival mode, the easiest of challenges become much harder. Will their individual journeys be the tipping point needed to mend their friendship, or is the distance between them permanent?

episodes.name: Here's Negan
episodes.overview: Carol takes Negan on a journey, hoping to minimize the increasing tension. Negan reflects on the events that led him to this point and comes to a conclusion about his future.

episodes.name: Acheron (1)
episodes.overview: Daryl leads a mission team to scavenge the military base he discovered. Maggie tells her story, prompting a new mission for survival that only Negan can lead. Eugene and his group go through assessment by the Commonwealth's paramilitary police.

episodes.name: Acheron (2)
episodes.overview: Maggie's mission takes the team through a subway tunnel, challenged by lurking walkers and a recalcitrant Negan. With Eugene's group, Yumiko seeks answers about her brother and demands expedited processing into the Commonwealth.

episodes.name: Hunted
episodes.overview: Maggie's mission team gets separated and hunted by the Reapers. Carol, Rosita, Magna, and Kelly attempt to catch horses for Alexandria. Judith, R.J., Hershel, and Gracie cope with their parents going away.

episodes.name: Rendition
episodes.overview: Daryl and Dog get captured by the Reapers. Taken to the Meridian, they reconnect with a familiar figure from their past.

episodes.name: Out of the Ashes
episodes.overview: Aaron, Carol, Lydia, and Jerry go to the Hilltop ruins for blacksmith tools and nearby game; Eugene's group goes through orientation at the Commonwealth; Maggie and Negan trudge through the woods; Judith and the kids clash with teenagers.

episodes.name: On the Inside
episodes.overview: Escaping from walkers, Connie and Virgil hide in a house occupied by mysterious creatures. Pope tests Daryl's loyalty to the Reapers with a conflicting mission. Kelly leaves Alexandria in search of Connie.

episodes.name: Promises Broken
episodes.overview: Maggie and Elijah learn a new survival tactic from Negan. Eugene's group clears walkers to pay their fines. Yumiko interviews for an upper-class job. Daryl learns more about Leah and the Reapers. Gabriel encounters a man of God.

episodes.name: For Blood
episodes.overview: The Reapers defend Meridian from an incoming herd. Pope suspects Maggie is behind the attack, while Daryl treads carefully. Alexandrians scramble to protect themselves when a violent storm leaves them vulnerable to walkers.

episodes.name: No Other Way
episodes.overview: Daryl, Maggie, Gabriel, Negan, and Elijah battle the Reapers for food. Aaron and the Alexandrians must survive a storm.

episodes.name: New Haunts
episodes.overview: The heroes experience Halloween in the Commonwealth; Daryl and Rosita undergo military training led by Mercer; Carol investigates Ezekiel's medical condition.

episodes.name: Rogue Element
episodes.overview: Eugene looks for Stephanie after she mysteriously goes missing. Connie investigates a story on Trooper Davis. Carol helps Hornsby with a labor dispute at a drug farm.

episodes.name: The Lucky Ones
episodes.overview: Aaron and Maggie meet Governor Pamela Milton as she tours Alexandria, Oceanside and Hilltop. Ezekiel finds himself lucky during a routine checkup. Eugene processes Max's story.

episodes.name: Warlords
episodes.overview: Maggie, Lydia, and Elijah help a stranger from another community called Riverbend. They run into Aaron, who tells them about a mission he embarked on with Gabriel as emissaries for the Commonwealth.

episodes.name: The Rotten Core
episodes.overview: Maggie, Lydia, and Elijah help Aaron and Gabriel on a rescue mission. In the chaos, Negan finds himself watching over Hershel. Sebastian coerces Daryl and Rosita into pulling a heist.

episodes.name: Trust
episodes.overview: Hornsby marches Daryl and troops to confront Maggie at Hilltop. After a harrowing heist, Rosita gets Connie, Kelly, Eugene, and Max to investigate the Miltons. Ezekiel helps hospital patients in need.

episodes.name: Acts of God
episodes.overview: Maggie prepares to defend Hilltop and the people of Riverbend against Hornsby. Meanwhile, Hornsby hires Leah to kill her.

episodes.name: Lockdown
episodes.overview: Daryl and Negan rush to the Commonwealth to stop Hornsby from going after their families. Pamela deals with protestors demanding justice for Sebastian's crimes. Mercer needs Rosita's help to fight a swarm.

episodes.name: A New Deal
episodes.overview: Carol makes a deal with Pamela to wipe the slate clean on behalf of her friends. Aaron, Jerry, Lydia, and Elijah get on the road to Oceanside to fill them in on a plan. The Commonwealth celebrates Founders Day.

episodes.name: Variant
episodes.overview: Eugene goes on the run after the Founders Day incident. Pamela tasks Mercer to investigate his whereabouts, to Max and Princess' dismay. Meanwhile, Aaron, Jerry, Lydia, and Elijah encounter an unusual complication at an abandoned Renaissance Faire.

episodes.name: What's Been Lost
episodes.overview: Daryl and Carol investigate the whereabouts of their friends after Pamela disappeared them from the Commonwealth. Unfortunately, their only lead is Hornsby. Meanwhile, Pamela asks Yumiko to prosecute Eugene on behalf of the Commonwealth.

episodes.name: Outpost 22
episodes.overview: Separated from their children, Maggie, Gabriel, and Rosita track a military convoy to a mysterious destination. Ezekiel, Kelly, Negan, and Annie find themselves at a work site. Daryl and Carol follow a train that has taken Connie aboard.

episodes.name: Faith
episodes.overview: Ezekiel and Negan team up to lead a clandestine labor revolt against the Warden. Aaron, Jerry, Lydia, and Elijah catch up with Luke and Jules fleeing Oceanside. Eugene stands trial with Yumiko as his defense attorney.

episodes.name: Family
episodes.overview: The Alexandrians and the prisoners head back to the Commonwealth to confront Pamela Milton. A swarm approaches the city.

episodes.name: Rest in Peace
episodes.overview: Daryl and Carol rush Judith to the hospital. Rosita, Eugene, and Gabriel search for Coco. Maggie and Negan take arms against Pamela. As the citizens of the Commonwealth deal with the herd, our heroes assemble for one last stand to save their future.

episodes.name: Leavetaking
episodes.overview: A strange noblewoman arrives in a remote mountain village, claiming one of five youths is the reincarnation of an ancient power who once destroyed the world – and will do so again, if she’s not able to discover which of them it is. But they all have less time than they think.

episodes.name: Shadow's Waiting
episodes.overview: Moiraine and Lan lead the four villagers to safety, unsure which is the one from the prophecy. But the friends are equally unsure about their rescuers, especially once they see how far Moiraine is willing to go for her mission – and how far astray Lan is willing to lead them.

episodes.name: A Place of Safety
episodes.overview: Moiraine and Lan find help in an unexpected – and unwanted – quarter, as the separated villagers try to find their way back to each other, or at least to refuge. But they all soon learn how far the Dark One’s reach extends, and how few they can trust on the road.

episodes.name: The Dragon Reborn
episodes.overview: Moiraine struggles with uncertainty while Lan struggles with their new companion. Rand wonders about Mat and Mat starts to wonder at himself. Egwene and Perrin take their first steps down a different path. An incredible new power is unleashed on the world.

episodes.name: Blood Calls Blood
episodes.overview: Perrin and Egwene run into a familiar face. Mat and Rand see strange ones. Moiraine and Lan mourn their loss.

episodes.name: The Flame of Tar Valon
episodes.overview: Moiraine faces the consequences of her actions. Mat faces the darkness in himself. Egwene faces the most powerful woman in the world.

episodes.name: The Dark Along the Ways
episodes.overview: Moiraine and her charges are diverted from their path by an unexpected encounter. This diversion, though, reveals many things — Moiraine’s true goal, Lan’s past, the fractures that have grown in the group, and the identity of the Dragon Reborn.

episodes.name: The Eye of the World
episodes.overview: For twenty years, Moiraine has dreamed and worked towards this moment. But she can't stop the Dragon Reborn from seeing the appeal of the Dark.

episodes.name: A Taste of Solitude
episodes.overview: Moiraine, Lan, Nynaeve, Egwene, Perrin, and Mat find themselves more alone than ever.

episodes.name: Strangers and Friends
episodes.overview: The Two Rivers youths forge new relationships, while Lan tries to mend an old one.

episodes.name: What Might Be
episodes.overview: Nynaeve faces her greatest fears. Rand seeks guidance on his powers from an unexpected source.

episodes.name: Daughter of the Night
episodes.overview: Moiraine searches for Rand while Nynaeve mourns her losses.

episodes.name: Damane
episodes.overview: Moiraine and Rand flee for their lives. Egwene and Nynaeve encounter a new foe.

episodes.name: Eyes Without Pity
episodes.overview: Rand makes a risky alliance and Egwene gathers her strength to confront the horror of her circumstances.

episodes.name: Daes Dae'Mar
episodes.overview: A familiar face foils Moiraine and Rand's plans.

episodes.name: What Was Meant to Be
episodes.overview: Fate leads Rand and the others to an inevitable showdown with their most formidable enemies yet.

episodes.name: To Race the Shadow
episodes.overview: Chaos erupts within the White Tower as our heroes become targets of a new evil.

episodes.name: A Question of Crimson
episodes.overview: A dangerous visitor comes to the White Tower. Perrin returns home. Rand and Egwene forge their own path under Moiraine’s watchful eye.

episodes.name: Seeds of Shadow
episodes.overview: Nynaeve and Elayne are given a deadly mission. Perrin learns the consequences of his rage. Lanfear begins to play a dangerous game.

episodes.name: The Road to the Spear
episodes.overview: Rand faces the forgotten history of his family as Moiraine learns the devastating truth of her future.

episodes.name: Tel'aran'rhiod
episodes.overview: Egwene learns Rand's dark secret. Perrin stages a daring rescue. Nynaeve, Elayne, Mat, and Min hunt the Black Ajah.

episodes.name: The Shadow in the Night
episodes.overview: Tensions flare between Egwene and Rand. Moiraine and Lan come to terms with their destiny.

episodes.name: Goldeneyes
episodes.overview: Perrin begins to embrace his role as a leader among the people of the Two Rivers.

episodes.name: He Who Comes with the Dawn
episodes.overview: Nynaeve, Elayne, Mat, and Min confront the Black Ajah and their futures. Moiraine and Lan prepare to face their fate. Rand and Egwene set their destinies in motion.

episodes.name: Arrivals
episodes.overview: As a new wave of guests arrive at the White Lotus, resort manager Armond tries to assuage an unreasonable Shane and his easy-going new wife Rachel, while spa director Belinda calms a grieving Tanya. Meanwhile, Nicole suggests her husband Mark distract himself from a health scare by spending time with their son Quinn, who’s been cast out by his sister Olivia and her friend Paula.

episodes.name: New Day
episodes.overview: A cautiously optimistic Belinda walks a fine line with Tanya, while Armond brainstorms ways to deal with Shane. After her husband belittles her work, Rachel approaches Nicole for advice. Paula and Olivia lose track of their stash, while a revived Mark attempts to connect with Quinn.

episodes.name: Mysterious Monkeys
episodes.overview: Stripped of his gadgets, Quinn reluctantly takes a scuba class with Mark, who’s struggling to process revelations regarding his late father. Hoping to reignite the spark with Rachel, Shane enlists Armond to help plan a romantic evening. Tanya leans on Belinda for support as she scatters her mother’s ashes at sea. Paula keeps a secret from a suspicious Olivia.

episodes.name: Recentering
episodes.overview: After Shane shoots down her latest career plans, Rachel is further blindsided by an unexpected arrival. Just as Belinda begins to take her business proposition seriously, Tanya’s attention turns to an intriguing hotel guest. Meanwhile, Armond’s renewed commitment to sobriety is put to the test.

episodes.name: The Lotus-Eaters
episodes.overview: As Armond attempts to do damage control, Belinda tries to redirect Tanya’s focus to her business proposal. Paula grows increasingly disillusioned with the Mossbachers. A sidelined Rachel begins to question her future. Nicole rebuffs Mark for airing their dirty laundry to Quinn.

episodes.name: Departures
episodes.overview: Rachel shares some harsh truths with Shane and confides in Belinda, who’s reeling from bad news of her own. As the Mossbachers turn the page on their harrowing scare, Quinn reveals major life plans. With nothing left to lose, Armond goes on an all-out bender – and exacts the ultimate revenge on his nemesis.

episodes.name: Ciao
episodes.overview: Two couples navigate awkwardness, an Italian American family deals with a conspicuous absence, and Tanya arrives with her new assistant.

episodes.name: Italian Dream
episodes.overview: Tanya enlists Greg to help her live out her perfect Sicilian day. Harper questions Cameron and Daphne’s claims about their marriage.

episodes.name: Bull Elephants
episodes.overview: While Daphne loops Harper into an off-resort excursion, Ethan and Cameron get in some bro time. Tanya seeks advice from a tarot reader.

episodes.name: In the Sandbox
episodes.overview: Tanya and Portia spend a day with charming ex-pats Quentin and Jack. Harper is blindsided by shocking evidence from Ethan’s night out.

episodes.name: That's Amore
episodes.overview: Tanya and Portia embark on a whirlwind excursion with Quentin and Jack. Unsure what to believe, Harper gets real with Cam and Daphne.

episodes.name: Abductions
episodes.overview: Ethan grows suspicious of Cam. Tanya gives Portia an opaque warning about Jack. Lucia helps the Di Grassos search for long-lost relatives.

episodes.name: Arrivederci
episodes.overview: Albie asks Dominic for a karmic payment to help Lucia. Tanya grows wary of Quentin’s motives. Ethan confronts Cam.

episodes.name: Same Spirits, New Forms
episodes.overview: As a new round of guests arrives at the White Lotus Thailand, Belinda settles in, Chelsea deals with a moody Rick, the Ratliffs go separate ways, and Kate, Laurie, and Jaclyn kick off a girls' trip.

episodes.name: Special Treatments
episodes.overview: Timothy gets distressing updates about his business, Chelsea connects with expat Chloe, and Gaitok shares his feelings with Mook.

episodes.name: The Meaning of Dreams
episodes.overview: Jaclyn pushes the idea of a vacation fling on Laurie. Chelsea finds herself in a perilous situation. Gaitok worries about a reprimand.

episodes.name: Hide or Seek
episodes.overview: Jaclyn looks for a different scene. Piper asks for Lochlan's support before sharing a life update. Chelsea finally gets Rick to open up.

episodes.name: Full-Moon Party
episodes.overview: As things get wild during the Full Moon festivities, Rick visits an old friend, and Belinda shares her suspicions about a hotel guest.

episodes.name: Denials
episodes.overview: In the wake of the festivities, Laurie finds herself feeling deceived by Jaclyn, while Saxon tries to bury what happened the night before.

episodes.name: Killer Instincts
episodes.overview: Belinda brings Zion to Chloe’s expat party. Saxon confronts Tim about how strange he’s been acting. Gaitok and Mook have their first date.

episodes.name: Amor Fati
episodes.overview: Laurie, Jaclyn, and Kate reckon with their friendship. Timothy comes up with a shocking plan for his family. Belinda considers a deal.

episodes.name: The Target
episodes.overview:
"... when it's not your turn." - McNulty.

Baltimore homicide detective Jimmy McNulty gets into hot water and winds up assigned to a detail of narcotics outcasts charged with investigating drug lord Avon Barksdale and his powerful operation in Franklin Terrace. Meanwhile, Avon's nephew D'Angelo is fresh off beating a murder rap, but he finds himself demoted upon his return to the gang.

episodes.name: The Detail
episodes.overview:
"You cannot lose if you do not play." - Marla Daniels.

McNulty feels the heat when a witness who testified against D'Angelo is found murdered. Meanwhile, Greggs is given the lay of the land regarding Avon Barksdale's key players, and Herc, Carver and Prez find big-time trouble at the towers.

episodes.name: The Buys
episodes.overview:
"The king stay the king." - D'Angelo.  

The early-morning 'field interviews' by Herc, Carver and Prez result in a minor riot, a boy losing an eye and some bad publicity for the department. On the other side of the law, D'Angelo teaches Wallace and Bodie how to play the game (chess) and later impresses Bell with his 'take' from the low-rises.

episodes.name: Old Cases
episodes.overview:
"It's a thin line 'tween heaven and here." - Bubbles.  

Greggs and McNulty try to get Hardcase to turn informant as arraignment begins for those caught in the raid. Barksdale places a bounty on the head of rival gang leader Omar. Meanwhile, McNulty takes Bubbles on a cultural field trip, and Herc and Carver try to track down Bodie.

episodes.name: The Pager
episodes.overview:
"..a little slow, a little late." - Avon Barksdale.  

McNulty's detail finally gets 'clone' pagers to track Barksdale and his gang, but nobody can crack the codes used by the callers. Meanwhile, Bell instructs D'Angelo on how to school his lookouts while simultaneously flushing out a possible snitch. Later, Carver and Herc find Bodie, but their interrogation doesn't turn up results.

episodes.name: The Wire
episodes.overview:
"..and all the pieces matter." - Freamon. 

When Rawls looks to make a premature arrest for three murders that are linked to D'Angelo and Avon Barksdale, McNulty and Greggs must argue for a delay in order to preserve the valuable wiretap gains they have made. Meanwhile, Wallace and D'Angelo struggle with their consciences after Avon pays them blood money.

episodes.name: One Arrest
episodes.overview:
"A man must have a code." - Bunk.  

Tipped off by the wire, Greggs, Herc, Carver and Freamon make a bust, but the incident makes Avon and Stringer suspicious, leading them to close shop in the Pit. Meanwhile, Bunk and McNulty look for another witness in the Gant slaying and hunt a suspect known as 'Mr. Bird.'

episodes.name: Lessons
episodes.overview:
"Come at the king, you best not miss." - Omar.  

An unlikely source gives McNulty the tag of a car driven by Stringer Bell. Meanwhile, Greggs and Carver bust a congressional aide carrying dirty cash, but are forced to let him go. Omar earns his 'loose cannon' moniker.

episodes.name: Game Day
episodes.overview:
"Maybe we won." - Herc.  

Barksdale plays an expensive game of one-upmanship with an east-side rival. Meanwhile, Herc and Carver take some cash off of Wee-Bey's hands, and Omar resurfaces with a bang.

episodes.name: The Cost
episodes.overview:
"And then he dropped the bracelets..." - Greggs.  

With Wallace in custody, McNulty and Daniels try to figure out what to do with him in the months before he testifies. Sydnor and Carver track down one of Barksdale's stash houses, and Prez shows off his 'gift for the paper trail.' McNulty's estranged wife Elena takes desperate measures after learning that he had their kids follow Stringer Bell.

episodes.name: The Hunt
episodes.overview:
"Dope on the damn table." - Daniels.  

The police turn up the heat on tracking down Savino, Wee-Bey and Little Man. Burrell orders Daniels to hit drug dealers for results that will impress the press. Barksdale sees his ranks thinning after the hit on Orlando. Bubbles tries to stay sober while scoping out the projects for McNulty; and Freamon determines there's a rat in the detail.

episodes.name: Cleaning Up
episodes.overview:
"This is me, yo, right here." - Wallace.  

The low-rise pay phones are out of service, so McNulty and Daniels try to keep pace by tapping Barksdale's office. Bodie gets new responsibilities from Stringer; Freamon gives Shardene a 'new look'; and D'Angelo goes to NYC on an errand for his uncle. With the detail's future hanging in the balance, Daniels faces off against Burrell and his political allies.

episodes.name: Sentencing
episodes.overview:
"all in the game..." - Traditional West Baltimore.  

Every crew has weak links--including Avon Barksdale's. With the heat turned up in the high-rises, Daniels and McNulty turn to a higher authority in an effort to crack the case wide open. Season finale.

episodes.name: Ebb Tide
episodes.overview:
'Ain't never gonna be what it was.' -- Little Big Roy

Det. Jimmy McNulty--exiled to police-boat duty--makes a shocking discovery in the Baltimore harbor. Bodie drives to Philly to make a connection for the Barksdale crew and Stringer Bell takes the train to New York to feel out the crew's reticent suppliers.

episodes.name: Collateral Damage
episodes.overview:
'They can chew you up, but they gotta spit you out.' -- McNulty

Major Valchek gets back at Sobotka for the church gift fiasco, and a feud begins. Valchek ups the ante by asking Deputy Commissioner Burrell for a detail to go after Sobotka. Avon Barksdale continues to run his empire from a prison cell--counseling his nephew D'Angelo and going after a guard who is harassing the organization's convicted hit-man Wee-Bey.

episodes.name: Hot Shots
episodes.overview:
'What they need is a union.' -- Russell

Bunk and Freamon chase their crime scene, a container ship, to Philly. Lt. Cedric Daniels--disgusted with his exile to the evidence control unit--makes it known that he's leaving. On orders from Barksdale, Bell finds a way to set up the correctional officer who's been harassing Wee-Bey. McNulty pursues the identity of the Jane Doe found floating in the harbor.

episodes.name: Hard Cases
episodes.overview:
'If I hear the music, I'm gonna dance.' -- Greggs

Sobotka reprimands his nephew Nick for stealing the cameras and orders him to bring the cargo back--too late. McNulty is on a self-assigned moral mission to identify his floater, but his old partner, Bunk, says they have a more pressing matter at hand: to find Omar so he can testify against a Barksdale trigger man in one of last year's murders.

episodes.name: Undertow
episodes.overview:
'They used to make steel there, no?' -- Spiros Vondas

Ziggy loses his prized Camaro to drug dealers. Unable to dump the homicide investigation on other agencies, Rawls measures Bunk for the blame, if the cases go unsolved. Homicide detectives hand out grand jury summonses to stevedores involved in the homicide case, and port cop Beadie Russell talks to an old boyfriend to find out how cargo disappears from the docks.

episodes.name: All Prologue
episodes.overview:
'It don't matter that some fool say he different...' -- D'Angelo

Trying to let go of police work and return to his marriage, McNulty gives up on identifying his Jane Doe. In their investigation of Sobotka, the detectives discover a pattern in the computer and explain the connection to Daniels, but he still won't take the murders. Sobotka tries to play the political game on behalf of his union.

episodes.name: Backwash
episodes.overview:
'Don't worry, kid. You're still on the clock.' -- Horseface
