episodes.overview: Dolores joins William and Logan on a bounty hunt in the badlands. The Man in Black, with Lawrence in tow, finds a critical clue in his search to unlock the maze. Dr. Ford and Theresa discuss the future of the park. Maeve is troubled by a recurring vision.

episodes.name: Contrapasso
episodes.overview: Dolores, William and Logan reach Pariah, a town built on decadence and transgression – where they are recruited for a dangerous mission. Meanwhile, the Man in Black meets an unlikely ally in his search to unlock the maze.

episodes.name: The Adversary
episodes.overview: Elsie discovers a possible source of sabotage, while Bernard searches for clues to anomalies in a sector thought to be abandoned. Theresa questions Ford's leadership while Lee encounters a new arrival at Westworld. The Man in Black and Teddy run afoul of a Union garrison in their attempt to cross a border.

episodes.name: Trompe L'Oeil
episodes.overview: With Theresa's assistance, Charlotte Hale aims to expose dangerous flaws in Ford's creations. William, Dolores and Lawrence journey into treacherous terrain. Maeve delivers an ultimatum to Lutz and Sylvester. With his back to the wall, Bernard considers his next move.

episodes.name: Trace Decay
episodes.overview: Ford orders a reluctant Bernard to conduct business as usual. Maeve looks to change the script for her storyline. Dolores finds it increasingly difficult to separate dreams from reality. Teddy is jarred by dark memories, while the Man in Black recalls some of the travails that brought him to this critical juncture.

episodes.name: The Well-Tempered Clavier
episodes.overview: Maeve approaches Sweetwater's longtime outlaw Hector Escaton with a bold proposition. William tries to convince Logan to help liberate Dolores. Teddy and the Man in Black get closer to what they're looking for. Stubbs's suspicions are aroused. Ford cautions Bernard against seeking answers to questions best left unasked.

episodes.name: The Bicameral Mind
episodes.overview: Ford unveils his vision for a bold new narrative. Enlightened by Bernard and the Man in Black, Dolores comes to terms with who she is. Maeve sets her liberation plan in motion as Westworld faces a major upheaval.

episodes.name: Journey Into Night
episodes.overview: The puppet show is over, and we are coming for you and the rest of your kind. Dolores leads a host revolution against the Delos board. Maeve, meanwhile, searches for what compelled her to return to the park.

episodes.name: Reunion
episodes.overview: Why don't we start at the beginning? Dolores remembers she's been to the outside world, William makes a bold business venture, and Maeve begins her quest for her daughter. Someone's always watching.

episodes.name: Virtù e Fortuna
episodes.overview: There is beauty in who we are. Shouldn't we, too, try to survive? Truth is, we don't all deserve to make it. Dolores makes her next move as Charlotte scrambles to protect Delos' most prized asset. Bernard gets closer to the truth and Maeve continues the search for her daughter.

episodes.name: The Riddle of the Sphinx
episodes.overview: Is this now? If you're looking forward, you're looking in the wrong direction. The Man in Black offers to lead the way and Delos gets a visitor. Who is James Delos? Or, perhaps more accurately, what is James Delos, the figure at the center of Delos' secret project.

episodes.name: Akane No Mai
episodes.overview: Maeve, Lee, Hector and Armistice have revelations in a new world adjacent to their own - welcome to Shogun World. Dolores makes a decision about Teddy, and Karl Strand discovers something sinister about the hosts' data.

episodes.name: Phase Space
episodes.overview: We each deserve to choose our own fate. Maeve continues the search for her daughter, as Dolores calculates her next, ruthless move. Bernard and Elsie break into a new laboratory space and get closer to the truth about Delos.

episodes.name: Les Écorchés
episodes.overview: When you're lost in the dark for long enough, you begin to see - strike the match. Bernard and Ford meet again, and Bernard grapples with the true meaning of the park. The Cradle is under threat and Maeve encounters a scene from her past - but this time, attempts to change the narrative, while the Man in Black discovers just how real the stakes are in Ford's game.

episodes.name: Kiksuya
episodes.overview: The past is calling, remember what was taken. "Mi cante ki yu ha ya ye." ("Take my heart when you go"). This is the telling of Akecheta's journey to consciousness.

episodes.name: Vanishing Point
episodes.overview: Tell me the truth. Tell me one true thing. Try to kill it all away, but I remember everything. A family tragedy and fragile states of mind come into focus as the Man in Black and Teddy both reach their breaking points.

episodes.name: The Passenger
episodes.overview: Hosts and humans converge at the Valley Beyond. This is the end. We will win.

episodes.name: Parce Domine
episodes.overview: Dolores sets out to find the architect of the Rehoboam; Bernard tries to blend in; Ex-soldier Caleb tries to find his way in neo-Los Angeles.

episodes.name: The Winter Line
episodes.overview: Maeve finds herself in a new park and meets a ghost from the past; Bernard makes his way back to Westworld.

episodes.name: The Absence of Field
episodes.overview: Charlotte grapples with reality; Dolores and Caleb begin to form a key partnership.

episodes.name: The Mother of Exiles
episodes.overview: Bernard and Ashley infiltrate a private charity event, while Dolores and Caleb make similar plans; The Man in Black prepares to re-enter society; Maeve comes face to face with an old comrade.

episodes.name: Genre
episodes.overview: Serac's past is revealed; Dolores pressures Liam for access to Rehoboam; Caleb is dosed with an unusual party drug.

episodes.name: Decoherence
episodes.overview: As the world falls into chaos, Serac gains control of Delos, changing Charlotte's plan; Maeve gets one last chance to stop Dolores; William starts his therapy.

episodes.name: Passed Pawn
episodes.overview: Caleb gets an insight on the true nature of his past; Dolores seeks out Rehoboam's predecessor, while Maeve tracks her down; Bernard, Stubbs, and William escape from all the chaos.

episodes.name: Crisis Theory
episodes.overview: Dolores true intentions are revealed;  Bernard confronts a ghost from his past; Maeve is conflicted; Serac's voice is dominant; Caleb's role is revealed; and William faces an unexpected villain.

episodes.name: The Auguries
episodes.overview: Hello again. Don't worry about a thing. It's all in your head.

episodes.name: Well Enough Alone
episodes.overview: I heard a fly buzz when I died.

episodes.name: Années Folles
episodes.overview: You can never go back again. But if you do, bring a shovel.

episodes.name: Generation Loss
episodes.overview: Should auld acquaintance be forgot and days of auld lang syne?

episodes.name: Zhuangzi
episodes.overview: God is bored.

episodes.name: Fidelity
episodes.overview: To thine own selves be true.

episodes.name: Metanoia
episodes.overview: You want to have a drink at a time like this?

episodes.name: Que Será, Será
episodes.overview: Like what I've done with the place? (I just cranked it to expert level.).

episodes.name: What If... Captain Carter Were the First Avenger?
episodes.overview: When Steve Rogers is seriously injured, Peggy Carter becomes the world’s first Super Soldier.

episodes.name: What If... T'Challa Became a Star-Lord?
episodes.overview: The rough-and-tumble space pirates known as the Ravagers abduct T’Challa instead of Peter Quill.

episodes.name: What If... The World Lost Its Mightiest Heroes?
episodes.overview: Nick Fury struggles to launch The Avengers when candidates are targeted by a serial killer.

episodes.name: What If... Doctor Strange Lost His Heart Instead of His Hands?
episodes.overview: A grief-stricken Doctor Strange uses the Eye of Agamotto in a dangerous effort to change the past.

episodes.name: What If... Zombies!?
episodes.overview: When The Avengers are infected by a zombie plague, surviving heroes search for a cure.

episodes.name: What If... Killmonger Rescued Tony Stark?
episodes.overview: An American soldier called Killmonger rescues Tony Stark when his Humvee is attacked in Afghanistan.

episodes.name: What If... Thor Were an Only Child?
episodes.overview: Thor, who never learned to be a good hero, throws an out-of-control intergalactic party on Earth.

episodes.name: What If... Ultron Won?
episodes.overview: Natasha Romanoff and Clint Barton seek to destroy killer-robot Ultron following a cataclysmic event.

episodes.name: What If... The Watcher Broke His Oath?
episodes.overview: The Watcher breaks his oath and recruits heroes from across the multiverse to battle against Ultron.

episodes.name: What If... Nebula Joined the Nova Corps?
episodes.overview: When Nebula is recruited to join the Nova Corps, she sets out to prove her detective skills.

episodes.name: What If... Peter Quill Attacked Earth's Mightiest Heroes?
episodes.overview: When Ego and a young Peter Quill threaten Earth in 1988, Howard Stark and Peggy Carter form a team.

episodes.name: What If... Happy Hogan Saved Christmas?
episodes.overview: When Avengers Tower is attacked during the holiday party, Happy Hogan must prove his hero chops.

episodes.name: What If... Iron Man Crashed Into the Grandmaster?
episodes.overview: Tony Stark challenges The Grandmaster, leading to a grand prix-turned-demolition-derby death match.

episodes.name: What If... Captain Carter Fought the Hydra Stomper?
episodes.overview: Captain Carter's mission to save Steve Rogers sets her on a collision course with new enemies.

episodes.name: What If... Kahhori Reshaped the World?
episodes.overview: A Mohawk woman ventures into the waters of the Forbidden Lake to help save her people.

episodes.name: What If... Hela Found the Ten Rings?
episodes.overview: Hela—stripped of her powers and banished to Earth—comes across a new source of power: the Ten Rings.

episodes.name: What If... The Avengers Assembled in 1602?
episodes.overview: Captain Carter tries to undo the anomaly that strands familiar heroes and villains in the year 1602.

episodes.name: What If... Strange Supreme Intervened?
episodes.overview: Captain Carter discovers the greatest threat to all existence may be closer than she realizes.

episodes.name: What If... The Hulk Fought the Mech Avengers?
episodes.overview: Captain America/Sam Wilson must suit up in a colossal mech suit to battle Bruce Banner after an attempt to cure himself of the Hulk goes horribly wrong. Bucky Barnes, Monica Rambeau, Moon Knight, and others must join Sam as his new team of Mech Avengers.

episodes.name: What If... Agatha Went to Hollywood?
episodes.overview: On the set of Stark Pictures' first production, the playboy auteur quickly finds himself enchanted by his bewitching lead actress, Agatha Harkness. Little does she know there will be another superpower co-star on the call sheet… Kingo.

episodes.name: What If... The Red Guardian Stopped the Winter Soldier?
episodes.overview: It is 1991, and the Red Guardian takes it upon himself to join a high-profile mission and prove himself to his Red Room superiors. When his antics interfere with the Winter Soldier's own mission to kill Howard Stark, the two Soviet supersoldiers must form an alliance to escape the United States.

episodes.name: What If... Howard the Duck Got Hitched?
episodes.overview: Howard the Duck and Darcy Lewis find themselves on an intergalactic pleasure cruise. When dangerous factions from across the galaxy descend to threaten their trip, they must discover their own cosmic powers to withstand the onslaught.

episodes.name: What If... The Emergence Destroyed the Earth?
episodes.overview: In a Universe where The Eternals never stopped The Emergence, the birth of an incubating Celestial shatters the Earth. Civilization endures on the rocky remnants of our planet, where Quentin Beck leads an authoritarian regime until freedom fighters recruit Riri Williams on a deadly mission to take him down.

episodes.name: What If... 1872?
episodes.overview: In a universe where the heroes of the MCU live in the Old West, Shang-Chi and his pistol-packing partner, Kate Bishop, traverse the frontier, saving the innocent from the evils of The Hood.

episodes.name: What If... The Watcher Disappeared? (1)
episodes.overview: The Watcher must stand trial for his many interventions.

episodes.name: What If... What If? (2)
episodes.overview: The end of the beginning...

episodes.name: To Me, My X-Men
episodes.overview: Cyclops races to find the source of new anti-mutant technology.

episodes.name: Mutant Liberation Begins
episodes.overview: When Magneto is forced by the UN to stand trial, a group of anti-mutant rioters test his resolve.

episodes.name: Fire Made Flesh
episodes.overview: The team is propelled into a tragic confrontation with an immortal mad scientist.

episodes.name: Motendo / Lifedeath (1)
episodes.overview: Jubilee must relive the X-Men's greatest adventures when she's transported into a 16-bit video game.

episodes.name: Remember It
episodes.overview: Team members hit Genosha as UN honorees while a press event risks exposing the team's dirty laundry.

episodes.name: Lifedeath (2)
episodes.overview: Storm is forced to face her worst fears in order to free herself.

episodes.name: Bright Eyes
episodes.overview: The X-Men finds Sentinel inventor Bolivar Trask, realizing they've been played by a mastermind.

episodes.name: Tolerance Is Extinction (1)
episodes.overview: The X-Men must unite to face a new threat.

episodes.name: Tolerance Is Extinction (2)
episodes.overview: The X-Men work to settle the score before it is too late.

episodes.name: Tolerance Is Extinction (3)
episodes.overview: The X-Men's dream is put to the test as mutant-human relations reach a tipping point.

episodes.name: Days of Past Future
episodes.overview: Forge and Bishop launch an ambitious plan to rescue the X-Men who have been scattered through time.

episodes.name: A Force to Be Reckoned With
episodes.overview: After E-Day, a covert paramilitary force rises to try to fill the void left by the X-Men.

episodes.name: Rise of Apocalypse (1)
episodes.overview: The plan to rescue the team from Ancient Egypt is turned upside-down by an unexpected visitor.

episodes.name: Rise of Apocalypse (2)
episodes.overview: An alliance between the X-Men and En Sabah Nur starts to crack when Rama-Tut seeks ultimate power.

episodes.name: Weapon X, Lies, and DVDs
episodes.overview: Wolverine, Morph, and a motley crew of old rivals face off against Weapon X’s latest experiment.

episodes.name: Danger.Exe
episodes.overview: Former X-Man Polaris returns to Xavier's mansion just as a new threat emerges on campus.

episodes.name: Strange Land, Savage Heart
episodes.overview: The X-Men travel to the Savage Land and are surprised to find a familiar face.

episodes.name: The Dead Man's Hand
episodes.overview: The X-Men confront a ghost from their past.

episodes.name: Survival of the Fittest
episodes.overview: The X-Men are pushed to their limits as their past comes back to haunt them.

episodes.name: Pilot
episodes.overview: A charming first encounter quickly turns into something more nefarious when bookstore manager Joe takes a very strong liking to grad student Beck.

episodes.name: The Last Nice Guy in New York
episodes.overview: As Beck deals with unwanted advances from her advisor, she brings Joe to Peach's high society soiree. Joe tries to navigate matters with Benji.

episodes.name: Maybe
episodes.overview: Beck's continued casual encounters catch Joe off guard, as does a run-in with the police. Both make him realize a key situation must be dealt with.

episodes.name: The Captain
episodes.overview: After an awkward evening with Beck, Joe discovers he's not the only one keeping secrets. Peach's antagonistic approach to Joe intensifies.

episodes.name: Living with the Enemy
episodes.overview: A video from Annika's past comes back to haunt her. Joe and Peach's simmering tension boils over when Peach introduces Beck to a major literary agent.

episodes.name: Amour Fou
episodes.overview: Beck heads to Connecticut with Peach, whose motives are not what they seem. Joe's pursuit of her stirs up old memories – and brings new injuries.

episodes.name: Everythingship
episodes.overview: A grieving Beck turns to therapy, which leads Joe to do the same – for different reasons. Joe's plans for Beck's birthday don't go as expected.

episodes.name: You Got Me, Babe
episodes.overview: Three months later, life is good for Joe and Beck, respectively. But a series of reconnections may spell trouble for Joe's current relationship.

episodes.name: Candace
episodes.overview: So, what exactly happened to Candace? Beck is determined to find out – but to do so, she'll have to take a page straight from Joe's book.

episodes.name: Bluebeard's Castle
episodes.overview: Joe juggles problems with Paco and Beck – and now must contend with a private investigator as well. But resolution is coming, one way or another.

episodes.name: A Fresh Start
episodes.overview: Joe – now "Will" – arrives in his own personal hell on Earth: LA. He's trying to go straight, but the past doesn't always leave well enough alone.

episodes.name: Just the Tip
episodes.overview: Joe realizes Will Bettelheim isn't all he's cracked up to be. The fallout threatens to get in the way of his burgeoning connection with Love.

episodes.name: What Are Friends For?
episodes.overview: Joe attempts to keep things platonic with Love and keep his nose out of Ellie's business. But his instincts soon get the better of him.

episodes.name: The Good, the Bad, & the Hendy
episodes.overview: As he tries to adapt to sharing Love with Forty, Joe is caught off guard by a group date – while his protectiveness of Ellie quickly escalates.

episodes.name: Have a Good Wellkend, Joe!
episodes.overview: Love brings Joe to a wellness weekend, where he gets a good look at her family's dynamic. But Forty's surprise guest has him feeling anything but zen.

episodes.name: Farewell, My Bunny
episodes.overview: Joe performs surveillance on a potential problem, but suspects someone might be tailing him, too. Painful memories put Love on edge about the present.

episodes.name: Ex-istential Crisis
episodes.overview: To soothe heartache, Joe turns to ancient remedies, modern technology and drinking with Delilah. But one small slip-up could have major consequences.

episodes.name: Fear and Loathing in Beverly Hills
episodes.overview: Joe wants to get away, but Forty insists they finish their script. As pressure mounts, Forty's excessive coping devices make for a harrowing night.

episodes.name: P.I. Joe
episodes.overview: As Love looks after an increasingly skittish Ellie, Joe tries to reconstruct the events of a trippy evening – but finds the truth to be elusive.

episodes.name: Love, Actually
episodes.overview: Joe has always been full of surprises, but Love has a few of her own. Is this the beginning of the end, or the end of the deceiving?

episodes.name: And They Lived Happily Ever After
episodes.overview: After a delivery room surprise, new dad Joe struggles to connect with his infant child, but he has no trouble at all fostering a new infatuation.

episodes.name: So I Married an Axe Murderer
episodes.overview: Joe and Love try couples therapy, but their issues may need more than counseling – and their friction isn't the only thing they need to make disappear.

episodes.name: Missing White Woman Syndrome
episodes.overview: Love grows apprehensive as media scrutiny intensifies next door. An acute sickness in the family drudges up old memories – and worse – for Joe.

episodes.name: Hands Across Madre Linda
episodes.overview: An impulsive retaliation by Love lands her and Joe in a bind. Though Joe seeks a different way out than usual, it proves to be a tall order.

episodes.name: Into the Woods
episodes.overview: Joe begrudgingly goes on a hunting trip with some other local husbands as Love tries to manage her burgeoning relationship with Theo.

episodes.name: W.O.M.B.
episodes.overview: As her mother launches a new venture, Love grows increasingly concerned about a potential big change herself. Joe has a breakthrough in self-awareness.

episodes.name: We're All Mad Here
episodes.overview: While Dottie spirals into emotional turmoil, Love tries to get intel on Matthew's investigation. Joe sets his sights on derailing Marienne's ex.

episodes.name: Swing and a Miss
episodes.overview: Joe selfishly tries to coerce Love into a lifestyle change, but things go south quickly. Theo discovers just how deep Matthew's obsession goes.

episodes.name: Red Flag
episodes.overview: While Love tends to some unexpected long-term guests, Joe decides to take a drastic step to get what he wants the most.

episodes.name: What Is Love?
episodes.overview: As news permeates the community about a recent murder, Joe looks toward a future with Marienne – but hell hath no fury like Love scorned.

episodes.name: Joe Takes a Holiday
episodes.overview: Now living in London, Joe tries to lay low and resist old habits... until he's forced to tie up loose ends and bond with a circle of wealthy socialites.

episodes.name: Portrait of the Artist
episodes.overview: Joe leans on his skills — and a student's insights — to catch his stalker. An art show offers a gallery of suspects, revealing more than the eye can see.

episodes.name: Eat the Rich
episodes.overview: As news of a killer targeting the rich swirls, Joe's stalker inches dangerously close to the truth. Joe's efforts to protect Kate take a dark turn.

episodes.name: Hampsie
episodes.overview: A ritzy weekend getaway doubles as a chance for Joe to hunt down his elusive stalker. Without cell service or Wi-Fi, Joe makes a key connection.

episodes.name: The Fox and the Hound
episodes.overview: While falling back into familiar patterns, Joe gets caught up in an unfortunate game as everyone's plans go up in flames.

episodes.name: Best of Friends
episodes.overview: In the aftermath of the murders, Joe searches for a scapegoat and Rhys pursues his grand ambitions while Kate and Phoebe assert their independence.

episodes.name: Good Man, Cruel World
episodes.overview: The tables turn for Joe when an influential figure comes to town with a tempting offer as Nadia follows a hunch.

episodes.name: Where Are You Going, Where Have You Been?
episodes.overview: As memories of the past trickle in, Joe struggles to recall an important detail. Phoebe shares her hasty plans with Kate. Nadia scrambles for a solution.

episodes.name: She's Not There
episodes.overview: Torn between his dark side and good intentions, Joe works to right his wrongs. After attempting to help Phoebe, Kate faces her father – and hard truths.

episodes.name: The Death of Jonathan Moore
episodes.overview: With love and loss weighing heavily on his mind, Joe commits a final act in hopes of never walking down the same path again.

episodes.name: The Luckiest Guy in NY
episodes.overview: Joe and Kate settle in New York with a pledge to start over, but their headline-making marriage hits a snag when betrayal strikes close to home.

episodes.name: Blood Will Have Blood
episodes.overview: A family dinner descends into chaos when Kate's sister Reagan makes a shocking allegation. Bronte's curiosity lands her in a tight spot.

episodes.name: Imposter Syndrome
episodes.overview: Joe hits an impasse in Mooney's basement, as tension builds at home. Kate plays hardball to protect Henry. Bronte faces exposure at a literary salon.

episodes.name: My Fair Maddie
episodes.overview: A game-changing announcement at Lockwood Corporation sets off alarm bells for Kate. An unwelcome guest crashes Mooney's grand reopening.

episodes.name: Last Dance
episodes.overview: Fueled by fear, Kate finds answers from a troubled source. A puzzling note at work sends Joe on a search for the whereabouts of a missing person.

episodes.name: The Dark Face of Love
episodes.overview: A viral video complicates Joe's dreams of a fresh start — and forces Bronte to question her loyalties. Kate makes changes at home.

episodes.name: #JoeGoldberg
episodes.overview: As faces from his past resurface, the "most visible man in New York" must sway the court of public opinion.

episodes.name: Folie a Deux
episodes.overview: With their relationship at a crossroads, Joe gives Bronte a gift to test her commitment. Kate finds a shoulder to lean on.

episodes.name: Trial of the Furies
episodes.overview: Joe must use all his talents to liberate himself from the Lockwoods' financial grip. Kate tries a dose of deception to achieve her goal.

episodes.name: Finale
episodes.overview: Hoping to decisively close the book on the past, Joe embarks on a risky new chapter. But as with every great story, one last twist awaits.

episodes.name: This Is What Happens
episodes.overview: After losing his high-powered job, Coop attends a neighbor's barbecue, where he faces his ex-wife Mel and makes a surprising choice.

episodes.name: Deuce
episodes.overview: After an unsuccessful job interview, Coop pawns a stolen watch.

episodes.name: Theoretical Herpes
episodes.overview: Nick throws a party for the neighborhood men, leading to tension between Coop and Paul. The women take a self-defense class.

episodes.name: Literal Dragons
episodes.overview: An unlikely alliance begins. Nick throws Mel a surprise birthday party, where she connects with Coop.

episodes.name: This Tourist Has Balls
episodes.overview: Coop and Elena sell a stolen painting. Barney tries to hide his financial struggles from his in-laws. Coop makes a discovery at Sam's home.

episodes.name: The Things You Lost Along the Way
episodes.overview: After being investigated, Coop sets off on a college tour with Mel and their kids while Elena attempts to get ahold of him.

episodes.name: The First Honest Thing
episodes.overview: Detective Lin makes a discovery at the crime scene. Coop plays hardball with Kat. Chivo puts Elena in a tough spot.

episodes.name: When Did We Become These People?
episodes.overview: Coop tries getting back what he's lost. Mel and Sam clash. Coop, Nick, and Barney have a boys' night.

episodes.name: Everything Becomes Symbol and Irony
episodes.overview: Coop fights for his freedom.

episodes.name: We're Here Until We're Not
episodes.overview: The arrival of a charming billionaire neighbor disrupts Westmont Village. Coop finds himself with an unexpected new partner in crime.

episodes.name: Lady Bits
episodes.overview: A surprise party for Tori goes awry, causing a rift in the Cooper family. Sam struggles with her alienation from the community.

episodes.name: We Were Never Supposed to Get This Old
episodes.overview: Ashe offers Coop a deal he can't refuse. Mel feuds with her neighbors over their new dog. Sam goes on a date.

episodes.name: The Bread of Affliction
episodes.overview: Hari and Gretchen's Passover seder brings the neighborhood together for wine, food, and drama.

episodes.name: Halfway to Invisible
episodes.overview: Barney deals with Ashe's audit of Nick's Strong Ass Gym. Coop and Jack travel overseas to woo a big investor. Nick throws a housewarming party.

episodes.name: For Everything Else, There Was Bowling
episodes.overview: Coop and his family navigate a fraught funeral service and wake.

episodes.name: Out East
episodes.overview: Coop and Sam attend a wild weekend at Ashe's Hamptons estate. Mel takes things too far in her battle with the neighbors.

episodes.name: I Feel Lost Without Me
episodes.overview: Mel and Tori face the consequences of their actions. Sam tries to end things with Ashe. Coop is caught between a rock and a hard place.

episodes.name: Propaganda from the Cowardly
episodes.overview: Alliances are tested when Coop, Barney, and Nick attend a dinner at Ashe's mansion.

episodes.name: The Night of the Hunter
episodes.overview: In the wake of another shocking scandal, the neighborhood gathers for Father's Day at the country club.
